### Part 111

- Boat...? Where's the boat? ｜ 船…？在哪里？
- The Gardes Investigation Report indicates that the fireworks released near the end of the show ignited and burned through the rope suspending the water tank above the stage. This caused the water tank to fall and kill Cowell in the box below. ｜ 警备队的调查显示，魔术表演即将结束时燃放的烟花，烧断了悬吊水箱的绳子，导致水箱坠落，箱中的考威尔身亡。

- So, does that mean you've been in Veluriyam Mirage for a long time now, Mr. Chatillon? ｜ 也就是说，沙蒂永先生很早就来到了「琉形蜃境」吗？
- ...Exhausting... It was too far up in the air, I couldn't get to it... ｜ 好累…一直飞在天上，根本没多少攻击的机会…
- You can't forget where you came from and, of course, what others did for you. Please take this, as a token of my appreciation. ｜ 做人嘛，当然不能忘本啦。当然，也不能忘记你的恩情，一点心意，请收下吧。
- ...Do I need to teach you some new recipes? ｜ …需要我教你一些新菜吗？

- This time, I'm gonna check and double check all my numbers. ｜ 这次，我会算得更细致一些。
- These children, whom I served and watched grow older... At some point, they became closer to me than blood. ｜ 这些孩子，这些由妾身侍奉，看着长大的孩子，不知何时已变得比血脉还要亲近。
- Even if we don't get the opportunity to see the Mingxiao Lantern in the city, it would still be nice to release a Xiao Lantern, right? ｜ 就算是没机会去城里看「明霄灯」，放一放霄灯也是好的…对吗？
- Never. And although my mother and father passed away many years ago, both my brother and I are familiar with the vast majority of their acquaintances. ｜ 是的。虽然父母都已过世多年，但与他们有过往来的人物，我和兄长大人大抵还是知道的。
- ...It would indeed seem so. Your line of thinking is fair and responsible. ｜ …看起来确实是这样。不错，这是公平而有担当的思维方式。

- And was Jeht included in those "results"? ｜ 你说的「成果」，该不会也包括婕德吧？
- As I thought, stuff regarding knowledge doesn't really suit me all that much. Too complicated. ｜ 果然学问什么的对我来说实在太复杂了还是不需要动脑子的事情更适合我。
- Luckily, the Akademiya requires a huge supply of Rukkhashava Mushrooms, so I gained a steady job from this. ｜ 还好教令院一直需要大量的树王圣体菇，我也算是有了个稳定的工作吧。
- Hmm. It seems that no one is here. ｜ 嗯？似乎不在。

- The old friend I mentioned was my teacher. When she passed, her body was nowhere to be found. All that's left of her is an empty tomb, and even that's deep underwater now. ｜ 我要祭奠的故人就是我的老师哦，她没留下遗体，只有一座衣冠冢，不过现在已经在水下了。
- Dodoco's Summertime ｜ 「嘟嘟可的夏日时光」
- Mposo ｜ 恩波索
- Whoever wrote that article must have known The Steambird would never print something so defamatory. Unfortunately, not all the papers in Fontaine share our same sense of journalistic integrity... ｜ 那篇文章的作者知道《蒸汽鸟报》不会刊登这种捕风捉影的东西，就买通了其他所有能买通的报社。
- Well, we still have another trump card on top of all the theorizing and speculating! ｜ 单纯只靠推论和猜测也不是办法，我们不是还有那个吗！
- Planting crops and f—feeding the fish. Sometimes, I also do some b—b—butchery. Crocodile skin and meat is v—very useful. ｜ 种地，喂、喂鳄鱼。有时候也做屠、屠、屠夫，鳄鱼的皮和肉，很有用。
- Dihua Islet was once deserted.\nThough that was many decades... no, centuries ago... ｜ 荻花洲，曾经一度荒芜。\n虽然，是过去好多年…不，好几百年的事了。

- Even Paimon can feel the power pouring forth... ｜ 力量源源不断地涌出来，连我都能感觉到…
- The wine goblet from which the Thundersoother, who defeated the Beast of Thunder, once drank violet lightning. ｜ 平雷勇士的酒盏，据说平息了雷之魔兽的英雄曾用这尊酒盏满盛紫电为饮。
- Work-life balance... ｜ 劳逸结合…
- Ahem! I don't care what they think! A—At least I never go home empty-handed! ｜ 咳！不管他们怎么想都没关系！至，至少我钓鱼永不走空车！
- But we don't have time for all that! ｜ 情况明明很危急才对！
- Rain outlines your fate! ｜ 雨线难画。
- My favorite style...? Hmm, hard to say. ｜ 风格吗…我倒是很难说，自己认定了哪种风格。

- You may use Shiki Taishou's charm magic during trials to use the Shikifuda you have selected. ｜ 试炼中，可以运用「式大将」的符法之力，释放选中的「式札」。
- I see, I never knew even a dream could be so dangerous. ｜ 我知道了，居然有这么危险的事。
- Although clumsy and impulsive as he was, you'd think he was the real "strange bird" among the two of us. But still, just like me, he cared deeply about the world, and wanted, more than anything, to cleanse it of all pain and suffering. ｜ 冒冒失失的、笨手笨脚的，还赶不上我呢。但他偏偏和我一样，一腔热血，不管不顾地想要荡平世间一切苦难——

- He's been through quite the ordeal already. For a creature like that, it's best to keep him away from potential triggers. That way, he can slowly recover in peace... ｜ 对于受到过惊吓的动物，尽量让它远离一切刺激，才能使它慢慢走出阴影，彻底变得平和…
- Have you gathered the items for the ritual? ｜ 仪式道具已经备齐了么？
- The symbol of a Natlan tribal warrior.\nA metal whistle that is given to individuals who have been officially recognized as tribal warriors. It is used to communicate and alert others to danger by those that patrol the tribe's vicinity. This is a duty that falls upon the warriors of the tribe. ｜ 纳塔部族战士的象征。\n正式成为部族战士后能够拥有的铁哨。在部族周围巡游，一旦出现危险就用哨声互相通知呼应。这就是部族中「战士」需要履行的职责。
- It's no trouble! I've had a lot of free time lately. I heard things were getting lively at Port Ormos, so I decided to come take a look. ｜ 我没事。最近我的空余时间有不少，又听说奥摩斯港很热闹，就过来到处走走看看。
- Can different Nara have similar melodies? ｜ 不一样的那菈，也会有相似的旋律吗？
- Notes Someone Left Behind (I) ｜ 某人留下的铭记·其一
- I want a break... Why can't the Akademiya give us some time off during the Extravaganza? ｜ 好想放假啊…为什么学院庆典期间不给大家放假呢？
- His point does kinda make sense, but something about it doesn't feel right to Paimon... ｜ 他说的好像很有道理，但我总觉得哪里怪怪的…
- Paimon doesn't know what that means, but let's try it anyway! ｜ 虽然不知道是什么意思，总之先试试看吧！
- This stone slate, which was left behind by someone, points the way forward. Though the words on the slate do not reveal much of their author's preferences, one can tell that he did predict the ignominious fate of these ruins.\nAs such, he endeavored to help those who came after wipe away the marks of time's passing and return to ancient times, thus telling such people of his era's glories and hopes. ｜ 不知谁人留下的石板引导前行的道路。虽然石板上浮现的字样并未流露出过分的好恶，但是可以看出，他预感到了遗迹被黄沙埋没的终局。\n所以他想帮后世之人拂去时间留下的痕迹，重回旧日，好得知他那个时代的风，载着怎样的自豪与期许。
- Master of Ceremonies ｜ 赛场司仪
- With respect, Ma'am, there was no collusion! It was just a one-off conversation. How anyone from Watatsumi Island even found out about it I have no idea... ｜ 九条大人，我们跟他们真的没什么勾结。只是不久之前谈过这么一次，谁知道海祇岛的人怎么知道的…
- That is where we differ, Lord of the Night. You see all humans as the same, but I understand what it means to be a leader. ｜ 这就是你我的不同了，你将所有人类一视同仁，而我深知「领袖」的含义。
- You will always be welcome here. Avin would be happy to see you again. ｜ 随时欢迎你过来，艾文也会很开心的。
- Oh please, where's all of this coming from? I'm starting to feel a little embarrassed... ｜ 请别这么说，我都不好意思了…
- They're fortune coins engraved with the yardstick symbol. One for you, and one for Xinyan. ｜ 是尺字纹的吉语钱！一共有两枚，一枚给你，一枚给辛焱。
- Default ｜ 默认
- A materially-rich southern region that is covered in hill, wood, and wetland. Mighty ramparts defend its western edge from the corroding power of sandstorms.\nLegend has it that many mythical creatures inhabit Sumeru's woods, and only the blessed few are lucky enough to see them. ｜ 物产丰富，遍布山林湿地的南国土宇。西界被高大的角质坚壁保护着，以免其受到沙暴的侵蚀。\n传说在须弥的山林中有着数之不尽的奇异生灵，只有得蒙赐福的善见之人才能看到它们。
- You wouldn't be unable to rescue your comrade by any chance, would you? ｜ 斯露莎该不会没本事救助同伴吧？
- A Letter in Beautiful Handwriting (II) ｜ 字迹华丽的信·其二
- Thank you, Your Honor. ｜ 我。
- #{NICKNAME}, Paimon? Could you wait for me by the sea after the party ends? I'd like to go on a brief walk with the two of you. ｜ #{NICKNAME}，派蒙。派对结束后，在海边等我一下吧。想和你们走一段。
- Nora's already made it there... Looks like it's all over. ｜ 诺拉已经在那了啊，呼…总算是要结束啦。
- Quest Item ｜ 任务道具
- Take care then! Who knows? Maybe you'll make a fortune soon, and when the time comes for you to purchase lots of stuff, we'll be there to help! ｜ 那客人走好！说不定来年你就发了大财，买一堆好货，到时我们就来帮忙！
- See you around, then. ｜ 再见。
- Green Irontrunk Tree ｜ 青叶剑骨树
- No matter how strong the foe, no one will find an attack from above easy to deal with. Use the enhanced jumping power imparted by the Sublime Anemograna and the vertical spaces of the battlefield to surprise your opponents! ｜ 无论多么强悍的敌人，都难以从容应对来自天顶的攻击。借助「高妙风种子」强化的跳跃能力，充分利用战场的垂直空间，向敌方打出奇袭吧！

- But over time, ignorant adventurers and city people mispronounced its name... ｜ 后来没见过世面的冒险家和城里人乱传…才把粮仓传成「宝仓」。
- Hehe, after hearing that detailed explanation from you, Haniyyah, Paimon thinks the future is looking really good! ｜ 听海妮耶这么一细说，我感觉形势大好！
- We might just get lucky. If the pot's here, then surely other stuff related to crafting bonsai can't be far away. ｜ 碰碰运气吧。既然盆景在这里，与它有关的东西不会离得太远。
- Pahsiv, good thing! ｜ 珀西芙！好东西！
- Jump Boosters Collected: ｜ 拾取跳跃助益：
- Phew, the swelling in my leg's gone down... as has the pain. I should probably write an epic for Liyue's medicinal oils, hmm... ｜ 呼…脚踝好多了…消痛了。为璃月的药油我也得作一首史诗才行…
- Working as an executioner, he supposedly used a countless number of tricks to confound his enemies in battle. If only I could've seen the feats of magic he pulled off back then... ｜ 这里写到他是一位行刑人，会将千变万化的戏法运用到战斗中，让敌人难以看透。真好奇那个年代的魔术是什么样的…
- The arc of justice... is broken... ｜ 正义…何在…
- The Upper Sanctum ｜ 浮土静界
- Good to see you again! ｜ 好久不见！
- And I'm not exactly a top-tier talent. *sigh* There's nothing going for me... I guess I'll just have to go back home and take over the three jade mining facilities my old man left behind, and just try my best to get by in life. ｜ 我这人也没什么本事，只能回去继承老爷子留下三座玉石矿，勉强过日子吧…
- Talk to the hilichurl ｜ 与丘丘人对话
- That's... a whole load of random names. Suspicious, too! ｜ 唔…这么多乱七八糟的名字，听起来好可疑！
- ...I mean, that's how Uncle Kimosi told me the story, and he was a member of the exploration team assembled by the Speaker's Chamber! ｜ 呜…这些都是基莫西叔叔和我说的啦，基莫西叔叔也是之前「话事处」组建探索团的成员之一呢！
- It's edible... ｜ 是可以吃的…
- Special Credit Coupons you obtained when Neuvillette tasked you with investigating the Fortress of Meropide. Remember to use them for their designated purpose. ｜ 受那维莱特委托前往梅洛彼得堡调查时候所获取的特许券，记得要专款专用哦。
- Let Paimon see... Huh. This seems to have been left by an adventurer. ｜ 让我看看…唔，看上去这个鼓是一位冒险家留下来的呢。
- Head to Third-Round Knockout ｜ 前往「三碗不过港」
- Certain members get older and realize they want something else for themselves. But, considering the rules of the House... most people would never say that out loud. ｜ 随着年龄增长，一部分人的心里有了别的想法。只是囿于壁炉之家的规矩，不敢轻易开口。
- Paimon wonders where it leads... But staying here won't change anything either, so let's continue, shall we? ｜ 不知道会通向什么地方呢…不过，待在原地也是不会有什么结果的，我们继续前进吧，好吗？
- Look for research materials in the base ｜ 寻找基地内的研究资料
- but at least I had it in me to haul 'em in... ｜ 可是那时候有干劲呀……
- What I actually stole, however, was your "attention." Even though it's not nearly as valuable as your heart, it's still very important to us magicians nonetheless! ｜ 但正确答案是「注意力」，虽然没有「心」那么有价值，但对魔术师来说很重要！
- You've already helped me out enormously, so I couldn't possibly ask you to deal with this all by yourself once again. I will join you this time. ｜ 之前麻烦你帮了我那么多，这次我实在不好意思再让你一个人行动了，我也会去一起处理的。
- Martial Artist's Water Hourglass ｜ 武人的水漏
- Well... This way, if you would. ｜ 呃…总之，这边请吧。
- Haha. I just don't normally get off the boat, so this ruin entrance is... well, quite a sight. ｜ 哈哈，我平时不怎么下船，看到遗迹入口这种大场面，还有点心虚罢了。
- Quite unremarkable. ｜ 单看外表没什么特点。
- The plants here... ｜ 栽种的花草…
- I'd like you to do the same. Please remember to look for the cheaper supplier. ｜ 你帮我订货的时候，记得也帮我找一家货物相对便宜的店下订单啊。
- What's this Pearl Galley you speak of? ｜ 珠钿舫？
- I heard the strongest Gardemeks can be found in a place called the Fortress of Meropide. You've gotta find a way to get there and check them out, let me tell you. ｜ 听说最厉害的警卫机关都在一个叫「梅洛彼得堡」的地方。嗯，得想个办法去看看。
- I want nothing more than to drop everything and run back to Qingce Village right now. But the Ministry of Civil Affairs would... ｜ 我真是恨不得直接回轻策庄去算了，但是总务司这边又…
- Nya, meow... That box has proven its worth indeed... ｜ 唔喵…那个箱子果然很管用…
- Don't you have other purposes? ｜ 你们没有别的目的了吗？
- Sometimes, it's best to stick to what you know. ｜ 扬长避短…或许会是一个好主意。
- Working together, the two unearth the final Ley Line Disruptor. ｜ 合力挖出了最后一台地脉干扰器。
- Huh, but he said that he'd just let us keep going this time even if we dug them up... ｜ 可是这次就算我们挖到了炸药桶，他也让我们继续挖呢…
- She's a very powerful Big Sister adventurer! ｜ 是个很厉害的冒险家姐姐！
- ...There's no point you trying to play it down, you're covered in dust, which I'm sure is from a tooth-and-nail battle with the monsters. ｜ …你也不用掩饰，看你一身尘土的，准是在那里和魔物打了一场吧。
- Eh? Well... I do have some savings, so you don't have to worry about that... ｜ 欸？这…我倒是有点积蓄，报酬你不用担心…
- Use Elemental Tuning to use more Elemental Skills ｜ 进行元素调和，多使用元素战技
- A little kid suddenly shouted at me! I followed the sound through the mist and got out, and was saved! Otherwise, I would've been eaten, just like that, and my family in Fontaine wouldn't even have been able to claim compensation on my account! ｜ 突然有个小朋友，冲着我大喊！我循着声音才走出迷雾，这才得救了。不然要是那样被吃了，我在枫丹的家人连工伤赔偿都拿不到呢！
- Companions who remain in the Serenitea Pot for a long time may take a liking to certain furnishings and prepare gifts for the Traveler in return... ｜ 长期入驻「尘歌壶」的同伴，有可能在观赏到中意的摆设后，为旅行者精心准备回礼…
- Skill DMG|{param1:P}+{param2:P} ｜ 技能伤害|{param1:P}+{param2:P}
- Report the situation to Inaba Kyuuzou ｜ 向稻叶久藏回报情况
- Unsettled? ...Unsettled how? I haven't noticed anything. ｜ 你说大家有些浮躁？有吗，我没感觉到啊。
- A researcher from the Akademiya, right? I didn't expect to see someone like you here... ｜ 来自教令院的学者，对吧？没想到在这里都能遇见…
- I have a feeling that adventurers looking to prove their worth would be interested in that sort of thing. ｜ 那些想要彰显自己实力的冒险家们，说不定会很感兴趣。
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- I try not to miss out on those opportunities. ｜ 一般来说，我不会错过这些机会。
- ...But it'll make a fine memento. I hope it can be of some help during your travels. ｜ 做个纪念吧。希望以后它也能在旅途中帮助你。
- Charged Attack Stamina Cost|{param6:F1} ｜ 重击体力消耗|{param6:F1}点
- Hmm. Perhaps I should find some way to let people know this temple is here... ｜ 我是不是该找个机会，对外宣传一下这座庙呢…
- According to legend, he was the greatest of heroes and leaders, and the one who made a deal with the Ruler of Death, thereby creating the rules that saved Natlan's Ley Lines. ｜ 传说他是最伟大的英雄及明君，曾与死之执政做过交易，并借此制定出挽救纳塔地脉的规则。
- Conductivity ｜ 传导率
- Before the Rite is conducted, the Exuvia will be kept temporarily in the Golden House. ｜ 在仪式举办前，「仙祖法蜕」会被暂时安放在「黄金屋」。
- The Nation of Wisdom places academics and knowledge above everything else. As such, a scholar acknowledged by others within the Akademiya usually possesses a higher social status. Alhaitham was born to just such a family of well-received scholars. His parents died very early in an accident, and he was raised by his grandmother, a Kshahrewar scholar.\nAlhaitham doesn't have many recollections of his parents. He learned from his grandmother that they were both employed by the Akademiya, with his father being a mentor in Haravatat and his mother, a renowned scholar in Vahumana.\nAlhaitham has inherited his parents' intelligence, and he was always the sharp kid amongst his peers, so much so that he started reading abstruse academic journals at around the age of seven. Having noticed his exceptional talents, Alhaitham's grandmother suggested that he attend school early. However, it only took half a day in the Akademiya for little Alhaitham to report this back to his grandmother: Everyone he met there was boring and he preferred reading alone to listening to their meaningless courses. Alhaitham's grandmother saw his parents' talents and personalities in him, and agreed to let him stay home to be self-taught.\nTo Alhaitham, "to be self-taught" means to read, break down, reorganize, and question. Due to his family background, he was lucky to be exposed to books made of paper. Interestingly enough, he takes more pleasure in reading his grandmother's hard-copy collections than obtaining knowledge from the Akasha directly.\nAs opposed to the Akasha, books are inflexible and rigid, and there is no guarantee that their contents are error-free either. To use such a medium of knowledge is to dance with potential misinformation. The majority of people in Sumeru hate this, but Alhaitham derives great enjoyment from it. It was from reading that he acquired the ability to learn, analyze, and even rectify, and ultimately, he has learned to question. If the rustic and primitive method known as reading is ever any trouble, it is trouble that Alhaitham appreciates.\nAlhaitham's grandmother told him: "You and your father both like reading. Now, I can't say if the two of you have been given too much share of wisdom or not, but always remember that being different is a gift."\nKnowledge is to be recognized, pursued, and trusted, but one should never forget to question it. Perhaps only those who come to such an understanding will not be easily moved by Canned Knowledge and other convenient knowledge media. And only someone who had already met these prerequisites would have casually read the Akasha manual sealed deep within the House of Daena.\nAs Alhaitham's grandmother had said, books contain useless information, and sometimes in large amounts, but his sharp mind will sift through them — and if a book he has read lingers in his memory, it will come in handy one day.\nAfter his grandmother's passing, Alhaitham managed her funeral on his own, inheriting her properties and her small library. Before she passed away, Alhaitham's grandmother gave him this earnest blessing: "You are such a smart child. Many such people have large egos and a propensity to act on their own. You are outstanding and possess a broader horizon than ordinary people. This is not a bad thing, but you must take care to have a clearer mind than others. You must understand that vain pursuits are but dust, and that you must discern your path with the greatest of wisdom."\nLater, Alhaitham applied for the Akademiya and was immediately admitted, scoring high marks in the Haravatat entrance exam. He was informed that his grandmother had also applied for him to be able to attend classes in other Darshans. Following his late grandmother's advice, Alhaitham has always kept a low profile and a clear mind, and always makes decisions for himself.\nYears later, when Alhaitham moved into his new house, he brought all those books over. While sorting through them, he flipped through a few that he had read long ago. The journals that had well-wishes written on their title pages were from his mother's collection, and the ones with reference materials inserted between pages and notes on the margins had once belonged to his father. On top of them, there was a thick book with an exquisite, emerald-colored cover. On the title page, his grandmother had written thus: May my child Alhaitham lead a peaceful life. ｜ 学者之国须弥视学术及知识高于一切，换言之，能在须弥获得教令院一定认可的学者往往拥有更高的社会地位。艾尔海森便是出生于这样一个学者家庭，他父母很早就因意外逝世，他由妙论派出身的祖母抚养长大。\n对于父母，艾尔海森印象不深，后来从祖母口中得知双亲都曾在教令院任职，父亲在知论派担任导师，母亲则是因论派的知名学者。\n艾尔海森的优秀头脑来自于父母遗传。他从小就非常聪明，七八岁时看起了同龄人不愿意碰的深奥学术书刊。祖母察觉他资质过人，推荐他提早入学教令院，可艾尔海森只上了半天课就回家告诉祖母：这半天里他在教令院接触到的人都很无聊。比起听那些人讲一些毫无价值的课，他更喜欢独自看书。祖母从他身上看到与他父母相似的才华与性格，同意他在家自学。\n自学一词在艾尔海森生涯中的体现是：阅读、拆解、重组与怀疑。身为学者家庭的一员，他有幸接触纸质书，有趣的是，比起从虚空中获取信息，他更喜欢阅读祖母收藏的纸质书。\n相较于虚空系统，纸质书不灵活、古板，甚至连内容也不能保证绝对正确。使用这样的知识载体无异于同可能存在谬误的信息做斗争，大部分须弥人厌恶这样，艾尔海森却乐在其中。他从中得到学习、分析乃至纠正的能力，进而学会了怀疑。假如简陋而原始的阅读是一种麻烦，那它就是艾尔海森最为欣赏的麻烦。\n祖母告诉艾尔海森：你与你父亲一样喜欢看书，我不确定你们这样的人是否过于聪慧了。但特别从来都会成为财富，你必须记住。\n认可知识，追逐知识，相信知识，也永远不要忘了怀疑它。或许只有能做到这一点的人才能不被罐装知识之类快捷载体轻易打动，也只有符合这一条件的人才会连被封存在智慧宫深处的虚空说明书都随手拿来看。\n如祖母所说，书里存在无用的信息，甚至大量存在，可聪慧的头脑会为艾尔海森甄选，假如有一本书被他读过还能留在记忆中，它就可能在某天成为他的助力。\n祖母去世后，艾尔海森独自处理她的后事，继承了她留下的财产与家中那间小小的书库。临终前祖母真诚地祝福他：你是一个过分聪明的人，天才大都自我、特立独行。你优秀，拥有高于常人的视野，那不是坏事，你务必谨慎，要比常人更清醒，明白所有虚荣的追逐都是尘埃，用最大的智慧去分辨选择你的道路。\n艾尔海森向教令院递交的申请书很快就被批准，他以高分通过入学考试加入知论派。院方告诉艾尔海森，他祖母生前还为他申请过其他院课程的旁听资格，有空时可以四处听听课。艾尔海森遵循祖母的教导，始终保持极度自我、低调与清醒。\n数年过去，艾尔海森搬入新家。他将书库中的纸质书尽数带了过去。整理时，他又一次翻到几本早就看过的书，扉页写着祝语的人文书刊大都是母亲的收藏，夹着资料、页边写满批注的基本来自父亲。另外还有一本翡翠封皮的精装厚书，扉页留有祖母的笔迹：愿我的孩子艾尔海森过上平静的生活。

- Hmph! I, the Prinzessin der Verurteilung, often traverse three thousand universes. Though such a journey may not be long, having more suitable companions and gaining insight into things easily overlooked... naturally wouldn't hurt. ｜ 哼哼，本皇女时常跨越三千宇宙，虽说旅途不算漫长，但适当多些伙伴，洞悉易被忽略之物…自然没有坏处！

- Although our weapon of choice... isn't exactly the same, there are always shared principles in swordsmanship. All I did was give her a reminder or two, and she immediately understood. ｜ 虽然她使用的武器和我用的…差别略大，但剑术总有相通之处，我只是稍微提醒了几点，她就已经大致明白了。
- You enjoy a fantastic meal as well as a wonderful performance. The boisterous night begins to slip away before you know it. ｜ 享用晚餐，观看表演，热闹的夜晚渐渐过去。

- After your character takes DMG: The DMG that character deals in this match increases by 1 (Up to 3 stacks, +3 DMG total).\nWhen Action Phase begins: Draw one random Talent Card from your deck, and your opponent's <color=#{0}>active character receives a shield with 6 points</color>. ｜ 我方角色受到伤害后：使该角色在本场对局中造成的伤害+1（可叠加，最多叠加到+3）。\n行动阶段开始时：我方从牌组中随机抽取1张「天赋」牌，敌方获得<color=#{0}>6点保护出战角色的「护盾」</color>。

- I've loved baking ever since I was a child. Don't you think it's magical? You throw a bunch of random ingredients together in the right amounts, put the mixture in the oven, and then just watch as it slowly balloons up and transforms into a delicious treat...\nHey, do you wanna make gingerbread together sometime? We can make it into a fun little competition — see who can build the biggest, most beautiful gingerbread house! ｜ 我从小就喜欢烘焙。看着一堆零散的食材按照比例融合在一起，就能在烘烤的过程中一点点膨胀、定型，变成香喷喷的样子，是不是很神奇？\n对了，有机会一起来烤姜饼吧？比比看谁能用饼干搭出最高最漂亮的小屋！

- An exquisitely colorful dish. The eye-catching colors and soft, delicate texture contain overlapping tastes that bump against your tastebuds in a flavor firework show. Such a perfect appetizer leaves you in unsurpassed anticipation for the main dish. ｜ 多彩靓丽的菜肴。配色赏心悦目，口感绵软细腻，多层次交叠的味道在味蕾上碰撞出令人惊艳的火花。品尝到如此完美的餐前开胃菜，对正餐的期待已经被拔高至巅峰。

- A detailed step-by-step blueprint for making a Stadium "Speedy Snack" Round Stool.\nAfter using this item, you can view it in the Creation Screen. ｜ 步骤详实的图纸，记载着「竞技场『速食』圆凳」的制作方法。\n使用后可进入制作界面查看。

- Ah! Who is it? Darn...we've been spotted... Brothers, get them! ｜ 啊！是谁？！该死…被发现了，兄弟们上！

- Orichalceous Time-Dial ｜ 金铜时晷
- Roialte walks towards the stage, thinking all the while... ｜ 洛耶茨一边思索，一边走向了演出台…
- What's Windtrace? ｜ 「风行迷踪」是什么？
- Oh, her... I'd prefer not to talk about her. Can we change the topic? Or, if there are any tasks I can take off your hand, I'll gladly oblige! Anything at all? ...Ahem, let's just say it'd be best for my general well-being if we can we avoid talking about her... ｜ 那个女人…我们可以不聊她吗？我来帮你干活，什么杂活都没有问题…呜…就当是为了我的身心健康着想，我们还是换个话题吧？
- Huh? ...Oh, right. Most people seem to call him "Stormterror." ｜ 唔…哦！我想起来了。可是一般人不都叫它「风魔龙」吗。
- Though I don't think it would be any different from the guilds of anywhere else... ｜ 虽然我觉得各地的「冒险家协会」应该没什么区别…
- Jinni ｜ 灯中幽精
- (I must work harder! Harder! Even harder! The valor of the Knight of Flowers must be recreated!) ｜ （为了再现花之骑士的英姿，要努力努力再努力啊！）
- Oh, that... When it comes to light novels, your memory is like a steel trap, huh... ｜ 哦，是那个啊…有关轻小说的事，茜特菈莉果然记得很清楚呢。
- So this is the actual entrance to the Fortress of Meropide. ｜ 到这里才算正式进入梅洛彼得堡吗？
- Quest Item ｜ 任务道具
- If a monster's coming for you, surely you won't be safe at home. ｜ 如果被盯上，躲在家也无济于事吧。
- Making the character just imagine the pain and emptiness is also different from the character actually experiencing the same after doing the deed! ｜ 让角色通过敌人的现状假想复仇后的痛苦与空虚，和角色真的复仇完成后再去感受痛苦与空虚，对观众的说服力也有差别！
- Why do you think I'd do that kind of thing to you? You offend me, Paimon. ｜ 你怎么会认为我会这样对待你们呢？真令人难过。
- The original purpose of the golden castellum was to unify our surviving kin and prevent the catastrophe of the rising waters from ever occurring again. But evidently, Boethius had his own designs... ｜ 建立黄金城堡的初衷，是为统合幸存的同族，避免高海吞没大地的悲剧再度上演。但波爱修斯显然有他自己的想法…
- A prophecy? What kind? ｜ 预言？什么预言？
- It's not just them — all animals fascinate me! I suppose that it's an occupational hazard, though. After all, King Deshret's Seven Pillars are all animal-associated one way or the other, right? ｜ 不光是沙漠里的狐狸，我对动物都很有兴趣。唔…不过我认为这是职业病啦，你看，赤王七柱多少都与动物形象有关，对吧？

- Of Ballads and Brews ｜ 杯中遥吟之歌
- Let's hope you won't say "What a shame, it's a draw" again. I'm sick of hearing you say that. ｜ 希望不要到时候你又要说「真可惜，又是平手」，我可是听腻了。
- Here's hoping I don't run into any more amber on the way... ｜ 希望不会在路上再被琥珀给吞了…

- When we finally got here, I got straight to writing, and he said he wanted to look around alone, so we parted ways. ｜ 进了轻策庄之后，我去帮人写字，他说想自己四处逛逛，我们两个就分开了。
- Yeah. I... figured I should follow local Mondstadt customs, and prepared a few small things themed after the Windblume Festival. ｜ 嗯。我…入乡随俗，准备了一些有关「风之花」的东西。
- You said it yourself — Mikoshi Chiyo is gone. All that remains is a fragment of her nightmare, already broken and vulnerable. ｜ 你自己也说了，而今残留的可不是当年的「御舆千代」，只是她噩梦的一角残片，本就有所缺损。
- Trick Shots, Tricky Lights ｜ 「幻光奇技实录」
- Hee-hee, thanks for indulging me, Yun Jin. You're a star! We should head off now, as I still have one person to give a fortune coin to. ｜ 嘻嘻，云堇对我真好，那我们就先走了哦，还要给一个朋友去送吉语钱。
- So obviously, you haven't finished your signature toy, right? It must be going really bad if you can't even remember to eat! ｜ 一看就知道，你还没做好你的招牌玩具吧？甚至连饭都顾不上吃了，未免也太惨了嘛！

- This state starts with 1 <color=#FFFFFFFF>Breakthrough</color> stack. When re-attached, add 1 <color=#FFFFFFFF>Breakthrough</color> stack. <color=#FFFFFFFF>Breakthrough</color> can have a maximum of 3 stacks.\n<color=#FFFFFFFF>End Phase:</color> Gain 1 <color=#FFFFFFFF>Breakthrough</color> stack.\n\n<color=#FFFFFFFF>When the character to which this is attached uses a Normal Attack:</color> If <color=#FFFFFFFF>Breakthrough</color> has at least 2 stacks, consume 2 <color=#FFFFFFFF>Breakthrough</color> stacks to convert $[K100] dealt into $[K102] and draw 1 card. ｜ 此状态初始具有1层<color=#FFFFFFFF>「破局」</color>；重复附属时，叠加1层<color=#FFFFFFFF>「破局」</color>。<color=#FFFFFFFF>「破局」</color>最多可以叠加到3层。\n<color=#FFFFFFFF>结束阶段：</color>叠加1层<color=#FFFFFFFF>「破局」</color>。\n\n<color=#FFFFFFFF>所附属角色普通攻击时：</color>如果<color=#FFFFFFFF>「破局」</color>已有2层，则消耗2层<color=#FFFFFFFF>「破局」</color>，使造成的$[K100]转换为$[K102]，并抓1张牌。

- I'd like to get some special souvenirs, please. ｜ 想找些特别的纪念品。

- It's pretty good. ｜ 还不错。

- Right, Effendi told us a research project is looking for paid volunteers. That's what we came to see Gafoor about. ｜ 对，听联络员阿芬迪先生说，有个学术项目正在有偿招募志愿者，我们这才过来找加福尔先生了解情况。
- A detailed step-by-step blueprint for making Contrasts of the City of Wisdom.\nAfter using this item, you can view it in the Creation Screen. ｜ 步骤详实的图纸，记载着「『智慧之城的兼罗』」的制作方法。\n使用后可进入制作界面查看。
- Thank you. ｜ 谢谢。
- Meow. ｜ 喵。

- (Messy handwriting. This doesn't seem much like a fortune slip...)\nIn truth, I said all I wished to say to you in the end, but Alice still advised me to write a little, saying that what I cannot say aloud, I can always write, surely. That is the case, though I have spoken directly into peoples' minds for so long... that I never practiced my penmanship anyway.\nNo need to worry if I've pried into any of your innermost thoughts, I've never done anything like that. If that does not reassure you, let me share one of my secrets with you. Having been suffocated by my inability to speak, I wound up being an incredibly talkative person at first. Alice noted that those who used their real mouths to blather on with had far fewer problems than I, since I would set my head abuzz and give myself quite a headache whenever I spoke. She advised me to speak more steadily and present an air of mystery and nobility — which is how I wound up speaking the way you remember.\nI'm off, in any case. There's not much to worry about here with you — so why don't you watch over me instead? ｜ （乱七八糟的字迹，似乎不像是占卜用的签文…）\n其实想和你说的话，都在最后说了。但是艾莉丝说还是写一点。她说我不会开口说话，写字总归可以吧。确实如此，但是常年在别人脑海里说话，我也没怎么练过写字。\n你不用担心有什么心里的念头被我窥探到，我从来不干这种事。如果你不放心，我来告诉你一个我的秘密吧。因为我不能开口说话憋得慌，所以最开始我其实是个话痨。艾莉丝说真开口说话的话痨反而问题没有我这么大，我只要一讲话脑子嗡嗡疼。她建议我说话端着点，表现出一种神秘、高贵的样子。所以我现在说话才是这个风格。\n那我走了。你也没有什么能保重的了，你来保佑我吧。

- Well, I wouldn't get too curious if I were you. Too much knowledge isn't good for ordinary folk. ｜ 既然如此，还是不要太好奇为好，普通人知道得太多，并不是件好事。

- Are you kidding? It's great, I love it! I was just starting to worry when I'd have the time to make one for myself... ｜ 这盏霄灯做的很好啊！我很喜欢的，我还正在发愁，怎么抽出时间来编霄灯呢。
- Some said that it was like a giant, while others said that it was like a beast. However, none knew why it wandered the ruins. ｜ 有人说它像一尊巨人，有人说它像一只猛兽…可谁也说不清它为什么要到处流浪。

- Traverse the mountains of Sumeru, overcome danger, and seek inspiration.\nThere is a fairy tale that states that beasts named dragons slumber deep in the woods, within ruins hidden by countless trees.\nAccording to the fairy tale, these beasts were originally guardians of an ancient kingdom, but that they were cursed, thus becoming what they are today.\nHowever, Kshahrewar researchers have pointed out that the dragon-like beasts are actually mechanical constructs and not the product of some curse.\nThese researchers have gone to great lengths to inform the children in hopes that the children will not put themselves in danger on some tall tale's account. ｜ 游历须弥山野，战胜危险，寻找灵感。\n有这样一则童话：在密林深处，千树掩映的遗迹里，沉眠着名为龙的野兽。\n童话里说，这些野兽原本是古老王国的卫兵，却因为遭受了诅咒，成为了现在的模样。\n不过有妙论派的学者指出，那些形态像是龙的野兽实际上是一种机械，并非是什么诅咒产物。\n学者不遗余力地向小朋友们宣传这一点，希望他们不要因为听了童话而以身涉险。

### Part 112

Biologically, it is an offshoot of the unagi, and it often acts in symbiosis with larger creatures.\nAs to why they appear in Enkanomiya, it may be that the Bathysmal Vishaps, rays, or perhaps even the ancient Great Serpent brought them to this strange land. ｜ 体型修长的两栖鱼类，通常出没于深海中。生物学而言是陆鳗鳗的异种，会通过共生的方式，随其他相比之下更加庞大的生物行动。\n之所以出现在渊下宫，或许是因为深海龙蜥、鳐，抑或是古代的大蛇将它们带到了这片陌生的土地上吧。

- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- These traditional roadblocks are used to delineate prohibited areas in peacetime, but they serve as the basic unit of a defensive line during wartime. Due to the high-density Adhigama Wood used and the addition of very large metal spikes, the weight of this roadblock is frighteningly heavy, enough to stop the head-on charge of a Sumpter Beast. As such, these roadblocks are often dismantled and moved around, set up only when they are needed.\nThat said, there was a certain mercenary with long black-and-golden hair who once opined that "defensive lines were made to be broken," breaking through such obstacles en route to tearing the opposing side's defenses to shreds. This incident was so significant that even her colleagues started to consider installing some strengthening metal structures at the intersection of these roadblocks in order to deal with foes as powerful as her. ｜ 形制传统的路障，平时用以划定禁止通行的区域，战时则是构成防线的基础单元。由于使用了密度较大的「证悟木」，加装了大尺寸的金属尖刺，重量极为恐怖，足以抵御驮兽的冲击，通常会被拆解运输，待到需要时再就地组装。\n话虽如此，有着黑金双色长发的佣兵曾表示「防线就是用来突破的」，在战斗中打碎相仿的路障，直接撕开对方的防线。以至于她的同僚们都开始考虑，是否要在这种路障的连接处也加装金属结构，提升整体强度，以应对和她旗鼓相当的强敌。

- I noticed he instinctively hid as soon as he saw her just now. However, Gorou has a strong sense of responsibility, and will feel ashamed when he next sees me. ｜ 刚才他一看见八重宫司就躲了起来，恐怕是本能反应，但五郎责任心又很强，今后见到我，肯定会羞愧得无地自容。

- Why, yes indeed! I've gotten the pictures I wanted, but since the costs of traveling from Fontaine to Natlan aren't cheap... ｜ 嗯，虽然已经拍摄到了想要的画片，但是从枫丹来纳塔，一来一回的旅费可不容易…

- A valuable Ornamental Fish that may be kept as a pet in the Pool of Sapphire Grace and Shaded Clarity.\nPeculiar fish that look like a heart from the side, which are said to be related to bass. Their dorsal and ventral fins are comprised of flexible bones that are as slender as feathers, hence the proposed name "Heartfeather Bass."\nJade Heartfeather Bass are named for the jade-like coloration they take on in the water. Despite their gentle appearance, they possess remarkable resilience and can adapt to diverse aquatic environments. The clear water in Chenyu Vale is especially suitable for them, where they thrive and live a carefree, comfortable life. ｜ 珍贵的观赏鱼，可被饲养于「灵沼云池」和「澄波游影」中。\n侧面样貌呈心形的奇特鱼类，据说与鲈鱼有着一定的亲缘关系，又因羽毛般细长软骨构成的背鳍和腹鳍，被学者们形象地命名为「心羽鲈」。\n「玉玉心羽鲈」的色泽尤为特别，如同水中的翡玉，因而获得了这一美称。它们有着与安静外貌完全不符的强韧生命力，能在多种特性截然不同的水域存活，而沉玉谷清冽的水质对于它们而言更是无可挑剔，在美玉之名广为流传的沉玉谷，它们生活得无忧无虑，健康安逸。

- Help Needed:\nMy sister and I are still continuing our gastronomy tour here in Liyue Harbor.\nTo think that this place was full of so many wonderful dishes — it was just my luck that I encountered that Zhongyuan Chop Suey first, after all! That dish... Its flavor was just too intense.\nStill, I do miss Mondstadt cuisine, so if someone could bring me <color=#3399CC>three bowls of Radish Veggie Soup</color>, I would be most grateful.\nI hope it's as good as I remember... ｜ 求助：\n我和我姐姐还在璃月港继续品尝美食。\n璃月港原来有这么多美食…我真是时运不济，刚巧撞上了那道中原杂碎…那道菜给我的印象真是…太深了…\n唉，不过我还是很怀念蒙德城的美食，如果有人愿意帮忙的话，请帮我带<color=#3399CC>三份萝卜时蔬汤</color>来吧。\n希望这道菜还是和从前一样美味…

Where may the truth of this world be found?\nWhatever the case may be, you are resolved to continue onward — to "reach the end of your journey." ｜ 从地窟重返阳光照耀之地，离别的苦楚仍在胸中作痛。\n神明的动机，血亲的去向，世界的真相，究竟散落在何方？\n总之，为了那句「抵达终点」，继续向前吧。

- Hmm, I see. It's unusual for Lynette to be so willing to talk with anyone, in fact, she seldom speaks at all. I'm usually the only one she ever talks to. ｜ 是这样啊，难得琳妮特愿意跟你们讲这么多话，她平时还挺寡言少语的，一直都是我一个人在讲话。
- Whoa, Paimon can't see anything... ｜ 哇，看不清了啊…
- Ha, that was a dumb question for me to ask. There's only one group outside the tribe he'll have dealings like this with... ｜ 哈，真是问了个蠢问题，会和他在部落外做这种交易的恐怕只有一类人了…
- Mamoru, Akira, and Genta ｜ 阿守&阿晃&元太
- *gasp* You... struggled outside to make a living, too... We are so alike... You care about the Tanit... and you've always been loyal, no? ｜ 咳咳…呼…你也是…在外面闯荡过的孩子，我们两个很像…你也为塔尼特着想，时刻忠于我们的部族…不是吗？
- You'll get to meet those who work hard to realize their dreams. ｜ 和为了梦想努力的人们。
- Yesterday evening we had a bit of a fight and Kevin stormed off... to the newspaper office. ｜ 昨晚我和凯万有些争执，他就跑出了家门…又去了报社…
- Give them some time to sort both their bodies and memories out... ｜ 给他们留些时间来整理一下自己。不论是身体还是记忆…
- You have reached the limit of obtainable Aged Tokens and will not be able to obtain more Tokens in this trial. Do you wish to continue? ｜ 当前获取的「朽裂之庚牌」已达上限，进行试炼将无法获得更多「朽裂之庚牌」，是否继续？
- Chef Mao starts cooking... ｜ 卯师傅开始了烹饪…
- Alas... What's so fun about cards? Come on, guest, look at the toys I've made... ｜ 唉…牌有什么好玩的，来，客人，看看我制作的玩具吧…
- Vaguely-Readable Inscription ｜ 依稀可以辨认的铭文
- Adventure Challenge ｜ 冒险挑战
- Well, what do you think? Quite the lively festival, wasn't it? I mean, especially the fireworks show that Lady Keqing organized. Ah, that was one for the history books for sure. ｜ 怎么样，今年的海灯节是不是很热闹？尤其是刻晴大人办的那场烟花会，真是令人印象深刻。
- An Aranara, perhaps? ｜ 或许是「兰那罗」。
- After speaking of Mihir and the Oceanids, Sorush seemed to be at a loss. Zurvan's training has now progressed beyond its midpoint... ｜ 谈及米希尔及纯水精灵的话题后，斯露莎似乎有些迷惘。祖尔宛交代的训练已经来到后半…
- It shouldn't matter, it's the thought that counts. ｜ 心意到了就可以，随便送什么都没关系。
- In Natlan, trees tend not to be named for their appearance, but according to the ways in which their wood is normally used.\nFire plays an immensely significant role in Natlan's society, serving not only as a basic light source, but also as a spiritual symbol of profound import. Maintaining an indoor flame has become a daily necessity, requiring fuel that is readily available, safe to burn, and produces minimal smoke for an easier cleanup. Low-lying, yellow-crowned shrubs, widespread across Natlan, fit this role perfectly. Their relatively dry trunks ignite easily and emit a subtle fragrance with natural aromatherapeutic effects when burned, earning them the nickname "Fragrant Firewood." ｜ 据说，纳塔习惯根据木材的常规用途，而非形貌来为树木命名。\n火焰在纳塔社会中扮演着极其重要的角色，不仅是作为基本的照明工具，还是一种重要的精神象征。因此，保持室内火焰的持续燃烧成为了人们的日常需求。而这便要求点火时所用的燃料必须易于获取、燃烧时安全且燃烧时产生的烟雾少以便后续清理。而树冠发黄的低矮灌木，正巧兼有在纳塔分布广泛、树干含水分较少比较干枯易燃，而且在燃烧过程中能够释放出一定的香气，具有天然香薰效果的优点，故此也获得了「余香的薪柴」这一异名。
- I'll tell them that there's good news and bad news — the good being that their boss seems fine, and the bad being that they must face extended sentences for abetting his escape. ｜ 我会告诉他们接下来有一个好消息和一个坏消息。好消息是你们的大哥并未遇到太多危险，坏消息是助人逃狱刑期会增加。
- Our company just recently began expanding its services overseas... which is great for me, because now I basically get paid to travel all around the world! Only downside is, I sometimes get a bit lost when it's my first time in a new city... ｜ 我们的跨国业务是最近才发展起来的，送国际快递简直就像公费出游！但我不熟悉其他城市，经常找不到路…

- "They say 'A real man doesn't accept handouts.' Leave it in the pavilion, I'll go get it myself." ｜ 「有道是『丈夫不食嗟来之粟』。你们放在大堂，待我自取便可。」
- Oh... That's such a sad story... Wait... <color=#00E1FFFF>A pond with a little flower</color>? Hasn't Paimon seen a place like that? ｜ 啊…好可惜的故事…等等…<color=#00E1FFFF>长着小花的水潭</color>？我好像见过这样的地方。

- What happens if you violate the production zone's "hidden rule"? ｜ 违反了生产区的「隐秘规矩」的话，会发生什么？
- Oh, I wouldn't ask you to do that. I know an itinerant sauro-vet from the Flower-Feather Clan who travels about often. I'll ask him to come over. ｜ 不劳两位长途跋涉，我认识一位花羽会的医生，他经常在外游荡，就由我去请他来一趟。
- For the people of Watatsumi, the legends of the Archon War are always filled with bitterness. Many of these millennia-old folksongs tell of a shrine maiden by the name of Mouun, who once rode upon the back of a sea monster, following the Great Serpent unto a tragic, moving end. ｜ 对于海祇之民而言，有关魔神战争的传说必然是苦涩的。在千年传唱的诸多岛歌中，有一位名为「曚云」的巫女，曾乘着庞大的海兽追随大蛇作战，留下了悲壮的名声。

- Looking good. ｜ 不错，很漂亮。
- Let me go over the locations again. ｜ 我再说一次吧。
- A large and out-of-control Fontaine Research Institute of Kinetic Energy Engineering device. During combat, it will channel ousia energy to unleash a Gravity Reduction Field. Characters within this field can jump significantly higher. When the device is in this state, its Gravity Reduction Field will shut down if its core is annihilated by <color=#FFE14BFF>Pneuma attacks</color>. ｜ 失控的大型枫丹动能工程科学研究院装置。在战斗中，会显露出荒性的能源特征以展开重力削减力场战斗。在力场中，角色的跳跃高度也能获得显著的提升。在这种状态下，核心被<color=#FFE14BFF>芒性攻击</color>湮灭后，重力削减力场将会关闭。
- Whenever you feel tired, of course! No matter what time of day it is, if you're feeling tired you should give yourself a break and take a nap. That's what I do. ｜ 当然是感到累的时候啊！无论何时何地，累了就马上休息吧，我就是这么做的。
- I bet you got quite an earful just now, huh? Hehe, but don't believe everything they say. After all, people can tell you anything, and it's hard to separate truth from rumors without facts. ｜ 刚刚打听到了不少东西吧？嘿嘿，不过可不要全信哦，毕竟小道消息，随便谁都可以插上一两嘴。
- If you wish to go somewhere else "on the quiet," you can look for a way near Harrison's store. ｜ 如果你想「悄悄地」去些其他的地方，可以去哈里森的铺子附近找找路。
- Maybe he's not actually aware of the full story, and just stumbled into the deal by accident... ｜ 或许他只是偶然参与到交易中，对背后的事不知情。
- Great! You're all back! I was starting to think I might've really messed things up today! ｜ 太好了！你们都回来啦！我差一点以为今天要闯大祸了！

- Next, we are researchers. Our primary duty is to interact with knowledge, not to meet others' expectations. ｜ 然后…我们是学者，学者的本职工作是跟知识打交道，而不是回应他人的期待。

- Effective against all designed opponents in the set. ｜ 对当前拟想敌人套组内的所有敌人皆生效。
- A potted plant with compound leaves that brings a breath of fresh air into the home. A small room should not contain too many of these, however, and the window should be opened at night for ideal ventilation. ｜ 羽状复叶的绿植盆栽，能为住所带来清新的空气。但不宜在狭窄的房间内放置过多，夜间还须开窗通风。
- It takes the right person to get the most out of a new technology. In your hands, it's sure to capture some amazing sights. ｜ 新奇的道具在厉害的人手里才能发挥最大的作用，在你们的运用下，它想必能记录不少精彩的景色。
- The Adventurers' Guild has noticed that the Rifthounds are attacking the Sacred Sakura. As you head to resolve this incident, you encounter Raiden Ei. After speaking with her, you decide to travel together. ｜ 冒险家协会注意到有兽境猎犬在攻击神樱树的根系，你在解决事件的途中见到了雷电影。在了解了她的想法之后，你们决定同行。
- All the same, now that we have activated the control systems for these ruins, the defensive mechanisms within the proving ground must also have been activated. ｜ 不过既然我们现在已经启动了整座遗迹的控制系统，想必这个试验场里面的防御机关也被启动了。
- Araminali already knew it. Those praise words, running through the branches of the forest, wading through the trickle, along with the breeze, are blown into the "happy nest" of Araminali! ｜ 兰弥那离早就知道啦，那些夸奖的话，跑过林间的枝桠，趟过细细的水流，跟着微风一起，都吹进了兰弥那离的「快乐小窝」！

- Flowers... Glaze Lilies... Incense... ｜ 花…琉璃百合…熏香…
- Is it someone you know? ｜ 是五郎认识的人吗？
- Huh, really... I suppose you've been too busy with other things to pick up the game? ｜ 没想到…难道是因为太忙了没时间学吗？

- Domain of Mastery: Frozen Abyss ｜ 精通秘境：冰封废渊
- Oh! You're the one who came to collect the wedding dress yesterday, right? Wait, please don't say you're returning that dress, too... ｜ 哦！你是昨天来拿婚纱的那位。欸？该不会连你也要退货吧？
- After defeating an enemy, ATK is increased by <color=#99FFFFFF>15%</color> for 30s. This effect has a maximum of 3 stacks, and the duration of each stack is independent of the others. ｜ 击败敌人后，攻击力提升<color=#99FFFFFF>15%</color>，持续30秒。该效果至多叠加3层，每层持续时间独立。
- Hey, a—aren't you that mercenary who bit his tongue? You can still talk? ｜ 你、你不是那个咬了舌头的佣兵嘛？！原来你还能说话！
- Such injustice... that those who gave their all for our tribe should bear such slander. ｜ 可是这对他们不公平…凭什么，为部族付出那么大牺牲的人却要背负那么久的骂名。
- Echoing Conch ｜ 回声海螺
- I'm not the most familiar with Razor, but you can contact me if you ever need help. ｜ 我跟雷泽算不上熟络，但需要帮忙的话，可以联系我。
- Ooh! So this is a gift from Mamesuke and Shibasuke! ｜ 哇！是豆助和柴助的礼物！
- ♩~♩~♩♩ ｜ ♩~♩~♩♩

- Initial suspicions ｜ 最初的嫌疑
- Let's take Chuychu somewhere safer. ｜ 把葵可，送去安全的地方吧。
- Where were we just now? Travel expenses? ｜ 刚刚说到哪了？差旅费？
- Superconduct Reactions Triggered: #1#/%1% ｜ 触发#1#/%1%次超导反应
- Wraah! Wraah! ｜ 哇！哇！

- Speaking of which, she must have left this stone slate behind when she left back then because even she knew this lousy thing had no research value. ｜ 这么说来，她当年离开时会留下这枚石板，一定也是因为觉得这破玩意儿压根没什么研究价值吧。
- Strange Stone ｜ 奇怪的石头
- There's already one lit device here. It appears that we need to find the other three and light them up as well. ｜ 这里已经有一座被点亮的装置了。看来，我们要找到并点亮剩下三座装置才行。
- Dreamdrifter Duration|{param5:F1}s ｜ 梦浮持续时间|{param5:F1}秒
- That's impossible! I just repaired it. It can't be broken again already! ｜ 不可能，我刚修过这台机器，总不能又坏了吧？让我检查一下，别担心，很快就好。
- And so they kicked me out of the tribe under the guise of training— ｜ 于是就以进行修行为名把我一脚踢出了部族的大门——
- I've got other things to do right now... ｜ 暂时有别的事…

- Massive amounts of Hydro energy are coursing through this damp ancient sacrificial altar.\nYou shall earn Weapon Ascension Materials, if — and only if — you can pass the trial. ｜ 这座潮湿的古代祭祀场中，聚积了大量的水元素之力。\n若能通过其中的试炼，或许能获得强化装备的物质。
- Torn Page: A Thousand Nights (III) ｜ 《千夜故事集·三》残页
- I'm getting one for Paimon, too. ｜ 我帮派蒙也领一份。
- This stance holds performers to a higher standard and encourages the development of the arts. ｜ 这对表演者提出了更高的要求，同时，这也在敦促艺术的发展。
- Hmm, hold on. There's a note over there at the side. It might just hold some clues! ｜ 欸，等等，旁边还有一张纸条呢，上面说不定会有什么线索。
- Meow? ｜ 喵？
- This feels like a dream... ｜ 就像梦一样…
- I'm only speculating here, but from experience, I'd say it's probably just a local legend. I doubt the dog even exists. ｜ 但按经验…我猜这只是个乡野传说，根本没有什么狗。
- Shield Duration|{param6:F1}s ｜ 护盾持续时间|{param6:F1}秒
- Looks like we've got all the Inazuman specialties. ｜ 稻妻的区域特产，好像全都被我们拍过了呢。
- Woof? ｜ 呜汪？
- Yep. I can make a big magician's hat float in the air... ｜ 嗯，我会把大大的魔术帽悬浮在空中…
- But at least they don't make things worse, either. And everyone knows that some things are simply too hard for them. ｜ 紫金渔鸥至少不会让一件事更糟啊。而且每个人都知道，有些事对紫金渔鸥来说太过艰难，它们就是办不到。
- Certain offerings yet to be made ｜ 尚未完成所有供奉
- With only my dream and my rapier, how can I possibly defeat the dragon? ｜ 我除了自己的决心，只有这细剑一柄，又该如何同恶龙一较高下？
- #We're {NICKNAME} and Paimon. ｜ #{NICKNAME}和派蒙。
- Have fun. ｜ 玩得开心。
- Nepecha ｜ 妮佩卡
- Maximize your resources and try to use all your Elemental Dice each Round ｜ 合理分配资源，尽量每回合用完元素骰
- Uhh... kind of? Maybe? ｜ 好像…是这么个道理？
- #First we gotta get out of Yujing Terrace... Huh? Look, {NICKNAME}, it seems like there's something kinda fishy going on over there. ｜ #首先得先从玉京台离开…咦？{NICKNAME}你看，那边气氛好像有些微妙？
- Unknown Voice ｜ 某人的声音
- Says who? Why, you two-faced...! You're going back on everything you said! ｜ 谁说的？你…你怎么能突然变脸，出尔反尔！
- Then it's strange, isn't it? Why would they scratch out the words? And just leave that bit in... ｜ 那这样想就奇怪了，为什么字被磨掉了？只剩下这句…
- #<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Fontaine's aquabuses are pretty cool. But imagine if they could run without tracks. Then you could go anywhere you want pretty much without having to move a muscle! Traveling would be way less tiring.\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>But you already fly everywhere. Does that even get tiring?\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Fly... Fly? Wait, that's it! If we could find a way to make the boats float in the air, then they wouldn't need rails anymore. Hehe, and we could call them "airboats"!\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>C'mon, let's go apply for one of those, uh... oh yeah — "patents"! We can't let Paimon's genius go to waste. Quick, before someone else beats us to it!\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>Patents don't work like that... You can't just have a name for your invention. You also need to provide details of the original technical solution that makes your airboats float.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Technical, huh? Hmm... Okay, got it! We just need to attach a giant propeller on top of the boats!\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>Okay... But how would you prevent the boat from spinning along with the propeller? And how would you control the direction of movement?\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Um... Uh... Ugh. Paimon never realized flying was so complicated! It's always been second nature to Paimon...\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>Hmm... Well, there might be an easier solution if we ditch the direction and speed control requirements?\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Huh? Really!?\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>Yeah. It involves starting at a high altitude and flying downwards at a rapidly-increasing velocity.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Hey! That isn't flying, that's free-falling! ｜ #<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>枫丹的「巡轨船」好方便！要是没有轨道也能用就好了，去哪儿都不用自己费力气。\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>派蒙不是一直在飞吗？也会觉得累吗？\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>飞…飞…对哦！要是能让「巡轨船」飞起来的话，不就不用轨道了吗！嘿嘿，就叫它「飞空船」好了！\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>快，我们去申请哪个什么…「专利」！这么天才的点子，可不能让别人抢了先！\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>只想出一个名字可申请不了专利啊，还得有能让船飞起来的方案。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>方案吗？唔…比如说…比如说…在船顶安一个巨大的螺旋桨！ \n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>那怎么保证船不会跟着螺旋桨一起转？又怎么控制飞行的方向？\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>这个…那个…唉，飞行原来是这么麻烦的事吗？我平时都没注意到…\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>嗯…不过不考虑方向和速度的话，还有一个简单的方案。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>欸？真的吗！\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>找一个足够高的出发点，然后向下加速飞。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>喂！那不就是坠落吗！
- Considering the situation of Pate de Fruit and Crepes Suzette Stations, it is possible that those fellows from Snezhnaya are also at the central processing station... ｜ 考虑到「果果软糖站」和「桔桔薄饼站」的情况，中枢处理站说不定也有那些来自至冬的先生们…

- Whoa. That's a guy's real parents for you, huh...? ｜ 哇…这就是亲生父母吗…？
- This drink shaker, as practical as it is exquisite, is a gift from Master Diluc. It is said that this shaker can make drinks of exceptional richness, which can stimulate the truest emotions of those who partake. Thus, the drinks this shaker makes have earned the nickname "liquor of truth." A certain classic tale also circulates between customers and bartenders alike — that giving such a gift means that the other party is someone you would drink with any day, thus making it a symbol of "unreserved trust." ｜ 来自迪卢克老爷的赠礼，雅致美观而实用的摇壶。据说这种摇壶能调制出口感格外浓郁的饮品，激发酒客们最真切的情感，因此也被称为「真言之酒」的源头。在酒客与调酒师之间也流传着一个典故——将摇壶作为礼物赠予对方，代表着将对方视为对饮的最佳人选，即「毫无保留的信任」。

- The great dragon erected many peculiar structures across the land. In the ancient legends, the great dragon's outstretched wings could together blot out the light of the sky. Perhaps such descriptions were not hyperbole, or perhaps such wording was a metaphor for their desire to see beyond the sky.\nBut now, the traces of said ancient dragon have already vanished, and the people of today can only but glimpse the forging techniques of that ancient civilization through the shattered remnants of those massive structures and their patterns. ｜ 巨龙曾在大地上竖立诸多构型奇特的建筑。古老的传说中，巨龙的羽翼相互勾连便可遮住天光，或许这形容并未存有夸张之处，又或者这句话其实是他们觊觎天外之域的隐喻。\n不过如今远古之龙行迹已绝，现在人们只能从那巨大构造的残型与纹路里，窥得一些古老文明的铸就之法。

- This wondrous crystal contains a certain rhythm, like something beautiful woven from delicate silk. These items can be found throughout the mainland or from merchants who collect curios. The tune held within this crystal can be revivified in your Serenitea Pot using either "Euphonium Unbound: Winding" or "Euphonium Unbound: Soaring." The tune contained within this Radiant Spincrystal is "Que le vent soit doux." ｜ 蕴含着韵律的奇妙结晶，宛如细腻丝绸编织而成的美玉。零星散布在大陆各地，或是寻觅珍奇的商人手中。通过「尘歌壶」中的「千籁至音·飖扬」或「千籁至音·缪绕」，可以还原记录在其中的旋律。当前「旋曜玉帛」中蕴含旋律为「柔风的欢愿」。

- A small settlement that strives to recreate the scenery of the Masters of the Night-Wind, with buildings laid out to resemble the crest of an Iktomisaurus.\nTo the eyes of outsiders, the Masters of the Night-Wind are a mysterious and inscrutable tribe, and most assume their shamans to be eccentric and hard to approach — not without good reason, for the environs which the Masters of the Night-Wind inhabit are not somewhere that those of a more conventional disposition would thrive.\nEccentricities aside, these shamans excel at tending to the ins and outs of festival ceremony — in addition to looking after themselves. How else would they be able to meditate in comfort all day long? ｜ 力求还原「烟谜主」内景色的聚落，其用建筑排布出的造型颇为抢眼，彷如暝视龙的巨大羽冠。\n在外人看来，聚集着萨满的「烟谜主」神秘诡谲，难以揣测。人们揣测，萨满们定然性情古怪，难以接近——事实上「烟谜主」内的确怪人颇多——他们居住的环境也必然不是常人能适应…\n然而，这群伟大的萨满们在精通祭典仪式的同时，也很擅长照顾自己。不然，他们怎么能舒适地冥想一整天呢？

- Dad didn't agree at first, but one of his friends pulled out a letter and asked to speak privately with him. ｜ 爸爸最开始还不同意，但是…有个叔叔突然拿出了一封信，说要和我爸爸出去单独谈谈。
- Go to the tower containing the statue ｜ 前往神像所在的高塔
- The Fox in the Dandelion Sea (I) ｜ 蒲公英海的狐狸·卷一
- Particles Collected: #2#/%2% ｜ 收集数量：#2#/%2%
- Lemme see... Yep, looks like we've got enough funds now! Let's go see Bernhard. ｜ 让我看看…这么多资金应该足够了！我们回去找伯恩哈德吧！
- Hmm... But it looks like Kindlejoy's not loving the cool flavors much. ｜ 可是，冰冰凉凉的风味，好像不怎么能让「欢腾之火」满意？
- Talk to Eide ｜ 与埃德对话
- Treasure Hoarder Member ｜ 盗宝团成员
- Sounds like a convenient way of finding other TCG players. ｜ 不过这样可以找到一起玩的人…
- *sigh* How can I ever become a real knight of Favonius like this...? ｜ 哎，这样下去，我什么时候才能成为真正的西风骑士呢…
- Can you tell me how to play first... ｜ 我先问问怎么玩…
- Hero of Simulanka ｜ 希穆兰卡的勇者
- Perhaps a river used to flow through here, but it dried up? Or perhaps... this boat was not made to be used by the living? ｜ 或许这里曾经也有河流，只是后来干涸了。也有可能，这艘船并不是给生者乘用的…
- Talk to the Aranara ｜ 和兰那罗对话
- Everyone sits around the campfire, chatting and cooking barbecue. ｜ 大家席地而坐，就着火堆烤了些食物边吃边聊。
- Don't you try to sneak a bite, Paimon. ｜ 派蒙不可以偷吃的。
- Return to the Stadium of the Sacred Flame ｜ 返回圣火竞技场
- Complete "The Morn a Thousand Roses Brings." ｜ 完成「千朵玫瑰带来的黎明」剧情
- Eh? Hahaha, that's a tough one. Ummm... Why don't we make one up? ｜ 哈？哈哈哈，还真问倒我了…要不，我们自创一个？
- As a scholar, I should have the courage to accept failure and shoulder all of its consequences. I never wanted anyone to pity me, whether it be back then or right now. Also, don't forget that I eventually managed to solve that final puzzle by my own power, and freed myself from that accursed place... Instead of pity, shouldn't people feel encouragement and inspiration from my story? ｜ 作为学者，原本就该坦然接受失败、承受后果…我绝不希望别人可怜我，无论是过去还是现在！再说了，我明明是凭实力解开了最后的谜题，逃出了那个鬼地方…比起可怜，不该多从我身上找点激励和启发吗？
- Solving a truly ancient mechanical puzzle requires deciphering a deluge of ancient texts. I don't mean to boast, but they're probably on a completely different level from the ones you've solved on your adventures. Oh? Don't believe me? Then why don't you pick out some of the hardest ones you've done and show them to me? If I spend more than a half hour on any of them, it's your win. ｜ 从前的那些机关解谜需要配合大量的文献解读研究。不是我吹嘘，跟你解过的谜题恐怕完全不在一个层次。不服？好啊，你挑些你觉得难的，摆出来看看。能思考超过半小时就算我输。
- I'm a pirate ship after all! Call it a pirate ship's intuition, or some kind of sixth sense — either way, the moment I woke up, I could sense that this area is filled with valuable treasures. ｜ 毕竟我也是海盗船嘛，该说是长久在海上搜寻珍宝的直觉呢，还是什么感应，我刚醒过来就感应到，这周围可有很多珍贵之物。
- Gaming's Granny ｜ 嘉明阿婆
- Jeht? She is a good child. She learns our ways quickly and greets trouble with neither grimace nor complaints. ｜ 婕德吗？她是个好孩子。在部落学得很快，也很能吃苦…从没见她抱怨过。
- In Remembrance of Viridescent Fields ｜ 野花记忆的绿野
- Anyway... I'm here because I'm trying to capture Xbalanque. ｜ 言归正传，我正在想办法捕捉希巴拉克。
- No problem. Thank you for looking out for him. ｜ 不必客气，拜托你们了。
- I've searched all over the city. If he really hasn't returned yet, then... ｜ 城里我都找了个遍，如果他还没回来的话…
- "Guard" ｜ 「守卫」
- They seem... they seem broken! They aren't moving at all! Whew. Th—That really gave Paimon a fright back there. ｜ 好像…好像都是坏掉的？都不会动欸！吓、吓死我了。
- Don't get ahead of yourself, now. Victory will obviously be mine! ｜ 话不要说的太满，要夺冠的明明是我才对！
- Ow ow ow... ｜ 嗨呀好痛…
- "Now, I will seize my own destiny." ｜ ——「现在，我将抓住自己的命运。」
- Wherever a Knight may go, the resolve to defend others goes with them. ｜ 骑士无论身在何处，都会秉承「守护」的决意。
- A custom-made Sweet Madame. Such a fragile yet tempting dish is not often seen. ｜ 特制的甜甜花酿鸡。这么脆弱又诱人的美食并不常有。
- You cannot make a sprout grow into a giant tree instantly, nor can you force a tree to bear fruit overnight. ｜ 你没办法让小草在瞬间就变成大树，也不能让树在瞬间就结满果实。
- Miner ｜ 矿工
- Investigate ｜ 调查
- What lies in wait for us? I rarely stop to think about it.\nNo matter what dares to stand in my way, I must press forward. ｜ 前方会有什么？我很少会思考这种问题。\n我必须前进，不论有谁阻挡在我面前。
- Go to the Children of Echoes to gather intel ｜ 前往回声之子搜集情报
- Friends, Travelers, Lend Me Your Ears... ｜ 旅者且留步…
- What are you saying, Sorush? Mihir's been fighting all by herself to fulfill her mission all this time... She's been very brave. ｜ 斯露莎在说什么呀，米希尔可是一直在努力完成自己的使命呢，独自战斗了这么久…这是很有勇气的行为啊。
- <color=#00E1FFFF>This was never about escape... This is... the biggest difference... Urgh...</color> ｜ <color=#00E1FFFF>从来不是为了逃脱…这是…最大的差别…唔…</color>

- That's a valid point. A quiet environment and high-quality sleep are beneficial for my work. After all, my exceptional hearing is my most valuable skill. ｜ 说得不无道理，安静的环境和高质量的睡眠对我的工作有益，毕竟我最有利用价值的技能，就是我格外敏锐的听觉。
- As for Filliol, Nanteuil, and the others... I'm afraid there's little I can do. They can try to escape, but once you know our secrets, there's no getting out alive. ｜ 菲约尔、南特伊为首的这些人，再加上克雷薇…他们想要叛逃，那就没有商量的余地了，没有人能带着秘密活着离开。
- ...I can't decipher it, though. It seems we'll have to approach this in what academics like to call the old-fashioned way... ｜ …没办法了，还是用我们学者最笨，也是最自讨苦吃的方法吧。

- As such, I've decided to give her some space and wait for her from a distance. Given her talents, I'm sure she'll do even better than me. ｜ 所以我决定给她充足的空间，暂且在远处守候她。她那么优秀，一定会做得比我更好吧。

### Part 113

- In Co-Op Mode, this effect only applies to your own character(s). ｜ 多人游戏时，仅对自己的角色生效。
- Gurk... So much air... in Paimon's stomach... ｜ 咕…喝风喝饱了…
- A finely designed model horn adorned with metallic decorations on the body that give it an abnormally luxurious appearance. It is the same design as the horn model found in the Faded Castle.\nIt is said that in the past, the sound of the horn was deep and resounding, like the furious roars of wild beasts, and was therefore used to express battle scenes. Today, a variety of instruments are used for this purpose, and this majestic instrument has gradually been reduced to being an iconic symbol. ｜ 造型精美的号角模型，角身缀有金属装饰，华贵异常，与褪色古堡内的号角模型形制相同。\n据说在过去，号角的音色低沉而浑厚，有如猛兽的怒吼，故而常被用来演绎战斗场景。如今，这一功能已然被形式丰富的气鸣乐器取代，而这种威武的乐器渐渐成为了一种象征意义上的符号…
- Oh? Well, well, who are these two little cuties? Help you hired, Hampeq? ｜ #哇，好可爱的小朋友！{M#他们}{F#他们}是你雇来的助手吗？

This effect can occur once every <color=#f39000>4</color>s. ｜ 要点：<color=#f39000>原激化、蔓激化、超激化反应</color>\n角色触发原激化、蔓激化、超激化反应后，本次演武中每名敌人被击败时所提供的基础得分将增加<color=#f39000>2</color>，此效果至多每<color=#f39000>4</color>秒触发一次。

- The adepti faced off against the Qixing outside the city. Just as things were coming to a head, you went to the Golden House to intercept Childe as he attempted to seize the Gnosis, only to find yet another twist: The Gnosis was never at the Golden House to begin with. Childe swiftly switched to his backup plan, attempting to force the Geo Archon to make an appearance by summoning an ancient god with Fatui-forged Sigils of Permission... ｜ 仙人与七星在城外对峙，山雨欲来之际，你前往黄金屋阻止「公子」夺取神之心，却又发生了变故。神之心似乎并不在黄金屋，而「公子」为逼岩神现身，用「百无禁忌箓」召唤出了远古的魔神。
- Just one life among many. My present concerns are how to survive... and how to help my brethren. ｜ 也是芸芸众生的一员吧，现在想的是怎么活下去。怎么帮助同胞。

- Whatever the world throws at them, they just take it as it comes — no nonsense, no pretensions. Honestly, I think that's pretty awesome. ｜ 不论世界是什么样子，就以最基本的姿态去面对。我觉得这样也挺好的。
- What the heck? The birds here steal stuff? Rude! ｜ 怎么会这样，这里的鸟还抢东西的？太没有礼貌了！
- To win the title of the Imperial Lord of Gourmet, you and the Hilichurl Teahouse are squaring off in a super-powered cook-off. The winner shall earn the right to present their dish to the Shogun... How about that? Sounds like a novel concept, doesn't it? ｜ 为了争夺御前料亭之王的名号，你和丘丘人茶室开始了一场超能力料理战斗，胜者可以将菜品交由将军品尝…怎么样，是很新颖的故事吧！

- We need something red... ｜ 需要红红的东西…
- Hu Tao is not, in fact, best known for her role as Director, but for her other great accomplishment: the creation of poetry.\nShe dubs herself the "versemonger of the darkest alleys," and free verse flows forth untamed from her mouth whenever she has free time to be out on the streets.\nThe "Hilitune" is Hu Tao's most famous work, well-loved not only by the people of the harbor, but ever on the lips of children as far as Qingce Village as well.\nHobbyists and critics alike were greatly surprised by the simple but profound originality of the "Hilitune" and its creation, and went to Wanwen Bookhouse in droves to search for the works of this great poet. Unfortunately, Hu Tao's anthologies, named "Fiddlesticks" and "Of Common Lives" respectively, have yet to be published.\nXingqiu, ever immersed in books, also wanted to meet this strange person, and so chose an auspicious date to visit, bringing a gift with him.\nThe two hit it off immediately, and they exchanged pointers and impromptu poetry in Wangsheng's main hall — and when faced with the poetry of Xingqiu's traditional, artistic bent, Hu Tao could always return in kind with some strange and marvelous verse.\nAnd there was meaning in the chaos, indeed, a rhythm to the bizarre that anyone could perceive, and it was catchy, too.\nThus did she "beat the old master with untrained fists," leaving Xingqiu at a loss for words.\nAt length, the poetic spar ended amiably, and they have been friends ever since, reading and composing poetry with one another when they have the time to meet.\nOver time, Chongyun, too, was pulled in to serve as an umpire, their laughter filling the streets.\nThe poems born from these sessions would also be recorded by bystanders.\nIf ever you should hear a pair of matched verses, one strict and the other playful, you are most likely to have heard one created jointly by Hu Tao and Xingqiu. ｜ 胡桃最出名的并非她的堂主身份，而是她的另一大成就：诗歌创作。\n她自称「小巷派暗黑诗人」，每当上街闲逛，打油诗便脱口而出，拦都拦不住。\n《丘丘谣》是胡桃最为出名的作品，不只得港口居民喜爱，远至轻策庄都有孩子传唱。\n爱好者与评书人为《丘丘谣》简单而深邃的创作风格所震惊，奔赴万文集舍寻觅这位大诗人的作品，但很可惜，胡桃的诗集《璃月闲话》与《柴米油盐》均尚未发行。\n日日泡在书店的行秋也想一睹奇人尊容，特意择良辰吉日携礼登门拜访。\n二人一拍即合，到往生堂中庭即兴赋诗，切磋技艺。对上行秋对仗工整的传统诗句，胡桃总能用巧思与怪词还以颜色。\n胡来中自有深意，嘿，古怪里还透着韵律，易懂易读，比寻常诗词还要朗朗上口。\n真可谓乱拳打死老师傅，直叫行秋哭笑不得。\n最终，赛诗会在友好的氛围中落幕。自此，两人便成了诗友，一有闲暇便相约吟诗。\n次数多了，甚至连重云也被拉来担当评委。三人的欢声笑语如秋叶一般，洒满街头巷尾。\n这些切磋的诗句，也被旁听者记录下来。\n若在街头听见上句严肃下句俏皮的怪异顺口溜，八成是胡桃与行秋对出的奇诗。

- Drops are exclusive to the current challenge and will not be saved once you exit.\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Artificer Experience required to raise Artificer Level</color>\nArtificer Level <color=#FFCC33FF>1/2/3/4/5</color> corresponds to Character Level <color=#FFCC33FF>70/75/80/85/90</color>. Reaching the next Artificer Level will require <color=#FFCC33FF>2,000/4,000/6,000/8,000</color> Artificer Experience respectively. ｜ 掉落物资只可以在本次挑战中获得，退出挑战后不会保存。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【提升神工等阶所需的神工阅历】</color>\n神工等阶<color=#FFCC33FF>1/2/3/4/5</color>，对应角色等级<color=#FFCC33FF>70/75/80/85/90</color>，提升至下一等阶所需的神工阅历分别为<color=#FFCC33FF>2000/4000/6000/8000</color>。

- Amazing... Suddenly, Paimon feels so relaxed, and maybe even... happy? ｜ 真难得，我好像感受到了放松，还有快乐？

- 5-Hit DMG|{param5:F1P} ｜ 五段伤害|{param5:F1P}
- "Everyone here is always thinking back fondly upon the fine wines of Mondstadt, as well as all the happy times we have spent with each and every one of you." ｜ 「大家无时无刻不在怀念蒙德的美酒，还有那些与你们一同度过的日子。」
- *sigh* When I first arrived, I borrowed some Mora from the International Trade Association to start my business. Who'd have thought that I would end up being confined in Ritou, not allowed to enter other areas of Inazuma... ｜ 唉，当初从枫丹过来的时候还借了万国商会一笔钱作为启动资金，谁能想到现在被限制入境，只能在离岛上艰难求生…
- Message ｜ 留言
- Fantasia Flowers ｜ 幻剧之花
- A metal vessel that can be filled with a drink to dispel the loneliness of the long watch. ｜ 金属的容器。可以用来装某种能排遣漫长守望带来的孤独的液体。

- ...! ｜ ——！

- Explore up ahead ｜ 向前探索
- This guy's overdue for an attitude adjustment! ｜ 修正他！修正他！
- The accident of falling into a pit can also be a chance to reveal the buried past beneath the dust. ｜ 坠入陷坑的意外，亦是揭露尘封往事的契机。
- Road to the West of Dawn Winery ｜ 晨曦酒庄西侧大道

- Accumulate a total of 1,800 Warm Essence ｜ 累计收集 1800 个「温暖精粹」
- Fine. Just think of a way, please. Otherwise, we'll have to eat grilled fish again. ｜ 哎呀，总之你快点再想想办法啦，再这么下去，我们又要接着吃烤鱼了。
- Wonderful, that's one answer we can count out. ｜ 很好，我们姑且当作不是吧。
- Madam Faruzan, will we learn origami at the Akademiya? ｜ 珐露珊前辈，教令院里，会教我们怎么折纸吗？

- Childishly Written Message ｜ 笔迹稚拙的留言
- Maximize your resources and try to use all your Elemental Dice each Round ｜ 合理分配资源，尽量每回合用完元素骰
- Looks like we should help them. ｜ 看来应该帮帮她们。
- D—Demons? Here? What sort? ｜ 妖…妖怪？这里有妖怪？什么妖怪？
- *sigh* Liu... Your daddy misses you so much... ｜ 唉…小六，爸爸好想你啊…
- This way, there will certainly be more orphans... ｜ 只是这样一来，一定又会有很多孤儿…
- Receiving a Gift: III ｜ 收到赠礼·其三
- There are hilichurls in the outside world too. ｜ 外面也有丘丘人之类的魔物。
- You really think so...? ｜ 是这样吗…

- Low HP: III ｜ 生命值低·其三
- A card face that can be obtained from Genius Invokation TCG. For reasons unknown, the printing method used here allows you to see slightly different images on the card face when you view it from different angles... ｜ 「七圣召唤」中，可以获得的牌面，不知道利用了什么样的印刷方法，在不同的角度观看牌面的牌画时，似乎能够看到牌画中的内容也有些微的不同…
- Report back to Kosekimaru ｜ 回报「越石丸」
- Non-Combat State Duration|{param5:F1}s ｜ 非战斗状态持续时间|{param5:F1}秒
- When It's Windy ｜ 起风的时候…
- She must be Rashnu. Don't you think she seems kinda... tired, though? Looks like we might need to help her out somehow... ｜ 她一定就是拉沙鲁了，不过感觉她好像有点没精神？该怎么让她恢复精神呢…
- New guidance has appeared on the Scarlet Sand Slate. Continue investigating based on the emerged words. ｜ 石板的指引还在继续，根据新出现的文字，继续调查吧。
- See you, Traveler. It would be wonderful if we should have the fortune to meet again in Sumeru... and I believe Mr. Garcia would be most glad as well. ｜ 再见，旅行者。如果我们能在须弥再会，我会很高兴的…我想加尔恰先生也是。
- Elder, Scions of the Canopy ｜ 悬木人长老
- You know, Prince. This is The Cat's Tail, after all, so I thought having a cat take care of our new customers would be quite a nice touch. ｜ 对，就是「小王子」哦。你看，让猫尾酒馆的猫，来为各位「玩家」服务，不是正好吗。
- Starglitter ｜ 星辉
- Hey, who're you trying to impress? ｜ 喂，别逞强。
- Namisen DMG Bonus|{param5:F2P}Max HP/Stack ｜ 浪闪伤害值提高|{param5:F2P}生命值上限/层
- Did you design all those mechanisms? ｜ 洞府里的机关是您建的？
- Venti is in top form today. ｜ 不愧是你。
- Talk to Bennett ｜ 与班尼特对话
- Message ｜ 留言
- Hey, don't laugh at me for my rudimentary knowledge. I followed my dad on adventures and saw some impressive sights, but this was the only one that stuck with him... ｜ 嘿嘿，可不要笑我见识短。我跟随老爹到处冒险，也见过不少印象深刻的风景，但令他也念念不忘的只有这个…
- Paimon was just thinking that she looked kinda troubled... ｜ 她果然有心事吗？
- The young lady? ｜ 大姐姐？
- It'd be more efficient if we split up. ｜ 我们分头行动，提高效率。
- A detailed step-by-step blueprint for making a Hilichurl Totem Fence.\nAfter using this item, you can view it in the Creation Screen. ｜ 步骤详实的图纸，记载着「丘丘图腾围栏」的制作方法。\n使用后可进入制作界面查看。
- Enough... phantom, be gone! ｜ 够了…毁灭吧，虚无的幻影！
- Still the wrong answer... Paimon thought that made a lot of sense! It feels like time's just repeating itself. ｜ 还是不对么…明明我觉得挺有道理的，感觉就是时间的流动在同一天循环呀。
- Yakan Evocation: Sesshou Sakura ｜ 野干役咒·杀生樱
- A layered, leafy vegetable. Said to have originally been an ornamental plant, it certainly looks great in the pot. ｜ 层层相裹的蔬菜。据说曾经是观赏植物，如今在锅里的模样也很棒。
- Barrage Minuet ｜ 弹幕小步舞
- You can also initiate gift envelope creation <color=#FFCC33>yourself</color> and decorate them with various motifs. You can give the completed envelopes to your <color=#FFCC33>companions</color> and also to <color=#FFCC33>other players</color>, or exhibit them publicly on a <color=#FFCC33>celebratory board</color>. ｜ 旅行者也可以<color=#FFCC33>自行创作</color>祝柬，并用各种纹样装饰祝柬。制作完成的祝柬可以赠送给<color=#FFCC33>伙伴</color>，亦可以赠送给<color=#FFCC33>其他旅行者</color>，或公开在<color=#FFCC33>祝柬展栏</color>中。
- Uh, no! They're not the same thing at all! ｜ 不对，根本不是一回事吧！
- Nod your head if you can speak. ｜ 如果能说话就点点头吧。
- Ugh, this dish has already gone totally cold. ｜ 呃，这份菜已经凉透了啊。
- Very good. Now, onto the next. ｜ 嗯，那我们就继续哦。
- Fate is really unreasonable, isn't it? It has no heart, and obeys no rules. The prophecy has only just started to come true, and so many people have already lost their lives... ｜ 命运真是完全不讲道理，也不遵守规则，仅仅作为预言开始的征兆，就要夺走那么多人的生命。
- We can rule out temperature and moisture, so it must be a problem with the soil... ｜ 温度和水分的因素排除了，看起来还是土壤的问题…
- I have some customers who never used to go near any kind of animal innards, but after they'd tried it here they simply fell in love with it! ｜ 有些顾客啊，以前从来不吃内脏之类的，自从尝了一口之后就喜欢上了这个味道！
- From your investigation, it seems that Apep might be terminally ill. To learn how to save it, you must make a trip to The Chasm and find a special elemental life-form. ｜ 在调查中得知，阿佩普很可能已经病入膏肓。为了知晓拯救它的办法，你们必须去一趟层岩巨渊，寻找一只特殊的元素生物。
- A snack with lots of different flavors. If you close your eyes, you won't be able to guess what flavor you'll get next, and eating them is sure to increase your heart rate. The "pop" part of the name comes from the sound of Grainfruit kernels bursting open under high temperatures. ｜ 味道各异的小零食。闭上眼睛就猜不出下一个的味道，吃的时候心跳会咚咚加速，嘭嘭二字来源于颗粒果在高温下炸开发出的声响。
- Anyway, seen as you have the favor of the adepti, things should be a lot easier. ｜ 总之，既然你们这么有仙缘，那事情就好办多了。
- Pink Head: Boohoo ｜ 花色脑袋-「呜呜」
- We're ready! ｜ 准备好了！
- First, I went from Lumidouce Harbor to Chenyu Vale, and then passed through Qingce Village on my way to the Stone Gate that separates Mondstadt from Liyue. ｜ 首先，我先通过柔灯港来到了沉玉谷，并途经轻策庄到达了分隔蒙德与璃月的石门。
- Aranakula loosened the soil and watered plants for a long time, but they are all gone now... ｜ 兰那库拉松土、浇水，照看了很久，但是全都没有了…
- That's right, he hung himself in the forensic office not long after Sango was on his trail, probably because he knew it was only a matter of time before he would be caught. ｜ 没错，他被珊瑚社长盯上没多久，就在法医室自缢了，估计是知道纸里包不住火。
- An eye-catching restaurant signboard that also does not seem out of place when put indoors.\nThey say that adding some names of restaurants that are famous the world over can add to the sense of ritual that surrounds the dining process and increase the flavor of the dishes. ｜ 醒目的餐厅告示牌，放在室内也完全不突兀。\n据说在告示牌上增加某些天下闻名餐馆的名号，能提升用餐的仪式感，增强菜肴的风味层次。
- #{M#Mr.}{F#Ms.} {NICKNAME}, Ms. Paimon! Be careful! ｜ #{NICKNAME}{M#哥哥}{F#姐姐}、派蒙姐姐！小心！
- Let's have a rest here, I am tired. ｜ 就在这里歇歇吧，奴家也累了。
- Look, you already know that we're all on the same side here, don't you? ｜ 你很清楚我们已经是同伴了。
- By being agile. ｜ 身手敏捷。
- Shadowpiercing Shot DMG|{param7:F1P} ATK+{param8:F1P} Elemental Mastery ｜ 贯影箭伤害|{param7:F1P}攻击力+{param8:F1P}元素精通
- Hm? Oh! Sure... here, take it. Just don't spill it. It took a lot of... *hic* ...a lot of work to get that stuff. ｜ 嗯？哦…给、给你，别弄洒了，我可…可是花了很大劲，很大劲才弄到的…
- Maybe watching my high-altitude escape trick reminded her of a better time with Cesar, and she could no longer ignore the voice of her conscience. ｜ 可能是嘉玛小姐看到高空逃生魔术后，回忆起和塞萨尔共度的时光，良心发现了？
- Paimon reckons he just got two different stories mixed up. Anyway, let's go and find him. ｜ 说不定是他记错了什么，我们快点回去找他吧。
- In other words, you wanted us to befriend Dori so you could find out where the Divine Knowledge Capsule is? ｜ 也就是说，你让我们和多莉搞好关系，都是为了获得神明罐装知识的下落？
- When the active character's Normal, Charged, or Plunging Attacks hit opponents multiple times within 2s, the character gains a stack of Emergence for 8s. This effect can be triggered once every 0.1s. Emergence will be cleared when the character goes down or leaves the field. When the character gains 15 Emergence stacks, the stacks will be cleared and a shockwave will be unleashed that deals True DMG to nearby opponents. After a shockwave is unleashed in this way, all party members will deal 25% increased DMG for 10s. ｜ 当前场上角色的普通攻击、重击或下落攻击在2秒内多次命中敌人后，该角色将获得一层「冒头」效果。该效果每0.1秒至多触发一次，持续8秒，「冒头」效果将在角色倒下或退场时清除。角色的「冒头」效果叠加15次之后，会将其清除并释放冲击波，对附近的敌人造成真实伤害。通过这种方式释放冲击波之后的10秒内，队伍中所有角色造成的伤害提升25%。
- I asked if it wanted any help from us, and sure enough, it seems like it does. ｜ 我在问它是否需要帮助，看样子它果然需要我们帮忙呢。
- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 4 ｜ 好感等级达到4后开启
- #You're very powerful, Nara {NICKNAME}. We'll defeat the Bulky Iron Chunk for sure! ｜ #那菈{NICKNAME}，很厉害，有你在，我们一定能够打倒「大方方铁块」的！
- Vichama ｜ 维查玛
- Sasano ｜ 笹野
- "Aah, this yearning will bear fruit as scarlet as pomegranates. Even if fate clouds your eyes..." ｜ 「啊啊，这份思念，会结出像石榴一样血红的果实。即使命运将你的双眼蒙上…」
- But this ability to draw things in such exactitude... If Caterpillar had not been the one to grant it to me, I would have named it a curse. ｜ 可是这画什么像什么的能力…如果不是卡特皮拉赋予我的，我一定会把它称作诅咒吧。
- After the equipping character triggers a reaction related to their Elemental Type, all nearby party members gain a 12% Elemental DMG Bonus for the Elemental Types involved in the elemental reaction for 15s. If the equipping character is in the Nightsoul's Blessing state when triggering this effect, all nearby party members gain an additional 28% Elemental DMG Bonus for the Elemental Types involved in the elemental reaction for 20s. The equipping character can trigger this effect while off-field, and the DMG bonus from Artifact Sets with the same name do not stack. ｜ 装备者触发其对应元素类型的相关反应后，队伍中附近的所有角色的该元素反应相关的元素伤害加成提升12%，持续15秒。若触发该效果时，装备者处于夜魂加持状态下，还将使队伍中附近的所有角色的与该元素反应相关的元素伤害加成提升28%，持续20秒。装备者处于后台时也能触发上述效果。同名圣遗物套装产生的伤害加成效果无法叠加。
- Florent, let's grab some reference shots! ｜ 弗洛朗，你来留影！
- Tell me where Shinnojou is. We'll head off right now. ｜ 告诉我新之丞的所在地，我们现在就动身。
- How did it come to this... ｜ 怎么会变成这样…
- Jeroney ｜ 杰洛尼
- The International Trade Association was initially very generous to him, but over time, with decree after decree, the association members found it increasingly difficult to make ends meet... ｜ 原本万国商会待他不薄，但后来受到各种法令的影响，商会成员人人自身难保…
- You probably won't make much money there, but you'll find everything else in that place pretty neat. ｜ 除了赚不到什么钱，哪里都挺好的。
- Food ｜ 食物
- ...I'm at your disposal, Mr. Chaussivert. ｜ …我随你处置，肖西韦尔老大。
- Hold CD|{param4:F1}s ｜ 长按冷却时间|{param4:F1}秒
- Witness various miscellaneous matters in the Court of Fontaine. ｜ 见证枫丹廷内的些许琐事。
- Achieve victory ｜ 赢得胜利
- Hu Tao ｜ 胡桃
- I will, take care! ｜ 我会的，你保重！
- Use Elemental Tuning to use more Elemental Skills ｜ 进行元素调和，多使用元素战技
- Anything else you'd like to ask me? ｜ 怎么了，还有什么别的事想问吗？
- Truth is, you two keep workin' like this, you might be puttin' yourselves in danger. ｜ 如果你们一直这样工作下去的话，会有危险。
- May as well, we could be here a while. ｜ 说的也是，还不知道要等上多久。
- Let me adjust my deck first... ｜ 先调整一下卡组…
- ...I'm afraid I am unable to serve you any respectable refreshments on account of the current situation... but please sit and rest. ｜ …眼下这个情况，老夫恐怕没法为各位送上像样的茶点…但几位要是不嫌弃，还请坐下歇息一会儿。
- Learned from Realm Depot Furnishing Blueprint ｜ 洞天百宝·摆设图纸购买习得
- But you... you defeated them so easily... ｜ 但是…你怎么这么轻松就打倒了它们…
- So then, about Tsurumi Island... ｜ 关于鹤观…
- Use Pyro to heat the pot ｜ 用「火」加热大锅
- Since we're facing the same enemies, I'll send you the intel we've collected on the Abyss so far. Then we can take a look at how to coordinate our efforts. ｜ 既然能够达成合作，晚些时候我会把目前收集的深渊情报送过来，我们再一起看看人力安排。
- Traveler, the machine has been activated. Follow the tracks it has created and reclaim one's Bamboo Shoots. ｜ 旅行者，本仙已启动机关，你且循着气息，去把本仙的竹笋拿回来吧。
- Charged Attack Stamina Cost|{param4:F1} ｜ 重击体力消耗|{param4:F1}点
- About that... I do not believe that this recipe was my grandfather's creation. ｜ 关于这道菜…我想，祖父应该不是菜谱的原作者。
- Can you sell it to me? ｜ 可以卖给我吗？
- When Thunder Strikes ｜ 打雷的时候…
- You'd better leave at once. If you stay any longer, it'll be too late... ｜ 你们还是快点走吧，再不走就来不及了…
- You could have just told me what happened... ｜ 你直接把事情告诉我就好…
- City Reputation ｜ 城市声望
- ... ｜ ……
- Charged Attack Stamina Cost|{param5:F1} ｜ 重击体力消耗|{param5:F1}点
- Ley Line Disorder: Swift Wind ｜ 地脉异常·迅捷风场
- Sushi made using barbecued meat. The meat slices lean every which way, dry as firewood. To eat this is to climb peaks fraught with peril — an expedition for which retreating halfway might prove wise... ｜ 烤肉制成的寿司。七倒八歪的肉片，尝起来又干又柴，感觉像是在攀爬一座崎岖不平的野山，或许中途放弃也不失为一种明智的选择…
- But... Mondstadt's a big place with lots of photo-taking spots, and I'm just one person... ｜ 但是…蒙德虽然有很多可以拍的地方，但我只有一个人…
- Quest Item ｜ 任务道具
- This is so weird... Let's head to the town square and check things out... ｜ 好诡异…我们还是去镇子的中心看看吧…
- Ah, you're the Young Master's friends. How do you do? ｜ 啊，是少爷的朋友。您好！
- Lv. 70+ Signora Challenge Reward ｜ 70级以上女士挑战奖励
- Use Elemental Dice to pay the relevant cost and play a card. Played cards are divided into the following categories:\n<color=#FFE14BFF>Equipment Cards</color>: These are equipped on characters to apply an effect that buffs this character.\n<color=#FFE14BFF>Support Cards</color>: Place these in your Support Zone to continuously apply supporting effects.\n<color=#FFE14BFF>Event Cards</color>: Play these to immediately trigger all their effects. ｜ 用元素骰支付所需的费用，打出一张手牌。手牌分为以下类型：\n<color=#FFE14BFF>【装备牌】</color>装备在一个角色身上，提供效果强化这个角色。\n<color=#FFE14BFF>【支援牌】</color>放置在我方支援区，持续地发挥支援效果。\n<color=#FFE14BFF>【事件牌】</color>打出后，一次性地结算所有效果。
- Ice Arrow ｜ 冰箭
- Know what, Paimon? ｜ 知道什么了？
- Energy Cost|{param8:I} ｜ 元素能量|{param8:I}
- Deploy characters with excellent Energy Recharge abilities such that you can constantly use Elemental Bursts and control the battlefield. ｜ 编入提升充能效率的角色，可以更频繁地施放元素爆发，控制局势。
- Interface Settings ｜ 界面设置
- Juvenile Galant ｜ 少年春衫薄

- Qty. ｜ 兑换数量
- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 2 ｜ 好感等级达到2后开启
- "I'm sorry, Madam Faruzan, but I wanna study with Master for a little bit longer..." ｜ 「抱歉！珐露珊前辈，我还想再跟师父学习一段时间…」
- "Well, it's too late to suck up to us now! *cough* Still, what's in it?" ｜ 「虽然现在才来讨好我们，有点太晚了！不过…咳咳，是什么好东西呀？」
- Quest Item ｜ 任务道具

Those of these rocks that are older may have witnessed that ancient battle.\nThese stones can be exchanged for treasures during "Perilous Trail." ｜ 蕴含着奇异光彩的石块，仅存于层岩巨渊的个别地点，来历与成分不明，但具有奇特的性质——崩落之时的形状规整，断面相当光洁，如镜般映照事象。其中年岁较久的那些石块，或许也见证过当年的鏖战吧。\n在「危途疑踪」期间，可以换取宝物。

- After using <color=#FFD780FF>Depth-Clarion Dice</color>, Yelan will enter the Mastermind state.\nIn this state, all of Yelan's Normal Attacks will be special Breakthrough Barbs. These Breakthrough Barbs will have similar abilities to normal ones and the DMG dealt will be considered Charged Attack DMG, dealing 156% of a normal Breakthrough Barb's DMG.\n\nThe Mastermind state lasts 20s and will be cleared after Yelan fires 5 arrows. ｜ 施放<color=#FFD780FF>渊图玲珑骰</color>后，夜兰将进入「运筹帷幄」状态：\n夜兰的普通攻击将转为发射特殊的「破局矢」。这种箭矢具有与破局矢近似的特性，造成的伤害视为重击伤害，能造成破局矢156%的伤害。\n\n「运筹帷幄」状态至多持续20秒，将在夜兰发射5枚箭矢后移除。

Perhaps this is the auspicious sight that inspired the legendary scene of "peace and joy reigns, all evil retreats" when the Suanni lifts its head. ｜ 华丽雄伟的大型霄灯，生动再现了猊兽威武的造型，能在「碰碰舞兽戏」的体验场地见到。倘若细细观察这座瑞兽霄灯，便会有一种别样安全感浮上心头。或许这就是传说中，猊兽昂首张目之时，「太平悠乐，诸邪退避」的祥瑞景象吧…

- Sumpter Beasts are friends of humanity. Gentle by nature, they serve as important tools of production and transport.\nSumpter Beasts can adapt to various different natural environments. Long before the forest merchants ever noticed them, these hardworking animals were already the much-relied-upon domesticated beasts of the desert peoples. ｜ 驮兽是人类的朋友。它们性格温顺，是重要的生产运输工具。\n驮兽能够适应各种不同的自然环境。早在雨林中的商贾注意到它们之前，这些勤劳的生灵便已是沙漠部族赖以生存的家畜。

- After the character's Elemental Skill hits an opponent, their ATK will be increased by <color=#99FFFFFF>30%</color> for 8s. After the character takes DMG, their ATK will be increased by <color=#99FFFFFF>30%</color> for 8s. The 2 aforementioned effects can be triggered even when the character is not on the field. Additionally, when not protected by a shield, the character's Max HP will be increased by <color=#99FFFFFF>48%</color>. ｜ 元素战技命中敌人后，攻击力提升<color=#99FFFFFF>30%</color>，持续8秒；受到伤害后，攻击力提升<color=#99FFFFFF>30%</color>，持续8秒。上述2种效果角色处于队伍后台时也能触发。此外，不处于护盾庇护下时，生命值上限提高<color=#99FFFFFF>48%</color>。

- You engage in a fierce battle against the All-Devouring Narwhal. At the last, you leap out from the belly of the beast, and Neuvillette lands beside you, gathering his might to finish the creature off.\nAt this time, another strange energy shrouds the creature and shrinks it until it falls into the palm of a mysterious woman's hand.\nShe grabs the shrunken Narwhal in one hand and the unconscious Childe by the scruff in another. Opening a teleporter, she throws them both into it.\nAfter that, she turns around to face you, as if nothing had happened. ｜ 你和吞星之鲸展开了激烈的战斗。最后，你从吞星之鲸体内一跃而出。那维莱特从空中降落到你的身边，他积蓄力量，准备给吞星之鲸最后一击。\n这时候，另一股陌生的力量包裹住了吞星之鲸，它开始不断缩小，最后落在一个神秘女子的掌心中。\n那位神秘女子一手托着缩小后的吞星之鲸，一手拎着陷入昏迷的「公子」。她展开一个空间传送门，将吞星之鲸和「公子」都扔了进去。\n随后，她若无其事地转身，看向你们。

- A part of the "Millennial Movement" that wanders amidst the winds. Increases DMG by <color=#99FFFFFF>20%</color>. When the character wielding this weapon triggers Elemental Reactions, they gain a Sigil of Rebellion. This effect can be triggered once every 0.5s and can be triggered even if said character is not on the field. When you possess 2 Sigils of Rebellion, all of them will be consumed and all nearby party members will obtain "Millennial Movement: Song of Resistance" for 12s. "Millennial Movement: Song of Resistance" increases Normal, Charged and Plunging Attack DMG by <color=#99FFFFFF>32%</color> and increases ATK by <color=#99FFFFFF>40%</color>. Once this effect is triggered, you will not gain Sigils of Rebellion for 20s. Of the many effects of the "Millennial Movement," buffs of the same type will not stack. ｜ 飘游风中的「千年的大乐章」的一部分。造成的伤害提高<color=#99FFFFFF>20%</color>；触发元素反应时，角色获得一枚奋起之符，每0.5秒内至多触发一次，角色处于队伍后台也能触发。拥有2枚奋起之符时，将消耗所有奋起之符，使附近的队伍中所有角色获得持续12秒的「千年的大乐章·抗争之歌」效果：普通攻击、重击、下落攻击造成的伤害提高<color=#99FFFFFF>32%</color>，攻击力提升<color=#99FFFFFF>40%</color>。触发后20秒内，无法再次获得奋起之符。「千年的大乐章」触发的多种数值效果中，同类数值效果不可叠加。

- A large sea bird that dwells in Fontaine. This bird earned the name Flatcrest Fulmar for its straight and white feathered crest.\nAs a kind of bird that preys on fish, the Flatcrest Fulmar is extremely adept at tracking shoals of fish. Therefore, as some documents describe, seasoned fishers will not drive away the Flatcrest Fulmars that hunt near their ships, choosing instead to coexist with them. ｜ 栖息在枫丹的大型海鸟。因其白色平直的羽冠，而得名平冠鹱。\n作为一种以捕鱼为生的鸟类，平冠鹱有着极佳的鱼群追踪能力。故此有文件说，熟练的渔民不会驱赶在船只附近捕食的平冠鹱，反而会选择与它们和谐共生。

- Now that I have reclaimed one of the Seven Authorities from the hands of the usurpers, I have regained my true form. I am now a fully fledged dragon, powerful enough to judge the rest of the gods. But until that time comes, I will lend my power to you. ｜ 从僭位者那里回收了七之大权一角，这才是我本来的身姿。我已是「完全之龙」，足以审判其余众神。我的命运将是审判高天的僭位之王。但在那之前，我就将力量借与你吧。

- Aw, but Kaeya said that when Klee's in trouble, she should just play the first card in her right hand... or was it the left...? ｜ 呜…凯亚哥哥明明说，遇见危机的时候，出右手第一张牌就好了…
- I'm sure he would be very proud. ｜ 他一定会为你骄傲的。

- Or maybe print up a few hundred documents, and leave them on the desk of every Gestionnaire so they can take them with them as they go get their coffee? ｜ 还是我要去印几百份文件，放在每一位复律庭职员的桌上，让他们拿着去喝咖啡？
- Although Ayaka has left, the melody she just hummed still echoes in your mind, and you can't help but hum it softly too... ｜ 虽然绫华已经离开，但你的脑海中依然回响着她刚刚哼唱的旋律，你也不禁小声哼唱起来…
- "Hah! To think that all that play-acting as a one-eyed pirate would eventually end with one actual wounded eye." ｜ 「没想到从前假装独眼海盗骗人，终有一日自己也伤了一只眼。」
- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 4 ｜ 好感等级达到4后开启
- Actually, that makes them super duper scary, doesn't it? ｜ 这么一想已经变成不可饶恕的恐怖怪物了…
