- "It'll sell well for sure!" ｜ 「应该能大卖！」
- You're just too fast... I think that no matter what kind of shortcut we take, we just can't keep up with you. ｜ 你的速度可真快，我看…无论怎么抄小路，我们都追不上你了。
- I have no objections, but... Mr. Florian, do you even know how to defeat the evil sorcerer? ｜ 话虽这么说，但弗洛莱恩先生知道该如何击败那位巫师吗？

- Oh, it's okay. Thanks anyway. ｜ 唉，是我冒昧了…没关系，还是谢谢你。
- Amidst grueling trials, you must ration your strength and attack with a steady rhythm. Some of the Sublime Anemograna can grant great aid in this aspect, allowing adventurers to engage in extended combat... ｜ 面对严酷的考验时，需要合理分配体力，节奏稳定地发起攻势。部分「高妙风种子」能在这一领域提供强大的助力，协助冒险家们赢取长久的战斗…
- After some lengthy investigation, I've discovered the location of some treasure nearby. ｜ 根据我多日以来的勘察，在这附近就有一处藏宝之地。
- Then, I leave this to you two. As for the training that Sorush must complete by herself, I will let her know momentarily. You two merely need to accompany her. ｜ 那么，见证的工作，就交给两位了。关于需要由斯露莎自行完成的训练，我稍后讲与她听，两位只要跟随她便好。
- About Eyes ｜ 关于眼睛…
- Haha, I apologize for the lack of explanations. In fact, we thought that you were saboteurs yourselves. ｜ 哈哈，抱歉事先没来得及解释…我们还以为你是来搞破坏的。
- Hmm... anyway, I'm sure the archon heard my wishes. That means that the reason why they were not realized is that I didn't offer enough things! ｜ 唔…不管怎么说，神明应该是已经听见我的愿望了。之所以没有完全实现，肯定是因为我还供奉得不够！

### Part 114

- Paimon. ｜ 派蒙。

- Listen carefully, and try not to get too upset... ｜ 请你心平气和地听我说…

- Hmm... Would it be easier if we wake up now and go catch him in the real world? If this is his nightmare, he must be asleep somewhere, right? ｜ 瑞希，我们能不能先醒过来，直接去现实里抓这个人，他现在应该正在打盹吧？
- Ugh, listen to you! Is Bull-Chucker's childishness really that infectious? Because one Itto is more than enough! ｜ 唔…难道放牛的有什么「孩子气光环」吗？你也被影响了啦！
- Thank you for all your help with this matter. This is a token of my gratitude. ｜ 你们这次帮了我这么多，这是谢礼。

- Please do stop by for a cup of tea or a bite to eat whenever you want to. This chef we've got is really rather good. ｜ 您有空的话，可以多来坐坐，喝杯茶，吃点点心，我们这厨子的手艺，还是不错的。

- There might not be anyone to save you next time, you know. ｜ 下次可就不一定有人来救你了。

Were she not so deft at explaining the meanders of the law and providing her clients with all sorts of cunning suggestions, it would take me many more months to identify existing loopholes in the legal codices and tighten them one by one. ｜ 烟绯？呵，某种意义上，她是个贴心的对手呢。若不是她「灵巧」地解释律法，为咨询者们提供各种「奇妙」的建议，要让我独自找到律法的缺口，逐步完善法典，怕是要多花数月的时间。
- It used to be pretty lively on the island, but ever since the war started, everyone's moved out... even the mine's all empty now. ｜ 以前岛上很热闹，但自从开始打仗以后，大家都陆陆续续搬走了…矿场也空荡荡的了。
- Well let's go find my old pals first. They're both seasoned fishermen and having them accompany us would help a great deal. ｜ 先去找我那两位老朋友吧，他们都是经验丰富的渔师，有他们加入会轻松不少。
- Check this out! Best of luck! ｜ 看我看我！祝你好运！
- I want to, but it will take some time to find someone, so that won't help me finish the work at hand... ｜ 我也想啊，但是临时怎么可能招来马上就能帮忙的人…
- Th—They are? Hah, they're just some rabid fans who want to cut the line because they haven't been able to meet me in person, aren't they? ｜ …是、是吧，估计是想见我又排不上队的狂热粉丝吧！
- Wow! Paimon didn't think Sorush would really be able to extinguish the Sign of Apaosha and solve all the trouble happening here... ｜ 真没想到斯露莎真的熄灭了「焚真之天象」，解决了这里的大麻烦…
- Oh, Paimon remembers that Bija we received in the forest! It was created from Aranara memories, wasn't it? ｜ 对哦，之前在森林得到的「惟耶之实」，就是兰那罗用记忆结出来的。

- As for all those who bear the title of Bloomguard, extraordinary competence and keen insight are necessities. ｜ 对于称职的花灵勇者来说，出众的行动力和敏锐的洞察力都是必须的。
- ? ｜ ？
- Inexpensive and durable crates made of Mallow Wood boards and metal. As with most things made in the Fortress of Meropide, they have a rugged exterior and are highly durable. Although these crates do not conform to the typical Fontainian aesthetic, their ability to accommodate the large volume and weight of clockwork meka has earned them favor with many clients. ｜ 以便宜耐用的「悬铃木」板材和金属制作的货箱，与梅洛彼得堡内生产的多数物品一样，外表粗犷且十分耐用。虽然在外观设计上，这种货箱并不符合枫丹人通常审美，但它足以装下发条机关的巨大容积和载重量还是获得了无数客户的青睐。
- I suppose people have a desire to make something that is uniquely theirs. ｜ 因为想要创造只属于自己的东西吧。
- Consumable ｜ 消耗品
- An ornamental urn that once belonged to the old aristocrats of Mondstadt. Mournful winds seem to echo within its empty interior. ｜ 曾经属于旧日蒙德贵族的首饰瓮，空空如也的腹内仿佛回响着哀戚的风声。
- Of Ballads and Brews: Act II ｜ 杯中遥吟之歌 第二幕

- Oh boy, Paimon's got a funny feeling about this already... ｜ 呜，我有点不好意思了…

- That said, we haven't seen him recently either... ｜ 但最近我们也几乎见不到他本人…
- "Mmm, I've sorted out my deck and table. I'm ready anytime!"\nHint: Kachina's deck focuses on Techniques and Summons, and is geared towards triggering Crystallize reactions. ｜ 「嗯，我已经整理好牌组和桌面了，整整齐齐，随时可以开始！」\n【提示】卡齐娜的牌组以「特技」与「召唤物」为核心，并且擅长触发「结晶反应」。
- It had already absorbed too much of the Primordial Sea's energy before we could notice it. At this point, it has become practically integrated with the Sea itself. ｜ 在我们不知道的情况下，它已经吸收了太多星球胎海的力量，甚至几乎已经与星球的胎海融为了一体。
- Combat Knowledge ｜ 战斗知识
- Leave... now... ｜ 请你们，滚开…
- Ooh, what a pity... You were so close, but not quite close enough. Never mind, eh. ｜ 很遗憾，只差一点点了啊…嗨，不用太气馁。
- Well now, I suppose it may serve as a suitable diversion upon my great work. In that case, my Yasnapati, I bid you have a care for Sunyata Flowers of this kind. ｜ 这点功绩，作为伟业正道旁的小小装点倒也无妨。吾之「谒颂主」，你就多多留意这样的「净觉花」吧。
- Okay, just a moment. ｜ 好的，请稍等。
- Rozel says that it is because the many things venturers have seen color them, like ponds into which paint has been thrown. ｜ 罗泽尔说，这是因为冒险客们见识了许多，就像水塘被颜料染色。
- ...Haha, I'm sure you didn't know this, but Natlan is home to fire-breathing Saurians! That excessive amount of Pyro on your skin... Now that's the flavor of Natlan for you! ｜ …哈哈，这你就不知道了吧，纳塔有能够吐出火球的龙呢！啊，那种过量的火元素扑面而来的感觉，就很有纳塔的味道！
- I never knew! ｜ 还有这事？
- Mm! White Fur, Yellow Fur. ｜ 呶！白毛黄毛。
- Restores 9% of Max HP to the selected character and regenerates 260 HP every 5s for 30s. ｜ 立即为选中的角色恢复生命值上限的9%，并在之后的30秒内，每5秒恢复260点生命值。
- Marcotte Seed ｜ 「茉洁草」的种子
- Amos' Bow ｜ 阿莫斯之弓
- Oh, we're out! ｜ 哇，出来了！
- Not Bad! ｜ 挺厉害嘛
- Choiseul, did you forget what we mentioned when we came up with the plan? We must keep the public informed about the rebuilding of the Institute with the utmost transparency. ｜ 事务官。您难道忘了我们在制订方案时所提到的，需要把科学院的重建工作以最大的透明度告知给民众吗？
- About Marionette ｜ 关于「木偶」…
- Sorry, I didn't... In fact, I didn't know about it until I was woken up by the sound of Mr. Kanbei's roaring... ｜ 抱歉，我什么也没看见…被勘兵卫先生怒吼的声音吵醒之后，我才知道这件事…
- Remember, you are just looking for a regular sprig. You aren't looking for troubles of any kind. ｜ 记住，你只是在寻找一株普通的薄荷，不是在寻找任何问题。
- Rare, <color=#F39000>swift-swimming</color> fish have been spotted in Mondstadt's waters! Enthusiasts are eager to have at them. ｜ 蒙德水域出现<color=#F39000>行动迅捷</color>的稀有鱼类，钓鱼爱好者正在跃跃欲试。
- Friendly Aranara Carving ｜ 亲切的兰那罗木刻
- *sigh* ...You're right. It's a shame to say that I've grown accustomed to such things. You shouldn't have to comfort me. ｜ 啊，也对。说是「已经习惯」，结果却要你来安慰我，真是惭愧。
- Inevitably, affairs do become busier around festive seasons. But no need to worry, we have many attendants to assist us... And there's always Chongyun, too. ｜ 节庆期间，难免有些忙碌。不过别担心，家丁会帮着处理的，再不济，重云也能来帮忙啊。
- Mountain, so high... ｜ 山，高高…
- Affected Character(s) ｜ 影响角色
- Defeat all opponents ｜ 消灭所有魔物
- Kusava! ｜ 「苦舍桓」！
- But you don't have any bars and drunkards here, right? ｜ 但这里既没有酒馆，也没有酒鬼，对吧？
- He'd go so green with envy, it might kill him! Gonna wait till I get back from my post to break it to him, though. ｜ 他恐怕能嫉妒得要死。不过那也得等我站岗回去以后再说了。
- Of course. No worries. ｜ 当然，当然。
- Then why didn't Mr. Callas explain himself in court? If he had testified that a person had been dissolved, he could have at least mounted a defense. ｜ 那为什么卡雷斯先生不抗辩呢？直接说出有人溶解了，至少也有在审判中对抗的余地啊？
- 3-Hit DMG|{param3:F1P} ｜ 三段伤害|{param3:F1P}
- I'm sorry, but I'll have to leave this matter in your hands. Hmm, but it would indeed be good if the Jade Chamber could be rebuilt... ｜ 那就拜托你了，唔…要是群玉阁真能重建起来，那也挺好的…
- Whether it's Seymour's fragmented information, or Ann and Caterpillar... This is something only they can do for themselves. ｜ 无论是西摩尔的碎片信息，还是安和卡特皮拉…这些唯有靠他们自己了。
- Nothing, just out for a stroll. ｜ 没干什么，只是在这里走走。
- ...Then I met Joserf. He'd heard the sound of me falling and came out to see what was going on! ｜ 然后，我就遇到了听见声音跑出来看的乔瑟夫先生！
- Note Falling Speed ｜ 音符下落速度
- Walk around and look for clues ｜ 四处逛逛搜寻线索
- It is a time to address problems before they turn into regrets. ｜ 趁着遗憾还未发生，年岁正好，这有问题就得解决问题。
- (Korina, Desyree, Joinville, Jolienne, Essonnes... Why are so many people here? And why do I have no recollection of this case?) ｜ （柯莉娜、黛丝蕾、瑞安维尔、约莲妮、埃松…这么多人都来看？那为什么我对所谓的案子毫无印象？）
- Adventurer's Tail Feather ｜ 冒险家尾羽

- You relate Neko's request... ｜ 讲述了寝子的要求…
- In a way, obtaining a Vision is like gaining a powerful ally. But, saying someone has powerful allies is more of a comment on how extraordinary that person already is. After all, allies only augment your existing strength. Unleashing that strength depends entirely on your own will. ｜ 获得神之眼就是获得了另一种强大的「盟友」。不过当我们说某人「盟友」强大的时候，本质上还是在说其人本身超凡。毕竟「盟友」只是协助你的力量，只有你自己拥有无坚不摧的意志，才能把力量发挥出来。
- While exploring The Chasm: Underground Mines and having the Lumenstone Adjuvant equipped, it will have the following capabilities: \n·When filled with energy, it provides illumination for the character in a certain area while also being able to activate specific light-sensitive mechanisms \n·By consuming the energy stored within the Lumenstone Adjuvant, you can recharge certain mechanisms.\n\nAdditionally, using the Adjuvant actively will trigger Blooming Light at the cost of 1 Energy.\nBlooming Light has the following properties:\n·Unleashes powerful energies to destroy Level 1 and 2 Oozing Concretions.\n·Can be used once every 2s.\n\nLumenstone Adjuvant can store 7 Energy. ｜ 在「层岩巨渊·地下矿区」，流明石触媒在装备后具有以下效果：\n·拥有能量时，为角色提供一定范围的光照，并能激活特定光敏性机关；\n·通过消耗流明石触媒储存的能量，可以为特定的机关充能。\n\n此外，主动使用时，流明石触媒将消耗1单位能量，进行「纯光绽放」。\n「纯光绽放」具有以下效果与属性：\n·释放强大的能量，破坏一阶与二阶的「淤泥涌口」；\n·每2秒至多使用一次。\n\n流明石触媒至多储存7单位能量。
- Let's head over to see Sara at Good Hunter, she always makes Nelson's cat food. ｜ 我们接着去莎拉小姐那边吧，内尔森的猫饭我每次都是拜托莎拉小姐做的。
- But your wound... ｜ 但你的伤口…
- I am completely prepared and fully confident that we can do this. ｜ 我已经调整到了最佳状态，一定能成为各位的助力。
- You remember the strange dream from yesterday, and recount it to Mizuki. ｜ 你想起了昨天那个古怪的梦，将它描述给瑞希听。

You claim that historical records describe the battle against Xbalanque as a formal duel, and the victim's family was treated fairly? Complicated indeed, but a worthwhile consideration nonetheless... ｜ 以规则与传承击退深渊，此为值得称颂之义举，然权柄乃是从龙类手中夺得，亦是罪无可逭。只不过纳塔元气大伤，确实也不必急于前往。嗯，你说根据史料那一战应该判定为正式决斗，并且希巴拉克也善待了被害者家属？虽然乱七八糟的，但是也有些道理…

- I'll take the other members of their crew into custody, too. They won't get another chance to stir up trouble. ｜ 还在花羽会活动的商队成员我也会一并控制，不会再给他们留下煽动对立的机会的。

- I've left markings on all these places, and hung a lamp there to light my way. You should find them, easy-peasy. ｜ 我在这些地方都留下了标记，在高处挂了灯盏，给自己照亮。你应该能很容易找到。

- Of course. And there are no wild tanuki here. ｜ 嗯，这里也没有狸猫。

- This item was designed by Knights of Favonius scholars to help the Knights on their scouting expeditions and travels by affording them the ability to better use the blessings of the Anemo God. - You know, my grandpa used to say that ages ago, our family had the privilege to be part of the construction of the Opera Epiclese. So, a passion for architecture and engineering meka runs in our blood! But the Construction Specialist Mek I found {0} is totally out of control. It's gone berserk, attacking anyone within its detection range...\nIt almost managed to injure a veteran craftsman like me, so regular folks might be in danger. I'm hoping the Maison Gardiennage can send in the Gardes or get some able-bodied adventurers to shut that thing down for good! ｜ 要知道，我祖父说过，很久很久以前，我们家族曾有幸参与过欧庇克莱歌剧院的建设。所以，我们家族的血液里流淌着对建筑和工程机关的热爱！可我{0}发现的那台「建造特化型机关」显然完全失控了，别说接近和控制它了，只要暴露在它的探测范围内，就会被它疯狂攻击…\n我这种经验丰富的工匠都差点被它伤到，更不用说普通市民了。所以，希望执律庭尽早派出警备队员，或是找到强大的冒险家，把那家伙彻底关停！

- Katheryne from the Adventurers' Guild in Mondstadt informs you that a very peculiar stranger has come to the city. To ask for his help, you meet him at the Angel's Share tavern. The man, who introduced himself as Dainsleif, accepts your request right away, asking only for 500 Mora and three questions in return. In pursuit of the Abyss Herald, you head to the Temple of the Falcon and Wolvendom. Dainsleif suspects that the enemy might be hiding in Stormterror's Lair. ｜ 从蒙德城冒险家协会的凯瑟琳小姐那里得知，蒙德城来了一位奇怪的陌生人。 为了向他发出邀约，你来到了「天使的馈赠」的酒馆。而这位自称戴因斯雷布的陌生人却以500摩拉和三个问题作为报酬，爽快地接受了你的邀约。 随后，你们先后前往了「西风之鹰」的庙宇和奔狼领追踪「深渊使徒」。 在他的建议下。你们决定再前往风龙废墟，也许在那里，你们能够找到「深渊使徒」…

- Milady is in all respects a well-rounded person: erudite, compassionate, well-mannered, and elegant... The one thing she could do better is to speak her mind more. In fact, watch out for this the next time you're talking to her — sometimes, she looks like she's about to say something, but then she holds back. If that happens, keep asking her opinion, see if you can encourage her to open up a little. ｜ 神里小姐知书达理，心地善良又温柔端庄，就是不够坦率。欸对了，下次说话的时候，要是小姐又露出那副欲言又止的模样，你一定要主动些，多问问她的想法。

- You need an extreme amount of talent to pursue knowledge and wisdom. Many people throw their entire lives into it, only to end up burned out and depressed... Dance isn't like that. You don't have to understand what you're seeing to enjoy watching it. If I can use my movements to demonstrate the beauty and meaning of dance, then I'm happy. ｜ 探究知识需要很高很高的天赋，很多人拼了命地努力，结果劳累又沮丧…但跳舞就不一样了，就算看不懂门道，也能看个热闹。要是能从这份肢体动作中品味到艺术的美丽与价值，那我就更开心了。

- Get the timing right and <color=#FFCC33FF>press the Launch button to fix the launch direction</color> before entering the charging sequence. <color=#FFCC33FF>Release the Launch button to launch the Finchball</color>.\nOnce you have fixed the launch direction, you will become unable to change the launch preparations. ｜ 把握时机，<color=#FFCC33FF>按住投球按钮以锁定投球方向</color>，并进入投球的蓄力过程。<color=#FFCC33FF>松开投球键，即可将雀雀球以对应的方向和力度投出</color>。\n一旦锁定投球方向，将无法取消投球准备。

- #{REALNAME[ID(2)|SHOWHOST(true)]} ｜ #{REALNAME[ID(2)|SHOWHOST(true)]}
- Many veterans of the Yun-Han Opera Troupe first joined the troupe when Yun Jin's grandfather was in charge.\nThey have remained committed since Yun Jin took the troupe over.\nTheir love for the art of Liyue Opera is so deep — perhaps even to an excessive degree — that they frown upon any other forms of music performance, including rock 'n' roll.\nYun Jin, however, thinks otherwise. She finds that rock 'n' roll vibrates with vigor and even became friends with the rock 'n' roll musician Xinyan.\nElders of the troupe are glad to follow Yun Jin's lead during rehearsals, but when it comes to daily life, they treat her like their little granddaughter.\n"Sweetie, listen to us. No spicy food, it hurts your voice. Meat is fine, but refrain from eating too much, or you will put on weight."\n"If you really can't help yourself, have more shrimp. Stay away from the... roll 'n' roll thing. All they know is yelling."\nThese caring elders will nag Yun Jin about attending rock 'n' roll performance for hours on end.\nFaced with the impossible mission of persuading stubborn granddads and grannies, Yun Jin has to be creative.\nWhile it's not an option to go to Xinyan's performance, it's perfectly acceptable to visit Fan Er'ye's adopted daughter Xingyan and discuss Liyue Opera with her.\nThe elders are not fond of the rock star Xinyan, but they have taken a shine to Xingyan the adopted daughter of Fan Er'ye.\n"I've heard that Xingyan can cook and do embroidery. She must be a polite and accomplished young lady. Yun Jin may be able to pick up a thing or two from hanging out with her. How capital!"\nYun Jin has long got Fan Er'ye to agree on the details concerning the made-up Xingyan, so don't worry. No one's gonna call her out on this! ｜ 「云翰社」里有许多老资历的伶工。早在云堇祖父当家时，就已是戏社的一员了。\n云堇从祖父手中接过「云翰社」后，他们依然尽心尽力地协助云堇经营戏社。\n老伶工们衷心热爱着自己的艺术，甚至可能热爱得过了头，在他们眼里，除了璃月戏，包括摇滚在内的其他音乐都是旁门左道。\n云堇倒不这么认为。她非常欣赏摇滚乐中巨大的力量，甚至还和摇滚乐手辛焱成了好友。\n排练剧目时，老伶工们都乐意听从云堇的指挥，但在生活中，年轻的云堇就像是他们的小孙女。\n「乖乖啊，听话，辣的不能吃，对嗓子不好。肉可以吃，但不能吃多了，容易发胖。」\n「实在想吃，就多吃点虾仁吧。那个什么…什么摇滚，不可以听，乱吼乱叫可不是好东西。」\n云堇每每听完摇滚演出，回来都要被他们唠叨半天。\n跟固执的老人讲道理实在太难，为了少受点罪，她只能想办法编借口。\n听辛焱的演唱会或许不行，但去拜访范二爷家的养女「星燕」小姐，一起聊璃月戏，就没问题了。\n老人们不怎么中意唱摇滚的辛焱，对范二爷家这位星燕的印象却好得很。\n「星燕这个姑娘，听说又会绣花又会烹饪，准是个端庄大方的好孩子，我们云堇跟她玩在一起，还能学上几分，非常好啊。」\n云堇早和范二爷商量过这事，统一了口径，所以不用担心，这个小小的谎言绝对不会穿帮！
- Chasca's <color=#FFCC33>Elemental Skill</color> allows her to mount "Soulsniper: Ritual Staff" and <color=#FFCC33>stay airborne and move swiftly</color> until her Nightsoul points are fully depleted. When Sprinting or increasing height, extra Nightsoul points will be consumed.\nDuring this time, Chasca can use <color=#FFCC33>Charged Attacks</color> to lock onto enemies in a special aiming mode and fire Shadowhunt Shells. Some Shells will undergo Elemental Conversion based on <color=#FFCC33>the Elemental Types of your party members</color>.\nWhen she doesn't have enough Nightsoul points available, Chasca can expend Phlogiston to maintain this state.\nChasca's <color=#FFCC33>Elemental Burst</color> fires a single "Galesplitting Soulseeker Shell" that deals AoE Anemo DMG and splits into 6 Soulseeker Shells which attack nearby opponents. Soulseeker Shells will undergo Elemental Conversion based on <color=#FFCC33>the Elemental Types of your party members</color>.\nTo facilitate experiencing the character's Elemental Burst and Nightsoul's Blessing state, additional Elemental Orbs will appear in the trial stage, and more objects will provide Phlogiston. ｜ <color=#FFCC33>元素战技</color>将使恰斯卡搭乘「灵枪·仪式杖」，进行<color=#FFCC33>悬浮和快速移动</color>，直到夜魂值耗尽，冲刺和抬升时恰斯卡会额外消耗夜魂值。\n期间，恰斯卡可以用<color=#FFCC33>重击</color>在特殊瞄准状态下锁定敌人并发射追影弹，且部分子弹会根据<color=#FFCC33>队伍中编成角色的元素类型</color>发生元素转化。\n夜魂值不足时，恰斯卡能消耗燃素来维持此状态。\n<color=#FFCC33>元素爆发</color>将射出一枚「裂风索魂弹」，造成风元素范围伤害，并分裂成六枚「索魂弹」，攻击附近的敌人。索魂弹会依据<color=#FFCC33>队伍中编成角色的元素类型</color>发生元素转化。\n为方便体验角色的元素爆发与夜魂加持状态，试用的关卡中会产生额外的元素晶球，并有更多的物件提供燃素。

- A tower built on a solid foundation with the same appearance and construction as the towers on Sumeru City's south port as well as the small island just south of Port Ormos. The interior contains lights to guide ships, and they indirectly influence naval commerce in Sumeru by participating in naval traffic control. It is said that Kshahrewar researchers redesigned the lighting system to allow the light to be seen across even greater distances, but the theory behind it was too complicated. The average citizen lacks the motivation to understand it fully, and cares little about its intricacies... ｜ 建立在牢固基座上的塔式建筑，与须弥城南港口、以及奥摩斯港南侧小岛上的塔楼有着相同的外形与构造，内部设有引导航行的灯具，参与商船的调度，间接影响着须弥的水路贸易。据传，为了追求更远的照明距离，妙论派学者为灯塔设计了新的照明机构，不过其中的原理过于复杂，一般民众缺乏深入了解的动力，对其中的玄妙之处并不关心…

- Increases ATK by <color=#99FFFFFF>40%</color> and grants the might of the Thunder Emblem. At stack levels 1/2/3, the Thunder Emblem increases Normal Attack DMG by <color=#99FFFFFF>24/48/80%</color>. The character will obtain 1 stack of Thunder Emblem in each of the following scenarios: Normal Attack deals DMG (stack lasts 5s), casting Elemental Skill (stack lasts 10s); Energy is less than 100% (stack disappears when Energy is full). Each stack's duration is calculated independently. ｜ 攻击力提高<color=#99FFFFFF>40%</color>，并能获得「飞雷之巴印」的威势。飞雷之巴印：持有1/2/3层飞雷之巴印时，普通攻击造成的伤害提高<color=#99FFFFFF>24/48/80%</color>。在下列情况下，角色将各获得1层飞雷之巴印：普通攻击造成伤害时，持续5秒；施放元素战技时，持续10秒；此外，角色元素能量低于100%时，将获得1层飞雷之巴印，此飞雷之巴印会在角色的元素能量充满时消失。每层飞雷之巴印的持续时间独立计算。

Nice guy. ｜ 我也是最近才知道他来自缄默之殿。哎呀，不好意思，我对缄默之殿这类神秘组织了解很少嘛。以前倒是在沙漠里见过他几回，他很好沟通，我的佣兵兄弟在沙漠遇到麻烦，他还把饮用水分给他们过。是个不错的人。

- Of course it's better that we have fewer outlanders to deal with. For the lucky few such as yourself who have come to Inazuma, you must follow the rules here. ｜ 外人来的当然越少越好。你这样的人既然来到了稻妻，就要注意遵守这里的规矩。
- We returned to our rooms and decided to lock all the doors leading to the hallway. ｜ 我们回到房里商量好，把连着走廊的门都给锁上。

- Let's go somewhere cooler. ｜ 想去凉快点的地方。
- "You think we haven't tried before? We can't afford to lose anyone else!" ｜ 「你以为我们没试过吗？不能再有人为此牺牲了！」
- But? ｜ 但是？

- Ah, I see I guessed correctly. ｜ 看你的回答，我猜对了。
- (Now, that sounds promising. One will bring some back for those old fossils, and all will be well...) ｜ （听着不错。给那两位各带一份就好了吧…）
- Just show up, take a seat, and he takes care of the rest. I remember he lit some incense... it smelled wonderful, and instantly relaxed me... ｜ 我记得，进去坐好就可以，「江村一玄斋」先生会点燃一种特别好闻的熏香，吸一口就觉得心情畅快…
- I see... Guess that makes sense. Well, good luck with your studies, Miss Qishan. ｜ 这样啊…原来如此，祝绮珊小姐学业顺利。
- Head to the specified location and complete the trial ｜ 前往指定地点并完成试炼
- In the time you have spent away from us, there have been countless Pari who, though unable to ever gain the title of "Bloomguard," still contribute to our greater community with quiet dignity. ｜ 在斯露莎疏远我们反而亲近人类的这些年月里，可是有不少花灵即便与勇者之名无缘，却也默默做着奉献呢。
- Are you questioning my academic credentials!? ｜ 你在质疑我的学术水准吗？
- And there's... a photo inside? ｜ 里面是…照片？
- Oh, alright, Paimon gets it... ｜ 我、我知道啦。
- Lantern Riddle ｜ 灯谜
- Jebrael, I thought I knew you... But I really don't understand what you're doing right now. ｜ 哲伯莱勒，我本以为自己对你已经足够了解…可你现在的举动真叫我看不明白。
- What's a shame? ｜ 可惜什么？
- Kimiya ｜ 齐米亚
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- So I grabbed the crowbar next to me and swept it outward... ｜ 于是我就抄起身边的一根撬棍甩了过去…
- Of course I am! But you need to stop pulling her aside to tell her all sorts of things. She'll get sick of it! ｜ 那还用说，当然开心喽。但你可别天天拉着女儿讲东讲西的了，孩子会听烦的。
- Truth is always marching onward, and nothing can stop it! Cheers! ｜ 真理永远在前进，没有任何东西能阻挡它，干杯！
- Still, normality is good news. Thank you for your assistance, please take these as a token of my gratitude. ｜ 不过，一切正常才是好事。这些东西请你收下，辛苦你帮我跑这一趟了。
- The residual Pari residing within the Fravashi Trees are still trapped in obsessions of the past. It seems that Sorush can awaken them... ｜ 「灵谷木」中的残灵还停留在过去的执念中，斯露莎可以将她们唤醒…
- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 4 ｜ 好感等级达到4后开启
- A festival that Nara and Aranara celebrate together.\nThat said, it does not seem to be a time to just kick back and relax... ｜ 兰那罗与那菈一同度过的节日。\n似乎不是悠闲过节的时候…
- That's why I decided to let the interview go through. We should direct more public opinions toward the behind-the-scenes heroes — am I right, Mr. Jurieu? Miss Lourvine? ｜ 这正是为什么我要接受采访。舆论应当聚焦在幕后英雄身上，对吧朱里厄先生，露尔薇小姐？
- Scorched Starshroom ｜ 枯焦的星蕈
- Is writing a paper that scary? ｜ 论文有这么可怕吗？

- ...Speaking of regulars, we've had a young lady with a strange headdress come in pretty often lately. The vegetarian dishes on our menu seem quite to her taste. ｜ …说起常客，最近有一位戴着奇怪头饰的小姑娘倒是经常来，店里的素菜菜色好像还挺合她的口味的。

- Oh, right! The editors of the Yae Publishing House will all be around the Outlander Affairs Agency these next few days. ｜ 对哦，这几天八重堂的编辑们都会在远国监司附近。
- Feeding crocodiles is pretty easy... You drop the meat, they follow the scent, and they eat it themselves. ｜ 喂鳄鱼还是挺轻松随意的…只要丢出生肉，它们就会循着气味自己跑过来吃掉。
- Indwell a Koholasaurus or use a character from the People of the Springs to begin this challenge ｜ 魂附鳍游龙或使用「流泉之众」成员角色，进行挑战

- <color=#D3BC8EFF>Mailbox Capacity</color>\nYour mailbox has a maximum capacity of 1000.\nOnce the number of mail you have exceeds that number, the system will start to automatically delete mail without attachments or mail with attachments you have already claimed in chronological order from oldest to newest.\nAdditionally, the mailbox display is limited, and will only display a portion of your mail once it has gone over the limit.\nDelete excess mail to display the remaining mail.\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Mail Pins</color>\nPinned mail cannot be deleted quickly and will be placed at the top of the mail list.\nHowever, they can still expire.\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Gift Mail Box</color>\nSome important mail such as birthday wishes will be automatically transferred into the Gift Mail Box after you have collected the rewards.\nMail within this Box will not be quick-deleted, and will not expire over time. ｜ <color=#D3BC8EFF>【邮箱容量】</color>\n邮箱中最多能保存1000封邮件。\n当邮件数量超过上限时，系统将依照时间顺序由旧到新，自动删除无附件或附件已领取的邮件。\n除此之外，邮箱具有显示上限，当邮件超出一定数量后，只会展示其中一部分邮件。\n删除过多的邮件后，将展示剩余的邮件。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【邮件标记】</color>\n被标记的邮件不会被快捷删除，并在邮件列表中排序置顶。\n但被标记的邮件依然会随时间过期消失。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【邮件珍藏盒】</color>\n对于诸如生日祝福的一部分重要邮件，在领取该邮件的奖励后，该邮件将被自动收入「邮件珍藏盒」。\n「邮件珍藏盒」中的邮件不会被快捷删除，且不会随时间过期消失。
- Ever since we got back, Julie has been talking about sending him food to show our appreciation... ｜ 朱莉那个家伙，自从回去之后就一直念叨着那个大叔，说什么想给那个大叔送点吃的东西道谢…
- Applaud and rejoice! One of the most outrageous and fantastical arcs known to the Opera Epiclese is now unfolding before your eyes! ｜ 欢呼吧！喝彩吧！在这歌剧院中，人们连幻想都不敢幻想的奇妙展开！

- Thanks, sorry to bother you. ｜ 谢谢，打扰了。

- Luckily this big fella can't move. Otherwise, we wouldn't even have time to run... ｜ 还好这个大家伙不会动，不然我们只怕连跑的时间都没有…

- A three-layered tea rack made from reliable, economical Bamboo Segments and Fragrant Cedar Wood, often used to store the bamboo sieves that hold tea leaves.\nSome report that this inclined design has the advantage of allowing the tea leaves to dry more fully while allowing staff to check on the tea leaves' status better than flatter designs would allow. However, the large size and specialization of this tea storage rack makes it ill-suited to small-town tea farmers, and can usually only be found at Chunming Teaworks, which has enough storage space to start with. ｜ 由可靠而经济的「竹节」和「垂香木」框架制成的三层储茶架，多用于存放盛茶的竹筛。\n据悉，斜放的储茶架相较于平放的设计，具有能让茶叶晾晒得更为充分和便于工作人员检查茶叶状况的优势。然而，由于其体积庞大且专用性强，这类储茶架并不适合独门小户的茶农使用，一般仅能在拥有充足存储空间的春茗茶坊中见到。
- Ugh, how embarrassing... I'm sorry you had to see me like that. It's never happened before, I swear... I've never thrown up. Not once. ｜ 这么没品的事情，我不可能当着你们的面干啦。以前也没有吐过哦，没有的。

- For {param1}s after using, unleash a shockwave at the location of opponents hit by your active character's Normal Attacks, dealing True DMG to nearby opponents. 1 such shockwave can be released every {param2}s. ｜ 施放后的{param1}秒内，当场上角色的普通攻击命中敌人时，将在命中敌人的位置释放冲击波，对附近的敌人造成真实伤害，每{param2}秒至多通过这种方式释放一次冲击波。
- Just this alone isn't too much work for me. The problem is I have to maintain all the other equipment and mechanisms, like the device for the sea monster's minions you saw... ｜ 单论这部分的工作，倒还不算离谱，问题是我还要保养其他的设备，比如你们看到过的海怪爪牙机关…

(Complete the Archon Quest "Incandescent Ode of Resurrection" to get the best experience from this event).\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Event Rules</color>\n2 new challenges related to specific tribes will be unlocked on the first, third, and fifth days of the event.\nThere are additional Tune-Up Goals within the challenges. (Complete the Archon Quest "Incandescent Ode of Resurrection" to view the contents of the Commemorative Gifts.) ｜ <color=#D3BC8EFF>【活动说明】</color>\n在圣火竞技场的话事处，一位「战备联络人」正等待着你们的支援——贵为英雄的你们身手不凡，可以提供绝无仅有的意见，磨砺纳塔各部族的勇士…\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【参与条件】</color>\n冒险等阶达到20，并完成以下前置任务：魔神任务「巨龙与自由之歌」。（完成魔神任务「炽烈的还魂诗」后体验更佳。）\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【活动规则】</color>\n活动开始后的第1/3/5天，均会开启2个与特定部族有关的新挑战。\n挑战中存在额外的「砥砺目标」，在3个部族的挑战中，每个部族至少完成1个「砥砺目标」，可以获得特殊的纪念礼物。（完成魔神任务「炽烈的还魂诗」后，方可查看纪念礼物的内容。）

### Part 115

- You're right, I didn't. I've never done anything fraudulent in my life. ｜ 你这话说的，我可是从来不会作弊的。
- Yeah, it hurt. What, something you want to experience for yourself? ｜ 挺痛的。下次带你去试试。
- We should be close... According to the notes, we should find a cave here. ｜ 是这附近吧…按照笔记里写的，我们应该能找到一座山洞。
- I refuse. ｜ 我拒绝。

- It would be nice to <color=#00E1FFFF>place the Pneumousia Relay Piles on both sides of the road</color> so that everything is symmetrical. ｜ 如果能<color=#00E1FFFF>让道路两侧的芒荒中继桩对称排布</color>就好啦。

- Okay, next up... Hmm, this isn't the focus of this trip, but let's go buy a light novel. ｜ 接下来的话…虽说不是这次行程的重点，但我们先去买轻小说吧。
- Hooray! Cuteness is peace! ｜ 好耶！可爱就是和平！
- She just doesn't want to be forgotten. ｜ 她只是不想被遗忘。
- You're leaving, what? Okay, fine... as long as you had fun. And uh, come again. ｜ 你要走了吗？好吧，玩尽兴就好，欢迎下次光临喔。
- I'm Stanley. Remember my name. You're also here for my stories, aren't you? ｜ 我是斯坦利，好好记住我的名字！你也是来听我的冒险故事的吧？

- Today's been a super long and exciting day, yeah? ｜ 是不是觉得今天好漫长好刺激呀？

- In case you've forgotten my humble person, allow me to introduce myself... ｜ 为防两位忘了我这个小小部将，我先自我介绍一下…
- Really, Paimon. It's not like you don't know me. Do I look like I know anyone who would ask me to coordinate their funeral? ｜ 真是的，你们又不是不知道我的情况，我身边有谁是需要我去安排葬礼的吗？
- Come here, kiddo. We're not gonna hurt ya. ｜ 好孩子，来这边。我们不会伤害你的。
- I could cook something? ｜ 那我做道菜？

- A youngster like you should be more energetic. Don't be cold! ｜ 这么冷淡可不好啊，年轻人要有活力一点嘛！
- #{NICKNAME}! Hey, {NICKNAME}! ｜ #{NICKNAME}！{NICKNAME}！
- Lately we've been sleeping well, and eating even better... now this is the life! ｜ 最近吃得不错，睡得也还不错，日子过得挺舒坦的呢。
- You seem to have many stories of your own. ｜ 你好像很有故事。

- Check it out, Kaeya's not-so-subtly asking for freebies... He's actually doing it... ｜ 快看，凯亚这家伙正在明目张胆地要求各种东西呢…
- Once you get accustomed to spicy food, everything else tastes bland. That's just the way it is. ｜ 吃惯辣味之后，其他菜总觉得不够劲。没办法啊。
- Still, people like us miners... We aren't an awfully talented lot. We tend to stick to this one path, unlike you adventurers. Going out and seeing the world as you like... If only I could do that. ｜ 不过呀…我们矿工，本事不大…大半辈子大概就钉在这里咯。不像你这样的旅行者，出远门见识世面，真好啊…
- Give me some time. I'll think of something. ｜ 给我一点时间，我来想办法。
- Techniques from Fontaine have given this hanging painting a unique aesthetic, and the Genius Invokation TCG theme has also conferred great expressiveness upon it. When completed, it depicts Dawn Winery. ｜ 采用了枫丹技术，有着奇特观感的挂画「恒动械画」，融入「七圣召唤」的主题后，获得了更为精妙的表现力。复原完成后，其画面形似卡牌「晨曦酒庄」。

- They're back again! How many of them are there!? ｜ 又是这些家伙，到底有多少呀！
- You're blushing. Is this how it feels when the mood of a conversation begins to shift? ｜ 你脸红了。是因为被这个话题调动了情绪吗？
- Lady Idyia gave me a precious opportunity that allows me to keep doing what I do best. As long as you're happy, I'm happy! ｜ 伊迪娅女士给我的这份工作很珍贵，让我有了继续发挥自己的能力的机会，你们玩得开心，我就心满意足了！
- The monsters? What is there to ask? I was just running from them, that's what! ｜ 魔物的情况…那还用问吗？我就是刚从魔物堆旁边跑过来的！

- Okay, I guess I'll get things set up on the table first. Once you're ready, we can get started. ｜ 那我先布置牌桌，你们要是准备好了我们就开始吧！

- P·A·I·M·O·N ｜ P·A·I·M·O·N
- Let's play Genius Invokation TCG. ｜ 来进行「七圣召唤」吧！
- I have nothing to hide, so there is no shame in explaining myself. ｜ …我没有必须隐瞒的事，说出来也没什么。
- Faruzan, the researcher from a hundred years prior, is a household name in Haravatat, but she is better known in Sumeru at large for her work in mechanics.\nOnce, she was trapped within a strange ruin, and only escaped after much peril. Yet a century had passed for the world she emerged into, and it was no longer the place she remembered.\nWhether it be due to academic disagreements or the passage of time, she has quite a few things to say about the current state of the Akademiya, and is not afraid to put her sharp tongue to use in commenting about other researchers.\nHowever, she can be quite easy to talk to... so long as you call her "Madam," that is. ｜ 来自「一百年前」的学者珐露珊，身为知论派名宿，却以机关造诣闻名须弥。\n曾被困于陌生遗迹，历经万险方才逃出生天。然而遗迹外的须弥，竟早已过去百年，不复她记忆中的模样。\n尽管因为时代变迁和学术分歧，她对现在的教令院有不少意见，对学者们的言辞态度也相当锐利。\n不过只要在称呼她时加上「前辈」这一后缀，珐露珊前辈…就会变得好说话许多。
- Event has ended ｜ 当前活动已结束
- An association between the contents of the slates and the events in real life... ｜ 石板上的内容与现实事件的关联…
- So once when I was cleaning the library, I noticed a book on the shelf called Flowers for Princess Fischl. At the time I assumed it was just a fantasy novel... I was so surprised to find out the main character is a real person. I could hardly believe it! She must be someone incredible to have a whole book dedicated to her. ｜ 以前我打扫图书馆的时候，记得有本书叫《菲谢尔皇女夜谭》，我还以为只是幻想小说…但没想到，里面的主人公居然真的存在！能有一本自己的传记，她一定很厉害吧。

- This has certainly been a memorable series of events. ｜ 果然很值得纪念啊，这一段时光。

- Look at you! Look. At. You. The little canary got the poisonous scorpion all tied around itself without even knowing what happened... Amazing! Truly amazing! ｜ 瞧瞧你，瞧瞧你…小金丝雀还不知道发生了什么，就已经让毒蝎作茧自缚了…真是了不起呀，了不起！
- Miitoboru ｜ 大肉丸
- Release my stress... Oh, I see what you mean. Being at the top of a mountain really does make someone want to yell out loud. ｜ 发泄…哦，我明白你的意思。来到开阔的山顶，确实让人想要大喊。
- A Lingering Fragrance ｜ 手有余香
- Eh? There doesn't seem to be any treasure here... ｜ 咦？这里好像没有宝藏…
- Adjust the deck first... ｜ 先调整一下卡组…

- You escaped without us... ｜ 派蒙居然把我们两个丢下独自逃跑…
- But that bright light really hurt my eyes... ｜ 不过照得眼睛好痛…
- N—No way! F—Fine, if you're not going, I'll just go myself... ｜ 不、不行！算、算了，你不去我去…
- I'm playing hide-and-seek with my brother! Trouble is... Well, he knows all my hiding spots... ｜ 我正在和哥哥捉迷藏呢！但是…我藏的每一个地方他都知道…

- It's nothing... I just mean to say that you should be careful of the sandstorms. ｜ 没什么…我说，小心沙暴。

- We might as well listen in... ｜ 姑且听听他们在说什么吧…
- ...Made especially for you. ｜ 是特地为你准备的。
- To see me as a coward — are your vile eyes mere reflective stones? ｜ 你那凶星般的双眼难道只是装饰，无法辨清懦夫与勇士的分别。
- Save for a few rare and precious tree types, the people of Liyue are accustomed to using broad-reaching collective terms for trees and aren't so fussy about the exact species of tree included. For example, trees with curved trunks are referred to by the more sophisticated-sounding term "Knotwood."\nSome artistically inclined scholars like to make a dye from the leaves of the Amber Knotwood Tree, which they add to their ink and proceed to paint and write poetry. In the eyes of another group of artistically inclined scholars, however, this is nothing more than a cheap party trick. ｜ 除了少有的名贵树木，璃月人更习惯以形貌为树木冠以统称，而不在意特定的树种。对于树干弯曲的树木，璃月有着「盘伏」的雅称。\n某些文人雅士会使用这种缃叶盘伏树的叶片制作墨水染料，然后以这样的染料行诗作画。但在另一群文人雅士的眼中，这种行为只是无才者的小把戏。

- A solemn mask exquisitely carved from basalt. Its hollow eyes stare ahead expressionless and cold. ｜ 玄岩精雕而成的庄严面具，空洞的双眼永远冰冷地凝视着前方。

- Even though I'm still miles behind you, I'm feeling a little more confident now. At least, I won't end up dragging you down again. ｜ 虽然比起你还差得远，但我现在有一点信心了，至少不会再拖你的后腿。
- Aranara ｜ 兰那罗

- Ayaka found this on a flower stand at the festival venue. This sheet of paper, however, only contains one line of text. ｜ 绫华在容彩祭会场的花架上发现的纸片，但这张纸上只写了一句话。

- You helped bring our director's murderer to justice. We can't thank you enough. ｜ 非常感谢你们能为团长报仇，非常感谢你们。
- Let me think... What I really want to eat now is... ｜ 让我想想...我现在的最想吃的就是…

- That's good to hear. I hope I'll catch you flying again. Good luck, young warrior. ｜ 那就太好了，希望以后还能看到你飞行的样子，加油吧，年轻的勇士。

- Rawr! Rawr! ｜ 呀！呀！

- ...The Lantern Rite when we met briefly, I was unaware of your true identity. I... must apologize for the discourtesy. ｜ …当年的海灯节，不识仙师真身，如果有什么怠慢的地方，还请见谅。
- I'll have you know that though the Lawrence Clan is in decline, myself and others of noble blood are looking for a chance to restore our rightful honor. ｜ 我告诉你，虽然劳伦斯家族现在落没了，但我等后裔，一直都在寻找重获荣光的机会。
- ??? ｜ ？？？
- If you discover any strange new riddles in your travels, or get stumped by one, please come to me by all means. ｜ 如果你以后在旅途中发现了新奇的谜语，或者被谜题难住了，一定要记得过来找我。
- So I was thinking that maybe Lady Guuji might have a way to get my brother back to normal but let him keep his sword skills... ｜ 我就想，如果是宫司大人，说不定既能让哥哥恢复正常，又保留他获得的剑道天赋…
- Overflowing Mastery ｜ 精通移涌
- "As for the robbery you suffered, the authorities are actively investigating. We hope to reach a conclusion by the time you have all returned from the Fortress of Meropide." ｜ 「至于几位反馈的问题，本港正在积极调查中。若是几位能有幸从梅洛彼得堡回来的话，到那时，应该就会有调查结果了吧。」
- A detailed step-by-step recipe for making Fried Radish Balls. ｜ 步骤详实的食谱，记载着「炸萝卜丸子」的制作方法。
- (Monsters! And so many of them... It looks like they're coming for this field...) ｜ （有魔物出现了，这数量…不太寻常，好像是朝着这块田地来的…）
- So what you mean to say is, I've been saved from this predicament? ｜ 真的吗，这么说来我终于得救了？
- Hmm... Anyway, we should move the flower first. Let's put it beside the house. ｜ 唔…总之，先把这盆花搬出去，就放在屋子旁边吧。
- Will do. You look after yourself as well. Don't push yourself too hard — you don't wanna make yourself ill again. ｜ 嗯嗯，你也注意身体，别那么拼了，当心老伤复发。
- ...Hahaha, everyone, lend me your ears! ｜ …哦呵呵呵，来了吗，诸位。
- My father is the general manager of the Goth Grand Hotel. ｜ 就是那位歌德大酒店老总管的儿子。

- Give up. No one's coming to rescue you. ｜ 投降吧，没人会来帮你的。

- Now, we shall "sing" together with the Aranara in Vanarana. Maybe that is the part every Aranara looks forward to the most — singing with Nara friends. ｜ 接下来，要和桓那兰那的兰那罗们一同「歌唱」。或许这就是无忧节当中，兰那罗们最期待的事情：与那菈朋友一同歌唱。

- Whenever the sound of clashing blades fades into the distance, I appreciate the silence that follows all the more. ｜ 每当刀剑铮响声从耳畔远去时，我总会更为珍惜周遭的清寂。
- Well, I call it a business, but really, I just send people flowers most of the time, or I help some store with ikebana... ｜ 哈哈哈，虽然说是生意，但其实大部分时候都是帮人送花，或者是帮哪家店制作「插花」啦…

- A small frog that often appears in wetlands.\nThis animal is very common in wetland areas, and its body secretes a mysterious sticky substance that has much medicinal utility. Tree Frogs are well-suited to dwelling in rainforests.\nIt is said that some tree frogs can glide between the trees. Research indicates that the principle behind such an ability is quite similar to that of wind gliders.\nIncorporating some undulating terrain in the Realm Within to provide footholds for gliding may really thrill these special animal guests. ｜ 常在湿地出没的小小青蛙。\n潮湿地带十分常见的小动物，身上会分泌奇特的粘液，具有多种药用用途。树蛙适应丛林中的生活。\n据说有些树蛙可以在丛林间滑翔。根据研究，其原理与风之翼有不少相似之处。\n若是在壶中洞天搭建起伏有致的地形，提供滑翔的落脚点，或许能让这些特别的动物客人欢欣鼓舞。

- A strangely shaped stone carving that imitates the form of the Carefree Simulacra scattered throughout Chenyu Vale. It appears nearly identical to the originals, besides possessing no magical power whatsoever.\nIt is said that these stone carvings were first made by the ancestors of the people of Chenyu Vale, but none can say why they chose such a shape, or why this shape gives people a carefree feeling... ｜ 造型奇特的石雕，摹刻了沉玉谷内散落各处的「慢悠悠仙像」，除了不具备原型的神奇力量外，大体与原型别无二致。\n据说，这种石雕出自沉玉谷的先民之手，但他们出于何种原因选择了这种石雕造型，且这种造型又为何会总给人一种慢悠悠的感觉，尚且不为人知…

- A simple and rustic wooden house often found to the west of Sumeru City. It is structurally similar to the buildings in Vimara Village. Placing some leaves and hay on a Karmaphala Wood frame would yield this very cheap dwelling place. Many weavers spend years living in these houses, not due to poverty, but because they are already used to working in this kind of environment, and dislike spending time getting rid of new distractions after moving to a new place. ｜ 朴素简洁的木屋，与维摩庄的建筑有着构造上的相通之处，可见于须弥城的西部。在「业果木」的框架之上敷设叶片与干草，即可得到这种造价宜人的建筑。部分从事纺织工作的居民长住在这种木屋里，并非贫困潦倒，负担不起更好的住处，而是习惯了在这种环境中工作，不愿在搬迁后花费时间，排除干扰手艺的因素。
- A medium-sized bird that can be found in Natlan. Its huge crest looks like the blade of a halberd, and is an excellent deterrent. Even the fiercest of monsters think twice before trying to hunt them... After being relocated to The Realm Within, these birds, owing to their fierce appearance, assumed a new role — alongside the teacup lid, they became both spear and shield for Tubby, keeping pastries safe from the greedy beaks of certain avians... ｜ 可见于纳塔的中型禽类，长戟刃面般的巨大头冠赋予了它们极强的威慑力，就连凶悍的魔物都不敢轻易捕猎它们…在被迁入壶中洞天后，这种禽类便凭借自己凶悍的外形获得了新的责任——它们将与茶碗盖一起，成为阿圆身旁的戟与盾，从某些鸟类贪吃的嘴下，守护茶点的和平…

- Talent Level-Up material.\nGold is the symbol of the land of Geo.\nGold is the blood that flows deep within Liyue's veins, the muscle that makes up Liyue's beating heart, and the bones that make Liyue stand proud. ｜ 天赋培养素材。\n岩之国土的象征是黄金。\n黄金是流淌在璃月土地深处的血液，是鼓动璃月的心脏有力搏动的肌肉，是让璃月傲然挺立的筋骨。
- Go to the exit of the cave ｜ 前往洞穴出口
- Your appearance differs greatly from our kingdom's subjects. Had you taken part before, I would not forget it. ｜ 您和我国臣民样貌大不相同，如果之前参与过选拔，我是一定不会忘记的。
- That is why I am here in Natlan — home to the most shockingly dazzling elemental life forms! ｜ 所以我来到了这里，纳塔！诸元素生命力最为璀璨惊心的国度！
- Yeah. Could be that we're too far away, and they can't smell the fish? If only we could get 'em ashore somehow... ｜ 是呀，可能是因为距离太远了，没闻到鱼肉的气味吧？要是能想办法先把它们引到岸上来的话…
- The Tenryou Commission was concerned about potential cargo theft, so they contacted everyone who was renting space in the warehouse. It was then that we realized that the latest copies of A Legend of Sword had suddenly gone missing! ｜ 天领奉行担心货物有失窃风险，就联络了所有租用仓库的人，结果就发现，放在那的《沉秋拾剑录》新刊全都不见了！
- Mmhmm, bye now! Please do let me know if you need help with anything! ｜ 嗯嗯，再见啦！如果有什么需要帮助的事情，请一定要告诉我喔！

- I placed a bunch of the newest models of mechanical traps around here earlier, and filled them with foods that all kinds of animals like. ｜ 我之前在这附近布下了好多最新型机关陷阱，装着各种动物会感兴趣的食物。
- ...Seems like similar things happen every time I'm with you. I'll attempt divination, read the signs, zero in on the target, then solve the problem. ｜ …似乎每次跟你见面都是这种情况呢。占卜、解读、锁定目标，再解决问题。

- *sigh* I care just as much as everyone else about making The Little Oceanid a success. That's why I wanted to wait until after the show. ｜ 正是因为「水的女儿」无比重要，我才想把真相藏到演出之后。
- Perfect timing, Traveler! I was about to ask you — what is your greatest wish? ｜ 来得正好，旅行者。我想听听，你的愿望是什么？
- Why... Do humans want to stand here all day? ｜ 为什么，人，要在这里站一整天？
- It's as if it's imbued with Pyro... ｜ 就像被火元素影响了一样…
- Arapacati! We're here! ｜ 兰帕卡提！我们来啦！
- Yeah, Paimon would like to know too! ｜ 对哦，我也很好奇！
- Miss Furina. As the Hydro Archon, I am sure you understand the exact meaning of the phenomenon we just witnessed. Or should I say, that's what I originally thought, but looking at your expression... was I wrong, and you haven't a clue? ｜ 芙宁娜小姐，身为神明，我想你一定对刚才那些现象了若指掌吧。或者说，原本我是那样想的，可看你的表情，我似乎猜错了？
- Hello. I am Baizhu, a practitioner of medicine at Bubu Pharmacy. So, are you experiencing any discomfort? If so, where? And how many days have the symptoms persisted? Hmm? You don't require medical attention? Oh, so you came to see me... Ah, then I'm sorry, I'm afraid I must ask you to wait. I'd like to see the other patients first before discussing things any further. ｜ 嗯，我是「不卜庐」的大夫白术。身体哪里不适，有几天了，和我说说吧…哦？不是来问诊而是专程来找我的？抱歉，恐怕要请你稍候了，我接待完后面的病人就来和你详谈。
- Let's keep going. We'll be able to see more clearly up ahead. ｜ 先继续前进吧，到前面肯定能看得更清楚。
- No harm done. What brings you to the Tenryou Commission headquarters all of a sudden? Is there trouble afoot? ｜ 无妨。你们突然造访天领奉行府，莫非是遇上麻烦了？
- It's not easy for sure, but you're in this business for the treasure, y'know... ｜ 虽然辛苦，不过都是为了宝藏嘛…
- Thanks! So we wanna know where to go if we wanna see the Rite of Descension? ｜ 谢谢！那么请问在哪里才能看到那个「请仙典仪」呢？

- The road ahead is very dangerous. ｜ 前面的道路很危险。

- Those monsters, perhaps? ｜ 会不会是那些怪物？

- Domain of Forgery: Altar of Sands ｜ 炼武秘境：砂之祭场

- Everyone in the choir loves to sing, but they're used to singing their favorite songs. ｜ 信徒们虽然爱唱歌，但大家习惯了唱自己喜欢的歌。
- Jeht requested that you stay in the desert for a time... She commissioned us to come here and give you the "hospitality" you deserve. ｜ 婕德说，希望你们在沙漠里多留一段时间…她委托我们在这里「招待」一下你们。

- If the Tsaritsa sent him here, why would he bring up what happened "five centuries ago"? ｜ 他是为了至冬女皇而来吗？如果是这样，为什么要提到「五百年前」？

- A goblet made from the bone of an unknown beast. It was taken as a trophy after some deadly encounter. ｜ 用不知名的巨大兽类的骨头制成的杯。是某次厮杀后得到的猎获。

- Legend has it that while some adepti were pursuing the adeptal path, they would wander across mountains and rivers, enjoying various gourmet dishes, using such means to quiet their hearts. Their path would be called the "Trail of Delicacies" by those who came after.\nNow, the Adventurers' Guild has combined this fascinating challenge with the traditions of the Moonchase Festival, placing many treasure chests along the Trail of Delicacies.\nFollow three such Trails, defeat any foes that lurk around them, and the handsome rewards shall be yours! ｜ 传说某些仙人在求取仙道前，曾寻壑经丘，享用佳肴，以此平心静气。他们的足迹被后世之人称为「珍肴霞踪」。\n如今，冒险家协会将意趣盎然的挑战与逐月节的传统相结合，在「珍肴霞踪」的关键地点布置了宝箱。\n追溯三条「珍肴霞踪」，击败盘踞在附近的敌人，就能赢取丰厚的奖励！
- The standard procedure... ｜ 正规的流程…
- In their natural environments, Vibro-Crystals cannot produce any stable connection between Transmitting and Receiving crystals. As such, we must attempt to stimulate them using more intense Elemental Reactions. ｜ 普通自然环境下的「振晶」反应，并不足以产生「响振晶」与「应振晶」之间的稳定联系，应该通过一些更激烈的元素反应，尝试进行激发了。
- Goodbye. Enjoy the wind of Mondstadt. ｜ 再见，请您尽情享受蒙德的风吧。
- Aranakin and the mushroom speak in whispers. ｜ 兰纳真同蘑菇私语了一会…
- Vile has caught wind of some concerning news and would like you to go and investigate. ｜ 薇尔小姐好像听到了一些令人在意的消息，想要请你前去调查…
- Alright, alright, looks like it's time for the Mascot to step in. ｜ 好啦好啦，「吉祥物」该出来活跃气氛了！
- Hmm, there don't seem to be any paths leading forward... Anyway, let's check out what's inside this treasure chest first. ｜ 欸？不过前面好像没有能继续通行的道路了…总之，看看宝箱里有什么好东西吧。
- Though I, Ematol, am just a lowly, bog-standard alchemist of no significance, I still have a dream! ｜ 本人艾玛托，虽然只是个小小的、不值一提的普通炼金术士，但我依然有一个「梦想」！
- You've got what it takes, Kachina. Youngsters like you? You'll forge your own miracles. ｜ 卡齐娜，你很有实力，你这样的年轻人会创造属于你们的奇迹。
- Bennett ｜ 班尼特
- I am neither knowledgeable nor masterful, so all I can do is bet on luck. But I must say, my luck on bets has been very consistent. I have never won a gamble. ｜ 我既没知识又没本领，只好赌运气啦！但是我的赌运真的很稳定，一次都没赌赢过。
- Well, since we're already caught in the rain, we might as well enjoy it! Saves us the energy of running for shelter, at least. ｜ 赶不及躲雨了，那——安心淋雨吧，还省了跑步的力气。
- Don't be ridiculous, you old codger. ｜ 胡说什么呢，你这老头。
- ...Can water really contain something like that? ｜ 「愿望」…水中也会含有那种东西吗？
- Good night, Arlecchino. ｜ 晚安，阿蕾奇诺。
- Alkami. My friend here wants to enroll in his architecture class, but they're a bit short on money. Alkami told us that you're the man to go to in this kind of situation. ｜ 阿尔卡米。我朋友想去他那里报名学习建筑课程，不过身上差点钱，他就介绍我们到这里来了。
- It's too late! ｜ 来不及了。
- Anyway, thanks for helping me test out the "Remelting Tablets." I should go back and write my papers now. ｜ 总之，多谢你们帮我试验「重熔片剂」，我该回城里去写论文了。
- Hmm... ｜ 嗯？

- This is our first robotic toy, after all, so there are still some examinations to be done. We can't be producing exploding gadgets all the time, now can we? ｜ 嗯嗯…毕竟是第一个造出来的玩具机器人，我得进行一些检查，总是做出会爆炸的玩意儿可不行啊。
- Hmph, no one can stay hidden on my watch. ｜ 哼，我的眼睛能发现所有的可疑人员。
- To the Victor, the Spoils ｜ 胜者夺金
- About Fontaine, the next stop on my journey... ｜ 关于旅途的下一站，枫丹…
- Wait, Clorinde said that sword used to belong to her master, right? Does that mean... her master has been alive that long? ｜ 我记得克洛琳德小姐说这是你师父的佩剑吧，难道说，她也是位活了很长时间的人？

- Anyway, I'm stuck at the "publish your research" part. The courses at Akademiya have a tight schedule already, and I have to get my thesis proposal passed in time. ｜ 总之就是，我现在就卡在「发表研究」这一环，教令院各种课程本来时间就紧，还要在规定的时间内通过开题报告…
- In order to make sure that he would comply with the Electro Archon's rule, the Kitsune Saiguu set the two of them up and got Ioroi appointed as the Protector of the Grove. This made him responsible for the safety of the Chinju Forest. ｜ 「狐斋宫」以前为了让他服从雷神大人的管束，设计了二人，设法让五百藏被封为「保生司正」，管理镇守之森的安泰。
- Err... Errh? ｜ 嗯…嗯？

- Eh? There's another one of you... ｜ 咦？又一个…

- Find Arashakun's lost "courage." ｜ 找回兰沙恭丢失的「勇气」。
- As the outlander stands before <color=#00E1FFFF>the clockwork key</color>, they are overcome by a sudden urge to set it free. ｜ 外乡人站在<color=#00E1FFFF>发条</color>一旁，内心涌起了拔出它的渴望。
- But little did they know that I had risked myself to serve as the lure while you closed the net! Ah, like the praying mantis hunting the cicada, they did not see th— ｜ 但他们不知道…我是冒着生命风险做诱饵，引导你们收紧包围圈！所谓螳螂捕蝉…
- At first, their mannerisms seemed a bit stilted. But once I got close, it was obvious that they possessed great skills. ｜ 他们刚开始大摇大摆的，举止有些太过做作，但一追上去我就发现他们本事了得。
- Traveler, over here! ｜ 旅行者，这里，这里！
- Passive Checks are a special type of checks that need not be actively triggered, but instead will automatically trigger at specific times. If you pass, you will find some hidden information, such as irregularities in a person's attitude or certain incongruous details... ｜ 被动检定是一种不需要主动触发的特殊检定，会在特定时机自动触发。若检定成功，即可发现一些隐藏的信息，例如某人态度的异样、某处细节的不自然…
- Still, on the bright side, business is now taken care of, and I have unused travel funds, so I was planning to— ｜ 不过凡事得尽量往好处想，现在正事差不多处理完了，而差旅费还结余不少，我打算…
- Do you eat Ajilenakh Nuts the fastest too? ｜ 吃枣椰也最快吗？
- Blub... blub... ｜ 呜…呜…
- Hehe. I had to. I wasn't born with a silver spoon in my mouth. ｜ 呵呵，不要理所当然地觉得，我是含着金汤匙长大的人。
- Why are there Saurus Crackers here? This letter... ｜ 怎么又是龙龙饼干？而且旁边的信是…
- ...? ｜ ……？
- Your foe has entered Variation Level 9 and has increased ATK! ｜ 敌人已进入九阶变奏状态，攻击力提升！
- Well... Because they all tend to act tough to try to intimidate their opponents. And, that they all like to collect shiny treasures. ｜ 嗯…因为他们都喜欢装出强悍的样子威吓对手，还有，都喜欢收集亮晶晶的财宝。
- About Beliefs ｜ 关于信仰…
- A while back, I finally managed to earn a bit of pocket money by helping organize some books and materials. If it had been stolen, I wouldn't be able to afford any new materials myself. ｜ 前段时间我帮人家整理书籍和规整资料，好不容易才挣了一些钱，被抢走的话，就没钱买新的资料了。
- A woven scroll passed down for generations in the Children of Echoes. It tells the legend of a young Sundjatta from 500 years ago. ｜ 回声之子传承的织卷，述说着五百年前的英杰松伽塔年轻时的传奇。
- Scholar's Clock ｜ 学士的时钟
- I'd love to see it. ｜ 真想看看。
- Wonderful! This should suffice. I'll continue my experiments once I return. With this as the lubricant, my Numbering Machine will definitely... ｜ 太棒了！这些应该就足够了，我回去就开始做试验，有了这些润滑剂，我的「推数机」一定…
- About Razor ｜ 关于雷泽…
- Chief Amina thinks it's a great idea, too. So, you want in? ｜ 首领大人刚刚也同意了。玛拉妮，你要不要一起来？
- Talk to Cyrus ｜ 与居勒什对话
- The power of the filth is slowly fading away. Victory will be ours! ｜ 污秽的力量正在慢慢消失，我们就快胜利了！
- Dynamic Skin ｜ 影幻牌面
- Imagine my manuscripts or astrology tomes, ruined by feline canines — that'd be troublesome indeed! ｜ 万一把我的稿子，或者占星相关的资料咬坏，那可就麻烦了！
- You're Cabin of Intense Purity! ｜ 你是猛烈纯洁小屋！
- Reminiscent Regimen: Thrill ｜ 追想练行·烈趣篇
- Alright. We're about to reach the Upper Sanctum, but, uh... Let me take five real quick. Goodness, my back hurts. ｜ 好了，虽然马上可以上到「浮土静界」，但是请让我休息一会儿，背很痛，谢谢。
- But Marla and I have found a way to work around it! Whenever we want to meet, we go stargazing at Starsnatch Cliff. ｜ 不过我和玛拉说好的！想见面的时候，就一起到摘星崖去看星星。
- (Why don't outlanders like Charcoal-Baked Ajilenakh Cakes?) ｜ （为什么外国人都不怎么喜欢椰炭饼呢？）
- Wait, hold on! Don't go! ｜ 等等，别走啊，别走！
- Cochanina ｜ 柯夏尼娜
- Mmhahaha! Slow, slow, weak! ｜ 呶哈哈，好慢好慢。好弱。
- The silently-flowing underground rivers of Enkanomiya are home to a variety of fish. In that sense, one could speculate that these waters connect this place to the outside world. ｜ 在渊下宫中静静流淌的地下河，其中出没着各种鱼类，如此看，这片水域可能隐蔽地与外界相连。
- At most, Jnana Energy can only be seen as representing a portion of a person's abilities. Humans are complicated beings, so it is impossible to evaluate them using a single criterion. ｜ 「知能」最多只能算「能力」的一部分。人是很复杂的，没办法用单一的标准衡量。
- Nameless Sketch ｜ 无名的画稿
- Level 4 Shattering Pressure DMG|{param11:F1P} ｜ 四阶高压粉碎伤害|{param11:F1P}
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- Hmm. We can't see where the Great Khvarena we need to get is. But there is a strange device over there, though. ｜ 唔，也没看到哪里有我们要找的大灵光啊，倒是有个奇怪的装置在那里。
- Don't get me wrong, sunset in Inazuma is impressive, too, but somehow it feels a little more... somber than what you have here. ｜ 我是说…稻妻的晚霞也不错啦，但要和这里相比的话，还是有些压抑嘛。

---
### Part 116

- "...The obsession to cleanse the stain of the name 'Mikoshi' must eat at him..." ｜ 「…对洗清『御舆』污名之执着，实在是损心耗力…」
- Amp: Rapid Assault ｜ 增幅·迅捷攻势
- Message ｜ 留言
- Sara!? ｜ 裟罗——？！
- Forest Elder ｜ 森林的长老
- That's absolutely not possible. I added a lot of safety and monitoring devices, so the worst case scenario that it doesn't have enough output. An explosion is impossible. ｜ 绝无可能，我为它配置了大量的安全与监测装置，最多也就是出力强度偏低，爆炸是不可能的。
- Time Trial Game Start ｜ 限时抵达游戏开始
- Maybe Mr. Desnos shortened the name to make it easy for you to understand. ｜ 也许是德斯诺斯先生为了方便您理解，将前面的前缀都暂时省略了。
- Ah, Miss Citrus — do you happen to serve any beverages here that don't contain Magic Tonic? ｜ 柑橘女士，请问有没有不加魔水的饮品？
- You show the crystal to Venti... ｜ 你向温迪展示了结晶…
- You know what? Let's have a Sweet Madame as well. ｜ 我改主意了，再要一份甜甜花酿鸡。
- Stardust Exchange ｜ 星尘兑换
- Now, we can avoid getting split up. ｜ 这样就能避免失散了。
- Hehe, fireworks aren't just for festivals y'know. ｜ 呵呵，烟花的功用可不该只限制在祭典上。
- I understand. Thank you for bringing me these records. ｜ 嗯，我了解了，谢谢你帮我整理这份记录。
- ... ｜ ……
- Reminiscent Regimen: Thrill ｜ 追想练行·烈趣篇
- Told you so! See, Paimon guessed right. ｜ 果然吗…猜也猜得到呢。
- Finally, you want to take out those with the long staves... What do they call them, again? Samachurls? Either way, they don't look so tough... ｜ 最后是那个搂着根长棍子的…叫什么？丘丘人萨满？看着就没什么实力…
- I didn't think much of it then, I thought it was merely a scrap piece of paper that had fallen into the cargo. After a quick glance, I stuffed it into a place nearby. ｜ 我当时没多想，以为它就是之前掉进箱子里的一张废纸，草草看了一眼后，就把它塞在了这附近。
- It's not all stormy clouds. The first harvest wasn't great, but the second was better. ｜ 还好还好，虽然头茬茶叶卖的不理想，但二茬多少正常了一些。
- #{NICKNAME}, why are people so fond of immersing themselves in dreams? ｜ #{NICKNAME}，为什么人们都喜欢沉浸在梦里？
- It all makes sense now! ｜ 嗯，我现在完全搞懂了！$UNRELEASED
- #Thank you so much, kind {M#sir}{F#lady}! I'll mark the locations of the Pate de Fruit Station and Crepes Suzette Station on your map now! ｜ #非常感谢，好心的{M#先生}{F#小姐}！我现在就把「果果软糖站」和「桔桔薄饼站」的位置在地图上给您标出来！
- Um, Shenhe... It would be great if you could refrain from putting things on my horns from now on. They're really quite sensitive... ｜ 那个，申鹤…下次…最好不要再涂东西到我的角上了，会很敏感的…
- "Those are trophies, you know? Trophies! I won them fair and square — and it was a lot of effort, too! You can't just give them all back just like that!" ｜ 「这是战利品呀，战利品！我辛苦赢来才分给你的，不是让你还给弱者的！！」
- Arithmetic Enhancer Mek - Pneuma ｜ 机关·算力增幅器·芒
- Quest Item ｜ 任务道具
- Energy Cost|{param3:I} ｜ 元素能量|{param3:I}
- Paimon didn't catch anything suspicious so far... ｜ 总觉得刚才那些话，好像也没有什么可疑的地方…
- Enjou ｜ 渊上
- Alright, the ball's back to you — catch! I want to hear about your experiences and the people you've met. ｜ 我要把球高高地抛还给你…来听听你身边发生的事情，还有你认识的人。
- Uh-huh...? ｜ 嗯哼？
- Stone Tablet Amidst Gray Ash (I) ｜ 迷灰中的石碑·其一
- I may have won this time, but fates can turn like the tide. There are no guarantees that I'll win again next time. ｜ 我略胜了几手。但胜败皆是常事，再来一局，我也未尝能赢。
- Energy Cost|{param6:I} ｜ 元素能量|{param6:I}
- Now's the time! Stormsage, back everyone up! ｜ 就是现在！「蕈蕈雷法师」，为伙伴们提供支援！
- Decoration ｜ 装潢
- Where are you getting that "two" from? If anyone's getting beaten up, it's just you. Don't drag me into this... ｜ 谁说是两个人？要挨打你上，可别算上我…
- I'll bear that in mind. ｜ 我会注意的。
- Legend has it that while some adepti were pursuing the adeptal path, they would wander across mountains and rivers, enjoying various gourmet dishes, using such means to quiet their hearts. Their path would be called the "Trail of Delicacies" by those who came after.\nNow, the Adventurers' Guild has combined this fascinating challenge with the traditions of the Moonchase Festival, placing many treasure chests along the Trail of Delicacies.\nFollow three such Trails, defeat any foes that lurk around them, and the handsome rewards shall be yours! ｜ 传说某些仙人在求取仙道前，曾寻壑经丘，享用佳肴，以此平心静气。他们的足迹被后世之人称为「珍肴霞踪」。\n如今，冒险家协会将意趣盎然的挑战与逐月节的传统相结合，在「珍肴霞踪」的关键地点布置了宝箱。\n追溯三条「珍肴霞踪」，击败盘踞在附近的敌人，就能赢取丰厚的奖励！
- Or perhaps... there's something you want to inquire about? ｜ 还是说…想要打听些什么？
- I'll just have to go to the Grand Narukami Shrine and get someone to pass a message to the Shuumatsuban. ｜ 我现在要去趟鸣神大社，找个人帮忙向终末番传话。
- The End of the Corridor ｜ 大走廊的尽头
- Go forth and vanquish the great enemy cloaked in shadow! ｜ 去清除，阴影之大敌吧！
- Opponents Defeated: #1#/%1% ｜ 击败敌人：#1#/%1%
- Duration|{param3:F1}s ｜ 持续时间|{param3:F1}秒
- Talk to Ting Zhi ｜ 与廷稚对话
- Fortune Slip ｜ 「御神签」
- There's something written on the card on this doll. Let's take a closer look! ｜ 这个玩偶身上的卡片好像写着什么，我们靠近点看看吧！
- "What's got no wings but flies in the air, never gets tired of floating up there, so full of Mora it comes out the nose, but in the sea glug glug glug down it goes!" ｜ 「什么东西没有翅膀却能飞，悬在空中不怕累；肚子里满满当当是摩拉，沉海里咕嘟咕嘟捞不起它。」
- Be quiet. ｜ 你不要说话
- We just need to find a way to enter this Ruin Golem and smash the blocked entrance open with it. ｜ 只要想办法进入这个机器人，利用它把被封住的入口砸开就好了。
- As for the music festival, I must say that I wouldn't call myself any kind of music enthusiast — I simply happen to like this tune. So forgive me if I must decline. ｜ 至于您说的音乐庆典，其实，我只是恰好喜欢这首曲子而已，还算不上音乐爱好者啦，所以可能没办法答应了。
- Use Elemental Tuning to use more Elemental Skills ｜ 进行元素调和，多使用元素战技
- Lone Sojourner ｜ 孤独的旅居
- Difficulty Test Fishing Point 33 (Ad-Hoc) ｜ 难度测试鱼点33（临时）
- Hey, a man's got to eat! Help me figure out something for lunch at least? I'm counting on you. ｜ 嘿，那也要吃饭的嘛！午饭你替我想办法，嗯，就这么定了。
- Let's hope I actually understand your report. ｜ 希望我能看懂你的报告。
- Well, that should do it. The cats seem to really be enjoying themselves. Let's go back and look for Neko. ｜ 这样就可以了，那些小猫们都吃得很开心呢，我们回去找寝子吧。
- Talk to the strange person on the cliff ｜ 与悬崖边的怪人对话
- It produces a powerful Insulation Potion, which protects the taker against electroshocking. ｜ 我们就能得到一份品质扎实的「绝缘药剂」，它能帮你抵消电击的伤害。
- Bamoun! You... ｜ 巴穆恩，你…
- Tour Wangshan Hall with Huang the Third ｜ 跟随黄三爷参观「王山厅」
- The language of flowers? Oh, we've heard of that before. Paimon remembers hearing something like... the "Cecilia" represents "the true feelings of the prodigal son"... ｜ 花语？啊，从前好像有听过，塞西莉亚花的「花语」是「浪子的真情」…之类的。
- What I gave you is something you can ask me about at any time. ｜ 我到底给了你什么，这种旁枝末节的问题什么时候都能解答。
- Argh! ｜ 呜！
- I've said what I've got to say... Ahem, it's time to look for Jeht and the others. ｜ 事情都交代完了，咳，现在可以找婕德他们了。
- Oh... This is just a pile of junk. Paimon thought there'd at least be a letter, or something. ｜ 咦，箱子里…怎么都是些杂物？还以为一定会有信之类的东西呢。
- My thanks to you both. Here's your payment. ｜ 谢谢你们！这是报酬。$UNRELEASED
- Ugh, I'm so full... You're so amazing! ｜ 吃饱了吃饱了，大哥哥你人真好！
- Yes, indeed it is. You're a good fellow, worthy of respect. Until you showed up, I'd never have thought that a Locust would go against their own faction's interests... ｜ 是，都是为了大家。我很敬佩你，明明也是蚱蜢派的一员，却能不囿于自己派系的利益…
- All party members' Movement SPD increased. ｜ 队伍中所有角色的移动速度获得提升。
- "Nonono, it is we who should be thanking the Speaker's Chamber for your acknowledgment! Just the thought that we can contribute to the advancement of Natlan's technology is enough to get us really fired up!" ｜ 「不不不，我们才要感谢『话事处』的认可！一想到我们的努力对于纳塔的技术进步作出了贡献，我们就更有干劲了！」
- Forget what's going on with the Akademiya, haven't you been busy with your construction project? Tell me, when are you going to build yourself a mansion? ｜ 比起院里的事，你不是去忙工程了？什么时候也给自己建一栋豪宅吧。
- I kinda guessed why, but I also didn't wanna believe it. ｜ 我大概是知道为什么，但是又不太敢相信。
- Paimon's itching to try it. We may just have to invite ourselves around for dinner sometime! ...Uh, Paimon meant we should come pay a visit again real soon! Ideally around dinnertime! ｜ 说得我都心痒了，下次我们来蹭…啊不是不是，来拜访吧！最好挑个饭点！
- Traveling Triped ｜ 旅者三足机
- Energy Cost|{param5:I} ｜ 元素能量|{param5:I}
- You've received an invitation by one Arataki Itto. Having been introduced by his enthusiastic letter, you set out on a trip to Watatsumi Island... ｜ 收到了一封荒泷一斗送出的邀请函。在这封热情满满的邀请函的介绍下，你踏上了前往海祇岛的旅途…
- Mein Fräulein, I was merely doing my duty. You need not thank me. Rather, it's my honor to follow you. ｜ 小姐不必客气，这都是我应该做的。能够追随小姐你，是我的荣幸。
- No. Let's get it over with first. ｜ 不用，一切都结束了再说吧。
- Member of the Gardes ｜ 警备队员
- Score {param2} points ｜ 得分达到{param2}
- The letter's current condition... ｜ 关于信件目前的情况…
- No need, Rana, just leave it to us. ｜ 拉娜不用担心！这种事情交给我们就行了。
- Is it your first time here? ｜ 你是第一次来吗？
- (Looks like he can't hear me.) ｜ （看来听不到。）
- 4-Hit DMG|{param4:F1P} ｜ 四段伤害|{param4:F1P}
- Reach the destination within the time limit ｜ 在限定时间内抵达终点
- Huh, if I go after those slimes, I might ruin all the ingredients I have with me. And that would be bad... ｜ 但我要是动手对付这些史莱姆的话，说不定会把我带着的这些材料弄坏，这样就糟糕了…
- Faurobert ｜ 福罗贝尔
- There, there. It's okay. ｜ 别难过。
- Max Duration (Hold)|{param6:F1}s ｜ 长按最大持续时间|{param6:F1}秒
- In fact, there is little that can be changed about the Kujou Clan residence. I mean, it would never become a place like this, at least. ｜ 事实上，九条家也不可能有什么改变了，至少不可能改造成这里的样子。
- That's right. I'm Quinn of Quinn's Fruit. My booth is at... ｜ 没错没错，我是卖水果的昆恩，摊子在…
- It's not in Inazuma. ｜ 不在稻妻内。
- It's nothing. Just a scratch. ｜ 没事，小伤而已。
- Maximize your resources and try to use all your Elemental Dice each Round ｜ 合理分配资源，尽量每回合用完元素骰
- Clash Competitor ｜ 参赛者
- Equipment Card ｜ 装备牌
- Oh, another wind current. Let's ride it up from here. ｜ 是风场，接着从这里上去吧。
- Boundary Marker Inscription ｜ 界碑上的刻文
- I won't lose! ｜ 我是不会输的！
- Up for a game of Genius Invokation TCG? I'll show you the new deck I built. ｜ 要打一把「七圣召唤」吗？给你看看我的新卡组。
- While they were preoccupied with that, Sayu could infiltrate the Tenryou Commission and take the report, as well as any other evidence she might find... ｜ 到时早柚就可以顺利潜入天领奉行，拿到公文和其他证据…
- Thank you, from the bottom of my heart. With your help, I'm confident I can handle any case that comes my way. ｜ 由衷感谢你，在你的支援下，我有信心承受一切诊疗残留的烦恼。
- Amber Knotwood Tree ｜ 缃叶盘伏树
- Lunja ｜ 卢妮雅
- It's just a shame that we're so busy, even though it's the festival period... ｜ 可惜了，虽然是节庆期间，但谁让我这里这么受欢迎呢。要不是工作太忙…
- There are reams of information here: shipping schedules, profit and loss accounts, warehouse inventories, road safety reports, diplomatic intel... The scope is breathtaking, as is the level of detail, and all the information is up to date. ｜ 船舶安排、各商铺盈亏情况、仓库存储、道路治安、外交情报…林林总总，全部是细致的最新报告。
- Huh? Traveler, what are you doing here? Want me to whip something tasty up again? ｜ 咦？旅行者，你怎么来了，是又想吃点好菜了吗？
- Ya-hey, you'll miss out if you just walk about! Come on, try digging for some treasure instead! ｜ 哎呀，走过路过不要错过，来玩「挖宝」了呀！
- Well, come on then, punish me for his sins instead. I dare you. ｜ 父债子偿，来向我复仇吧，你敢不敢？
- But Paimon thought mercenaries would do anything for Mora! ｜ 不是说佣兵只认钱吗？
- The Emanant Skylight? ｜ 天光流泻之处?
- And we found five stone slates with writings on them. Pretty sure they're what Soheil wants for writing his papers. ｜ 并且还拿到了五块石板…上面写满了字的那种。估计索赫尔的目的就是想要这些，好写出论文来。
- Oh, y'know, I just saw her leave. I thought someone must have called for her. ｜ 她刚刚突然走了，我还以为是有人叫她呢。
- The next time this character acts, they will immediately use the Skill <color=#FFFFFFFF>$[S12104]</color>. ｜ 本角色将在下次行动时，直接使用技能：<color=#FFFFFFFF>$[S12104]</color>。
- Achieve victory ｜ 赢得胜利
- "Dopey Dazzler" ｜ 「炫彩呆子」
- A small lizard with horns on its head that can often be found in shadowy bushes.\nThese lizards have lovely green scales and will discard their tails to escape when caught.\nLizard tails have special medicinal properties when dried and ground down into a powder. Some crazy alchemists have even found a way to process them into catalysts for explosions.\nOnce they are separated from the body, these tails will lose their vitality and curl up. \nOut in the wild, some large birds prey upon the lizards, so they naturally live in fear of the two teapot spirits in the Realm Within. ｜ 头上生有尖角的小蜥蜴，时常出没在阴影遮盖的草丛中。\n拥有漂亮绿色鳞片的角蜥，在被捉住时会断尾逃生。\n蜥蜴尾巴在风干磨成粉后有特殊的药用功效，一些疯狂的炼金术士甚至开发出了将之加工成爆炸物催化剂的技术。\n脱离了身体后的尾巴会在一段时间后失去生命力，蜷曲起来。\n在野外，有些大型鸟类会捕食蜥蜴，不知是不是这个原因，生活在尘歌壶中的蜥蜴对两位壶灵有些惧怕。
- Wow, didn't expect to see you again. Hello there! ｜ 你好！想不到又能见面，真开心！

- Hmm... Which shop sells Zaytun Peaches? I can't remember... ｜ 嗯…哪家店卖墩墩桃来着？好像不记得了…
- Sometimes, bandits with less than honorable intentions will covet those bulging parcels. Hiding beside the paths that the deliveries must take, they carefully eye the passing couriers.\nIf the delivery person looks tough, or is in a group, the bandits won't risk it. After all, it's just another day with an empty stomach at most.\nBut when they chance upon a courier like Kirara, appearing delicate and traveling alone, their hearts leap with joy and anticipation. They can nearly taste the Mora that has fallen neatly into their laps.\nWhen Kirara passes, the bandits emerge from concealment and surround her, maliciously blocking her way forward.\n"Huh? Do you need something?" Kirara stops uncertainly.\nUpon closer inspection, this young lady has two tails. Strange, to be sure, but she looks frail and her face is kind — the perfect prey, through and through. Even better, the pack she carries is bursting with thick packages. Truly, this is a good day for a robbery!\n"Uhm... If you have packages you'd like to deliver, please visit our Inazuma City offi—"\nMost bandits don't even let her finish before brandishing their blades. The more polite sort will attempt to persuade her to put down her delivery pack willingly for her own safety. The desperate will simply swarm her, hands outstretched to plunder.\nBut whatever their methods, the result is always the same—\nThe next morning, several large boxes will have appeared on the doorstep of the Tenryou Commission. Under the "Type of Goods Delivered" section of the delivery slip sealing the packages, a single word will be written: "Meanies." ｜ 偶尔会有心怀不轨的盗贼盯上那些鼓囊囊的包裹。他们埋伏在必经之路上，观察着途经此处的快递员。\n对方如果看起来不好惹，或是多人结伴而行，盗贼们便会作罢，大不了饿上一天肚子。\n但碰上绮良良这样看起来弱不禁风，而又单独行动的快递员，盗贼们就暗暗叫好，心中美滋滋地以为摩拉有了着落。\n等绮良良刚一经过，盗贼们便从暗处现身，不怀好意地堵住去路，将她包围。\n「欸？各位有什么事吗？」绮良良不明所以地停下脚步。\n仔细一瞧，这姑娘虽然背后的两条尾巴怪了点儿，但身板柔弱，面相良善，一看就是个好欺负的家伙。更别说她身上背的这包裹，鼓鼓囊囊结结实实，今天还真是个抢劫的好日子！\n「呃…各位有寄件需求的话，还请去稻妻城的…」\n一般不等她说完，盗贼们便亮出了刀子。礼貌点的会劝她留下包裹，小命要紧。急一点的直接一拥而上，伸手夺抢。\n但不管如何，结局都是一个样——\n第二天清晨，天领奉行门口便多了几个大箱子，封口处的「货物种类」一栏简简单单地写了两个字——「坏蛋」。

- While the Elemental Skill <color=#FFD780FF>Dawnfrost Darkstar</color> is active, when Itzpapa's Frostfall Storm hits opponents, an additional <color=#FFD780FF>Obsidian Spiritvessel Skull</color> will be summoned. When a Spiritvessel Skull summoned this way explodes, it deals 1800% of Citlali's Elemental Mastery as Nightsoul-aligned <color=#99FFFFFF>AoE Cryo DMG</color> and restores 16 Nightsoul points and 8 Energy for Citlali. This effect can trigger once every 8s. This DMG is not considered Elemental Burst DMG. ｜ 元素战技<color=#FFD780FF>霜昼黑星</color>中，伊兹帕帕的霜陨风暴命中敌人时，会额外召唤一个<color=#FFD780FF>宿灵之髑·黑星</color>，通过这种方式召唤的宿灵之髑发生爆炸时，会造成相当于茜特菈莉元素精通1800%的具有夜魂性质的<color=#99FFFFFF>冰元素范围伤害</color>，并为茜特菈莉恢复16点夜魂值和8点元素能量，该效果每8秒至多触发一次。该伤害不被视为元素爆发伤害。

- A puppet joint obtained from the Plane of Euthymia. The gesture here is in the shape of the baleful Eye of Stormy Judgment.\nSince they are able to bring down curse and catastrophe alike with a mere gaze, it might seem natural to blame life's misfortunes on calamitous deities. However, if you think about it a little harder, if your will is strong enough, and if your convictions are firm enough...\nThe catastrophes go on for too long. Even a baleful gaze must wash itself with tears. ｜ 从净土中取回的人偶关节，这一部分乃是「恶曜之眼」的造型。\n仅仅依靠凝视就可以降下灾祸与诅咒，因此把人生之不顺归咎于「祸神」似乎理所当然。但是好好想想吧，倘若意志足够强大，信念足够坚定…\n万劫太过久远，凶星恶曜亦能以泪涤净自身。

- *sigh* If any of my squad mates find out, they're gonna give me another annoying nickname, I just know it... ｜ 唉，要是被其他同伴知道了，又该给我起新的外号了…

- In addition, he proposed two strategies to increase the popularity of the competition... expanding the target audience and increasing word of mouth. His ideas have been most effective. ｜ 除此之外，他提出的「扩大受众面」、「提升话题度」这两个方案，也大大增加了赛事的热度，真是帮了大忙。

- A great clay pot that is taller than a person and that possesses stunning volume. Suitable for storing grains and dry goods, it is often used by Puspa Café to store coffee beans, with the speed at which two such pots' worth of beans sell out being one of the measures for briskness of business. A ladder is required to get to the pot's mouth and retrieve its contents, and one has to be careful while doing that to ensure that one does not fall in. As such, some artisans have added a safety net to the pot's opening. ｜ 高度超过一人的硕大陶缸，容积惊人，相当适合储存谷物和干货，普斯帕咖啡馆则用这种陶器来存放最为畅销的咖啡豆，并将卖完两缸咖啡豆的速度作为衡量生意的标准之一。取用陶缸的内容物时，人们需要在缸体旁搭好梯子，还得防止一个不留神跌进去。为此，有的工匠在缸口加装了防护网。

- A machine created from the union between Fontaine's intricate device and special energy technologies. Based on whether it's imbued with <color=#FFE14BFF>ousia or pneuma</color> energy, the machine will operate differently in battle. When either energy is annihilated upon being <color=#FFE14BFF>attacked by its opposite</color>, an Overloaded state will be induced, causing the machine to lose energy and its combat capabilities. ｜ 基于枫丹的精密装置技术与特殊的能源技术，制造出的机械。基于其外显的<color=#FFE14BFF>荒性或芒性</color>能源特征，在战斗中能采取不同的行动；而这种能量特征在被<color=#FFE14BFF>对立性质的攻击</color>湮灭后，将会因为供能过载而失能，失去战斗能力。

- Of course, two different problems can be interconnected in very complicated ways, and you might reach two very contradictory conclusions depending on which one you're focusing on. What I've tried to do is strike a balance. In other words, present an optimal solution to all the problems as a whole. ｜ 当然，不同问题之间错综复杂，对应的结论也有冲突。所以我想要的是「平衡」，也就是在所有问题中找到一个「最优解」。

- "I've only just read the rules for this card, but I think it should do fine with the right deck..."\nHint: Chongyun's deck specializes in enhancing his Normal Attack effects in various ways before unleashing these devastating attacks on you. ｜ 「虽然我只是通读了此牌的规则，但是用以应对牌局应当无碍…」。\n【提示】重云的牌组擅长以各种方式增强「普通攻击」的效果，然后通过「普通攻击」来发起猛烈的攻势。
- What would you like to know? You're here to assess me, so ask away and I'll answer your questions to the best of my ability. ｜ 不知两位想问些什么？既然是考察，我会在我能力范围内予以回答。
- 1-Hit DMG|{param1:F1P} ｜ 一段伤害|{param1:F1P}
- Ningguang's attitude to making money is largely the same as anyone else's: You can never have enough.\nBut money to her is more than just a sign of wealth — each Mora is a trophy of a hard-won victory.\nNingguang is kind and friendly toward the common folk, but this is a side of her that none of her business associates could ever hope to see.\nTo her, the business world is a playground, and the zero-sum games are the most exciting. Each round she wins against a wealthy merchant brings a gleeful smile to her face as they sigh and reluctantly hand over the Mora, and nothing makes her happier than seeing the guilds bow to her wishes.\nEvery victory in this game adds to the wealth of the Liyue Qixing. Liyue Harbor prospers as a result, and this in turn creates more business opportunities and more profit for Ningguang. Every member of the Liyue Qixing is more than happy with this perfect cycle of interlocking interests.\nPeople often ask Ningguang why she is still doing business in Liyue Harbor when she has already acquired such vast wealth.\n"Vast wealth is a wonderful thing."\nNingguang patiently replies, never able to understand why people would ask such foolish questions.\n"Adding another Mora to the pot can hardly make it any less wonderful, now, can it?" ｜ 在赚钱这件事上，凝光与大部分人一样，永远不嫌钱多。\n她所挣得的钱，不仅能作为财富，更能作为一场又一场胜利的标志。\n凝光对民众温柔可亲，对同行则是迥异的态度。\n商场角力是她无可替代的刺激游戏，每位巨商大贾无奈让出的摩拉，都会让凝光脸上笑容更多一分。而商会任她自由调控的场面，则会让她每天都心情愉悦。\n一场又一场胜利后，「璃月七星」财力越发雄厚，整座璃月港也蒸蒸日上，将更多商机与财富带给凝光。利益环环相扣，形成完美闭环，对于这根链条，「璃月七星」都十分满意。\n常有人问，凝光万贯家财，为何还从商不辍？\n「万贯家财？那自然好。」\n面对如此奇怪的问题，凝光深感诧异。\n「可是，再多赚一摩拉，又有什么不好？」
- And as for Finch... I have no right to ask this of you, but please encourage him to leave this place also. ｜ 还有芬奇先生…虽然我没有资格这么说，还是请你劝劝他吧。

- Prince Thelxie unleashes a Gyre attack once every 5s (3 times total), dealing Hydro DMG to opponents hit.\nWhen the Gyre attack is released, all characters in the party within the area of effect recover HP equivalent to 25% of that character's max HP, and gain 300 increased Elemental Mastery for 15s. ｜ 「特尔克西」王子释放每5秒1次，总计3次的环流冲击，对命中的敌人造成水元素伤害。\n环流冲击释放时，处于影响范围内的队伍中所有角色将恢复生命值，回复量相当于该角色生命值上限的25%，并提升300点元素精通，此效果持续15秒。

- Lanoire is what made time flow for me. Watching her grow reminded me that time still passes, and life is still being born, shining brilliantly, and then being extinguished. ｜ 而让我的时间流逝的就是莉诺尔。看见她的成长，才让我意识到时间还在流逝。生命还在诞生，发出光芒，然后熄灭。

- "Tales of Humanity":\nThis is my first time writing in to The Steambird. I'm looking for someone who can provide my sailors with regular deliveries of salt.\nWe often spend longer at sea than we do on the land.\nEvery time we come ashore to resupply, we're extremely pressed for time. In light of this, I'm looking for someone who can guarantee a regular supply of <color=#3399CC>salt</color> to improve the lives of my crew.\nIf you're interested, please contact Captain Galathee directly. ｜ 「人间百态」：\n这是我第一次尝试给《蒸汽鸟报》投稿，我想寻找一位能定期给我的船员运送食盐的合作伙伴。\n对我们这些人来说，在船上待着的时候往往多于在陆地上待着的时候。\n每次上岸补充给养的时间都很紧张，我想从<color=#3399CC>盐</color>开始，找一批能稳定供应生活必需品的合作伙伴改善船员们的生活。\n有人乐意和我们合作的话，请直接联络伽拉蒂雅船长。

- A small lizard with horns on its head that can often be found in shadowy bushes.\nThese lizards have beautiful blue scales and will break their tails off to escape when caught.\nLizard tails have special medicinal properties when dried and ground down into a powder. Some crazy alchemists have even found a way to process them into catalysts for explosions.\nOnce they are separated from the body, these tails will lose their vitality and curl up. They will, for reasons unknown, also turn bright green. \nThe lizards' severed tails grow back faster in the Realm Within thanks to the hospitable conditions within the Serenitea Pot. ｜ 头上生有尖角的小蜥蜴，时常出没在阴影遮盖的草丛中。\n拥有漂亮蓝色鳞片的角蜥，在被捉住时会断尾逃生。\n蜥蜴尾巴在风干磨成粉后有特殊的药用功效，一些疯狂的炼金术士甚至开发出了将之加工成爆炸物催化剂的技术。\n脱离了身体后的尾巴会在一段时间后失去生命力，蜷曲起来，并且出于不明原因，变成明亮的绿色。\n得益于壶中洞天舒适的生活环境，这些蜥蜴断掉的尾巴会以比外界更快的速度生长出来。

- Performs an upward thrust that deals <color=#99FFFFFF>Cryo DMG</color> and causes Freminet to enter Pers Timer for 10s.\nWhile Pers Timer is active, his Elemental Skill will turn into Shattering Pressure.\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>Shattering Pressure</color>\nExecutes different sorts of attacks based on the Pressure Level of Pers Timer, and then cancels Pers Timer.\n·Level 0: Unleashes a vertical cut, dealing <color=#99FFFFFF>Cryo DMG</color>.\n·Levels 1 to 3: Unleashes a vertical cut alongside Pers, dealing <color=#99FFFFFF>Cryo DMG</color> and Physical DMG. DMG dealt scales based on Pressure Level.\n·Level 4: Borrows the power of a fully-pressurized Pers to deal Physical DMG. Meanwhile, Normal Attack: Flowing Eddies will be replaced by Shattering Pressure.\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>Pers Timer</color>\nWhen Freminet uses Normal Attacks, he will also unleash waves of frost that deal <color=#99FFFFFF>Cryo DMG</color> and increase Pers's Pressure Level.\nThe accompanying <color=#99FFFFFF>Cryo DMG</color> dealt this way is considered Elemental Skill DMG.\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>Arkhe: Pneuma</color>\nAt certain intervals, after using the upward thrust, a Spiritbreath Thorn in the form of another upward thrust will be created, dealing Pneuma-aligned <color=#99FFFFFF>Cryo DMG</color>.\n\n<i>To immobilize one's opponent without taking their life can also be considered something of a "survival" strategy that one may choose.</i>\n<i>"Pers... I leave the rest to you."</i> ｜ 进行上挑攻击，造成<color=#99FFFFFF>冰元素伤害</color>，并进入持续10秒的佩伊刻计状态。\n处于佩伊刻计状态下时，元素战技将转为高压粉碎。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>高压粉碎</color>\n依据佩伊刻计的压力阶级进行不同的攻击，并移除佩伊刻计状态：\n·零阶时：进行纵斩，造成<color=#99FFFFFF>冰元素伤害</color>；\n·一阶至三阶时：进行纵斩并协同佩伊，造成<color=#99FFFFFF>冰元素伤害</color>与物理伤害。伤害依据压力阶级有所不同；\n·四阶时：借助充满压力的佩伊的力量，造成物理伤害。此时「普通攻击·洑流剑」将被替换为高压粉碎。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>佩伊刻计</color>\n菲米尼进行普通攻击时，将同时释放霜寒造成<color=#99FFFFFF>冰元素伤害</color>，并为佩伊刻计提升压力阶级。\n同时造成的<color=#99FFFFFF>冰元素伤害</color>视为元素战技伤害。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>始基力：芒性</color>\n每隔一段时间，进行上挑攻击后，将形成进行挑击的灵息之刺，造成具有芒性的<color=#99FFFFFF>冰元素伤害</color>。\n\n<i>阻滞对手的行动，而非夺去对手的性命。从某种意义上来说，这也是为了「生存」而选择的战略。</i>\n<i>「佩伊…接下来就拜托你了。」</i>

- This is the form that the puppet that inherited the Raiden Shogun's authority takes when she is opposing those who threaten Eternity.\nAs the Raiden Shogun's assistant in pursuing eternity, she has never doubted, never felt fear, never given anything less than her best, never been disturbed by idle thoughts.\nShe once heard about how Ei had shouldered a similar duty when Makoto was also present, suffering much agonizing loss in the process.\nWhen the two shadows overlapped once more, however, she could only see the countless fine fractures in what should have been "her" eternal will. Since fate is destined for cyclicality, she must fulfill her promise and declare war on "her."\n\n<i>Mine is the most supreme and noble form. Power over the realm has been vested within me, and I am the essence of all that is the "Raiden Shogun."</i>\n<i>"Naturally, I have also inherited the pain of Ei's countless losses and her will to attain Eternity.</i>\n<i>"Resolve, valor, love, hate... They will all twist in the river of time.</i>\n<i>"But the 'rules' will never change."</i> ｜ 代行雷电将军权能的人偶，在对抗威胁「永恒」之敌时展现出的形态。\n作为雷电影践行「永恒」的协助者，她从未质疑，亦无畏惧，一直以来全力以赴，心无杂念。\n她曾听闻在真与影的时代，影承担着与她类似的责任，经历了诸多惨痛失去。\n当两个影子交叠为一时，她却只能看见在「她」本应永恒的意志上留下的无数细密的凿痕吧。既然命运注定是一场轮回，就如约定那样，向其宣战吧。\n\n<i>「此身，象征无上威严，被授予统领一国之权，凝聚了『雷电将军』的一切。</i>\n<i>「自然也继承了影前行时不断失去的痛苦，以及，想要抵达永恒的决心。</i>\n<i>「决心、勇气、爱慕、仇恨…都会在时间长河中变质扭曲。</i>\n<i>「唯有『法则』永恒不变。」</i>
