- The Traveler is right. You once investigated that underwater Sinthe base, and recovered items belonging to the victims. ｜ 对，你们曾经在水下，找回了「少女连环失踪案」受害者们的遗物。
- I'll leave you alone... ｜ 再见，不打扰了…
- No, I just thought it would take too much effort. ｜ 不，只是我觉得太麻烦了。

- Rawr! ｜ 呀！

- "I once undertook a commission to 'persuade a dangerous warrior.' When I found him, he happened to be playing this card game. I picked up a few tricks from watching him — enough to defeat him and walk away with my payment in full..."\nHint: Kinich's deck centers on using Techniques and is geared towards triggering Burning reactions. He can obtain many buffs by triggering Burning reactions and using Techniques. ｜ 「我接受过一项委托，『说服某位危险的战士』，结果找到他时，他正好在玩这种卡牌游戏，于是我现场学了几招，打败了他，拿到了全额佣金…」\n【提示】基尼奇的牌组以「特技」为核心，并且擅长触发「燃烧反应」，在触发「燃烧反应」和「特技」后会获得诸多强化。
- But that's not necessarily a bad thing, huh? It's annoying with too many little kiddos around, and I'm not a kid anymore... I mean, adults should look after themselves and make their own fun, right? ｜ 不过这也不一定是坏事，对吧？小孩子太多了就是麻烦，我早就不是小孩子了…大人就应该自己照顾自己，和自己玩才对。
- Luckily, her standards were really low! Just sitting in a quiet place stargazing was enough. Her other request was to have a closed, secluded environment to rest in. ｜ 好在她的要求非常低！只是坐在安静的地方看星星，就让她心满意足了。除此之外，她只要求了一个封闭、幽静的休息环境。
- Uncle Yongzan says that he doesn't have the personnel to spare for this delivery right now. So, what do you think, Uncle Zhigui? Should I go ahead and deliver it instead? ｜ 知贵叔，永赞伯说最近腾不出人手送件了。干脆我去送到人家家里吧？

It's fine, unraveling the mystery and undoing the seal should be a piece of cake. ｜ 借由兰罗摩的「很用力很用力打」，「死域瘤」终于被破坏了，但兰罗摩似乎也因此失去了一些记忆。不过没有关系。解开谜团、解开封印应当不是什么难事。

- "Inu Shoushou"? ｜ 犬少将？
- I've got it! I know which one to pick... But, there's still something I'd like to ask of you, Traveler. ｜ 嗯，好！我知道选哪里了…旅行者，我还想请你再帮我一个小忙。
- Season's Greetings ｜ 白色的季节
- Mondstadt seems like the better choice for our first destination... Let's go to Windrise! The terrain is more even, and it's close to the city. ｜ 果然还是先去蒙德比较好吧…那就去风起地吧！周遭地势比较平坦，离蒙德城也很近呢。
- In a... "attempt"... to end human prejudice toward the oni, I had the gang use a Kamera to take a picture of me showing my softer side and stick it to the Message Board in Inazuma City. Next thing we know, some jerks have graffitied all over it! Tsk! Then, some ashigaru blockheads from the Tenryou Commission accused me of disrupting the peace, next it was the Yashiro Commission, complaining it ruined the atmosphere in the area, and finally, even the Kanjou Commission got involved — they sent some lackeys over demanding advertising tax! Ugh, they have no idea who the bad guys are here! ｜ 为了消除人类对鬼族的偏见，有次我让弟兄们把我温柔和蔼的形象用留影机拍成画片，贴在稻妻城的留言板上。欸，结果有些人竟敢在画片上乱涂乱画！更可恨的是，天领奉行的蠢货足轻说我引起社会治安恐慌，社奉行又说什么败坏风气，连勘定奉行的走狗都要来要什么广告营业税…嘶…真是不识好歹！

- Why did he only go after Lynette? ｜ 为什么他只抓琳妮特？

- Mrrooo... ｜ 唔…

- "I've also heard them say something like 'the more important the research, the more you need to do it in hidden, out-of-the-way places like this.' They're not planning on selling Sinthe, are they?" ｜ 「我也听到了类似『越是重要的研究，越是要在这种隐秘的地方』这种话。这两个人该不会是卖『乐斯』的吧？」
- Also, I'm no pet, I'm Ifa's colleague! Be a good bro, and call me Dr. Cacucu. ｜ 我可不是伊法的宠物哦？我是他同事！叫我咔库库医生，哥们。
- Please don't take it the wrong way — I was sent down here a long time ago. I barely know anything about what's happening on the surface save for the news we get through our supply lines. ｜ 无意冒犯，不过我们很早就调来这里了。除了从补给线传下来的消息之外，我们对地面上的新闻几乎一无所知…

- Sorry, but I still need to check on our weapon readiness. If this isn't important, then don't bother me. ｜ 抱歉，我等下还要查看武器的整备情况，不是重要的事情就不要打扰我了。

- According to Intrepid Valberry, he had been to the scene of the crime before, but when he arrived, Sir Arthur was already missing. As an act of retaliation, he took out a dinner knife and stuck it there to say "Now this is a warning for them!" In addition, he saw a "smelly drunk, as foul as Rocher." ｜ 据勇猛落落莓称，他曾到过案发现场，但在他到达时，亚瑟先生就已经消失了。为了报复，他插下了一把「这下可以好好警告他们了吧」的餐刀。此外，他还看见现场躺着一位「臭得不行，跟罗谢一样的醉鬼」。

- What a bunch of ignorant fools! They claim to worship King Deshret, and yet they randomly throw such important relics around! Inexcusable! ｜ 一帮有眼无珠的家伙，嘴上说着信仰赤王，却把重要的留存随便乱放…简直…不可原谅…
- The usually peaceful Mondstadt was suddenly assailed by a dragon. This is the Stormterror that Amber spoke of, and was the gigantic creature that you encountered in the forest earlier. ｜ 本该宁静祥和的蒙德城中，巨龙突然来袭。它正是安柏提到的风魔龙，亦是你们先前在林中遇见的巨兽。

- Some scoundrels are plotting ill, threatening the safety of the surrounding area. If you can sneak into their encampment and filch their supplies, you are sure to greatly reduce their strength. ｜ 一群不怀好意的家伙出现在野外，威胁着周边区域的安全。如果能潜入营地，取走他们的物资，想必就能大大削弱他们的力量。

Worry not. Should any danger arise, I shall dispose of it. ｜ 无须行礼，此身虽然尊贵殊胜，不过此般前来，是想要做些微服游历民间的事。我看上了你的身手，现在你就是我的御侧保镖了。不用担心，遇到危险，我会出手的。

- A traditional dish of Fontaine. The foie gras only needs to be pan-fried before being served. Thanks to the masterful temperature control, the golden-brown foie gras tastes enticingly tender. The process takes focus and concentration, or else the delicious liver might be liquefied into an oily mess. ｜ 枫丹的传统菜肴。将肥肝简单煎熟后，就能摆盘上菜。表面焦黄，里内绵软，此般美味皆来源于对火候的精准把控。因此制作时需全神贯注，否则一不留神肥肝就可能变成一锅油了。
- #Did you find him, {NICKNAME}? ...Seriously, how are you always able to stumble upon such peculiar events... ｜ #{NICKNAME}，这人是你找回来的？你怎么总能碰到神奇的事啊…

### Part 119

- It's really easy to get stranded in the rivers here, so it's no place for large ships. You'll see them in Yilong Wharf and Liyue Harbor, though. ｜ 哈哈，这里的河道容易搁浅，自然不会有巨舰航行，但遗珑埠和璃月港里都有啊！

- Help Needed:\n<color=#3399CC>The Kairagi are skulking about on the island</color> and making trouble. These brigands are a stain on the name of the samurai.\nYet I, being duty-bound, cannot go out to strike them down. - Then please stand well back, where it is safe. Now... it is time for me to honor my word. ｜ 那么请您退到安全的地方，并保护好自身安全。接下来…是我实现承诺的时候了。
- To me, the Tanit might just be that home. ｜ 塔尼特就是这样的家吧，对我来说。
- ??? ｜ ？？？
- I'm sorry. My father really isn't a bad guy, believe me. ｜ 抱歉啦，老爹他其实没恶意的，你们就相信我吧。
- For now, why don't you go and chat with Yoriki Owada over there? He worked on this case too back in the day. ｜ 这段时间，你要不先去和那边的大和田与力聊聊吧？他是当年案件的亲历者。
- "It's right in <color=#37FFFF>the center of the island</color>. If the water recedes sometime, or if someone gets in from outside, we'll just have to get them to find it for us." ｜ 「传家宝留在了<color=#37FFFF>岛屿中央</color>，如果以后水能褪去，或是有人能从外面进来，就让他们去找吧。」
- Other than Narzissenkreuz, whom I used to call Master. Regardless, he deserved to be called a Grandmaster. ｜ 除了纳齐森科鲁兹…过去我也曾将他称作「主人」，不管怎么说，他的确能够被称为「大师」。

- The character to which this is attached <color=#FFFFFFFF>takes no DMG</color>.\nThis status will provide 2 instances of <color=#FFACFFFF>Electro Infusion</color> (Can be depleted using Elemental Reactions): Once the instances are depleted, this status will be removed, and the character to which this is attached will be <color=#FFFFFFFF>unable to use Skills</color> until the end of this Round. ｜ 所附属角色<color=#FFFFFFFF>免疫所有伤害</color>。\n此状态提供2次<color=#FFACFFFF>雷元素附着</color>（可被元素反应消耗）：耗尽后移除此状态，并使所附属角色直到本回合结束前<color=#FFFFFFFF>无法使用技能</color>。
- Maybe the key's somewhere nearby? ｜ 说不定钥匙就在附近？
- I'm Qax, a traveling merchant. I was out fetching water today when I got separated from my Saurian companion, King Coconut. ｜ 我叫卡克斯，是个旅行商人，今天去附近打水时，我和我的龙伙伴「大椰子」短暂分开了一会儿。
- Oh, well that's good to hear. If that's the case, there's a burden off my chest. ｜ 哦哦，真是多亏了你们呢，这样的话我也就放心了。
- You all talk about her like she's some kind of huge deal, but she didn't even bother to reply to our letter! Seriously, even if she didn't want to come, she could at least let us know! ｜ 你们一个两个都把她说得很厉害，结果连封信都不乐意回，真是的，不来好歹也说一声嘛！

- It has been a while, Nara Avin. It really has been a while, yes? ｜ 好久不见，那菈艾文。好久不见了，对吗？

- And that's not why the two of you adventure and travel either, right? When I heard Miss Katheryne describe your adventures, I thought to myself... ｜ 你们也不是为了故事，而冒险旅行的吧？之前听凯瑟琳小姐描述了你们的冒险事迹以后，我就一直在想…

- A tall and sturdy weathervane that comes with a huge windmill and special tail. It is said to not only be able to accurately tell the windspeed of sea breezes but also accurately indicate wind direction. Often seen on the outskirts of Constellation Metropole.\nDue to the complexity and variability of sea breezes, almost every home outside of the Metropole has such a weathervane to better monitor real-time changes in the weather. They stand at attention at the door of every home, like soldiers ready to do battle at a moment's notice, earning them the nickname "Windcatcher Sentinels." ｜ 高大而坚固的风向标，配备了巨大的风车和专用尾翼，据说不仅能测量海风的风速，还能准确指示风向，可见于星轨王城的郊外。\n鉴于海风的复杂性和多变性，王城的郊外地区的每一户人家的门前，几乎都安装了这样的风向标，以便于实时监测天气变化。它们犹如随时准备迎战风暴的卫兵，坚定地矗立在各家的门口，因此它们也便有了「捕风卫兵」这个昵称。
- Rawr! ｜ 呀！
- Fortune Slip Box ｜ 「御神签箱」
- *yawn* Anyway, I'm beat and need a good nap now. Hopefully I won't need to demonstrate that again. ｜ 好累啊，而且好困，如果可以我不想再示范一遍了…
- *sigh* Paimon wishes so too. Guess he won't make it this time. ｜ 唔…虽然我也这么想，但他应该不会来吧。

- Xiangming ｜ 向明
- Increases all party members' CRIT Rate by 15% for 300s. In Co-Op Mode, this effect only applies to your own character(s). ｜ 队伍中所有角色暴击率提升15%，持续300秒。多人游戏时，仅对自己的角色生效。

- Although I miss my parents, if I go back now, I'm afraid I won't be able to leave anymore. ｜ 虽然我惦念父母，但如今我一旦回去，恐怕就再也没办法离开了。
- I should have known. You really do have a talent for alchemy. ｜ 你果然很有炼金术的天赋。
- So... You've also come to the Scions of the Canopy's territory... Some pretty nice views around here, wouldn't you say? ｜ 好啊…你们也来到了「悬木人」的领地…这附近的景色还不错吧？

- It's just... Would a painting be too odd of a thank-you gift to give? ｜ 只是…用画作为谢礼，会不会显得有些奇怪呢？
- Well, it's been many years since this Lantern last lit up! You can't blame me for thinking that one of the old friends from my youth may have decided to catch up again... ｜ 毕竟这盏灯已经很多年没有亮起过了，人家一度以为是少女时代的好朋友发来的联络嘛…

- Stop talking like a child. The Akademiya might control the path to academic publication, but they don't have a monopoly on knowledge itself. ｜ 别再说这种孩子气的话了，学术发表的途径虽然是教令院所掌控的，但知识可不是。

Too bad for her, though... despite preparing all those questions, I never answered a single one. ｜ 呃…我后来也被她抓着采访过几次。明明被林尼拒绝了那么多次，真是毅力可嘉…可惜她准备了这么多问题，我一个也没回答。
- I dunno why, but somehow I'm struggling to get all this down... Maybe because I skipped the appetizer? It's like this dish is a battlefield, and the hero has to fight their way through to the end... Yeah, that's it — this is the taste of war! Alright, jaws of victory, going in! ｜ 吃起来没有那么顺口…是因为我没吃别的开胃菜吗？我能感觉到，这道菜里有一种…英雄战斗时的波折？对，「战场的味道」，好厉害！我要认认真真地吃！

- Perhaps this is their fate? ｜ 难道这就是他们的命运吗？
- Hey, everything's gonna be okay. So, we need to fix the big wheel up there, and to do that we need to find the missing parts. ｜ 呃，没有关系啦。所以要修好上面那个大轮子，就要找到所有的零件。
- Triggers a spray of intense flames that rush at nearby opponents, dealing <color=#FF9999FF>AoE Pyro DMG</color>, granting Yanfei the maximum number of Scarlet Seals, and applying Brilliance to her.\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>Brilliance</color>\nHas the following effects:\n·Grants Yanfei a Scarlet Seal at fixed intervals.\n·Increases the DMG dealt by her Charged Attacks.\nThe effects of Brilliance will end if Yanfei leaves the field or falls in battle.\n\n<i>"Here are the full terms for this matter of life and death — by which I mean my life and your death!"</i> ｜ 引发喷薄爆发的烈火，冲击周围的敌人，造成<color=#FF9999FF>火元素范围伤害</color>，并为烟绯自己赋予最大数量的丹火印与灼灼效果。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>灼灼</color>\n具有如下效果：\n·每间隔一段时间，为烟绯赋予一枚丹火印；\n·提高重击造成的伤害。\n灼灼效果会在烟绯退场与倒下时移除。\n\n<i>「条款齐备，依此立下生死之契。当然，是你死我生啦！」</i>
- ... ｜ ……
- Huh... All the Fatui left in Natlan are probably The Captain's subordinates. That basically makes them followers of one of Natlan's heroes. ｜ 哦…现在还留在纳塔的愚人众应该都是「队长」的部下吧？严格来说，他们也算是一位纳塔英雄的追随者呢。
- My lady, Traveler, found ya. ｜ 小姐，旅行者，你们在这儿啊。
- Since the Yashiro Commission presides over cultural and ceremonial affairs, it closely involves us, too. ｜ 而社奉行向来负责把控稻妻的仪礼与文化，此事也与我们有关。
- In a single attempt, deplete the HP bar of a boss in the second half {param2} times ｜ 单次挑战中击穿下半场强敌生命值{param2}次
- Ivanovich is getting ideas about what business might be done regarding those fallen meteorites... ｜ 对于那些从天而降的陨石，伊凡诺维奇似乎有了些新的生意点子…

- Achieve victory within 5 Rounds ｜ 5回合内胜利
- Must you really go deep into such dangerous places? ｜ 你一定要深入这样危险的地方吗？
- <color=#D3BC8EFF>Arena Effect</color>\nNormal and Charged Attack ATK SPD increased by <color=#FFCC33>25%</color>. Charged Attack Stamina consumption decreased by <color=#FFCC33>50%</color>.\nDefeating an opponent with a Charged Attack increases DMG dealt by Charged Attacks for your own party members by <color=#FFCC33>50%</color>, max <color=#FFCC33>8</color> stacks.\nAfter reaching <color=#FFCC33>8</color> stacks, any further Charged Attacks that defeat opponents will release a shockwave, dealing AoE DMG.\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Challenged Opponents</color> ｜ <color=#D3BC8EFF>【关卡效果】</color>\n角色普通攻击与重击的攻击速度提升<color=#FFCC33>25</color>%，重击消耗的体力降低<color=#FFCC33>50</color>%。\n角色通过重击造成的伤害击败敌人后，使队伍中自己的角色造成的重击伤害提升<color=#FFCC33>50</color>%，至多叠加<color=#FFCC33>8</color>次。\n当叠加至<color=#FFCC33>8</color>层后，角色通过重击造成的伤害击败敌人时，将释放冲击波，造成范围伤害。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【挑战敌人】</color>
- Guess that means your Onikabuto... is now my Onikabuto! Hahahahaha! ｜ 你的鬼兜虫，我就不客气地收下了！哈哈哈哈！
- Has something similar happened before? ｜ 曾经发生过什么吗？
- 1 Photo-Taking Point ｜ 1个留影点

- A particularly powerful Ruin Drake has been sighted out in the wild, threatening the safety of the surrounding areas. Destroy it and eliminate this threat. ｜ 一只格外强大的遗迹龙兽出现在野外，威胁着周边区域的安全，前去将其消灭，清除这股威胁。
- Knock on the door ｜ 敲敲门
- It's close to the time that Ilyas had given, so we've decided to head to the tavern and investigate any suspicious persons. ｜ 距离伊利亚斯提供的交易时间很近了，我们决定立刻赶往酒馆，搜查可疑人员。
- Mine own creation... Helios! When it was finished, its light spread from horizon to horizon, and thus were the people spared from the dragon-scourge! ｜ 此乃吾亲手所造…赫利俄斯造成之日，万丈光芒自高天笼罩，如是众人不受龙兽侵扰。
- Close your eyes... ｜ 闭上眼睛…
- No, that's terrible! That would really look like we didn't try! ｜ 一点也不好！这样听起来更敷衍了啦！
- I'm fairly certain you took his Mora and got your stories straight so that when someone comes to check, his paper would seem more credible. ｜ 而你们，一定是收了他的报酬，和他串通说辞，等有人来调查的时候提起，就可以增加论文可信度。

- ...Would you like to rest with me? ｜ …你要一起来吗？
- Huh, a door? Hmm, wonder where it could lead... ｜ 这好像是通往什么地方的门？
- Nothing special. ｜ 没发现什么特别的。
- Oh, right! I... I managed to work up the courage to thank Miss Clorinde in person! ｜ 对了！我…我鼓足勇气跟克洛琳德小姐道过谢了！
- Maybe you'll find something that catches your eye. ｜ 说不定会发现你感兴趣的东西。
- Wow... Hey, Yaoyao, can you take care of Paimon too? Paimon's getting hungry again! ｜ 哇…瑶瑶也来照顾我好不好？我肚子又饿了！
- Oh? Are you using materials you can't get in Fontaine? ｜ 有什么布料是枫丹买不到的吗？
- Current Check Bonuses ｜ 当前检定加成
- No progress, huh... We've been here for quite a while now. If we don't make some headway soon, we should probably ask the Guild for additional help. ｜ 没进展啊…我们在这里也待了这么长时间了，要是再没有进展，我们就回协会去求援吧。
- An everyday Inazuman dish. The egg roll was not beaten evenly and the vinegared rice was also over-seasoned... Even simple dishes leave no room for carelessness. ｜ 稻妻的家常料理之一。制作鸟蛋烧时没有搅拌均匀，醋饭的调味也稍显过头…看来再简单的料理也不能掉以轻心。
- Uh, alright, Paimon will bite — do you also need us to salvage the other two stations? ｜ 呃，我姑且先问一句，剩下两处，不会也要让我们打捞吧？
- Kaveh decides to put aside his mother's notebook for now. You agree to take a walk around with him. ｜ 卡维决定暂时不把精力花在破解密码本上。与他一起到处走走吧。
- ... ｜ ……
- Member of Ayn Al-Ahmar ｜ 「阿赫玛尔之眼」成员
- Whoa... ｜ 哇…
- Yeah, that's right... Uh, what was that, Coco? ｜ 对，没错…欸，绿宝你在说什么？
- But in truth, inspiration has already visited us and left its mark inside our heads without us ever knowing. ｜ 但实际上，在我们不自觉的情况下，灵感其实已经悄悄在我们的头脑中累积。
- Exquisitely-made souvenir tickets meant to memorialize participation in the various events related to the Fontinalia Film Festival. These tickets are said to be made to have a similar texture to film slides. Crystal-clear when reflecting light, they resemble nothing so much as thin gem fragments...\nUse these to unlock various rewards during the "Roses and Muskets" event. ｜ 做工精致的纪念票券，是在「千灵映影节」期间参与庆典的各项活动所获得的纪念品。据说这种票券采用了独特的制作工艺，有着与映影画片相似的质感，映照灯光时晶莹剔透，就如宝石的薄片…\n在「蔷薇与铳枪」期间，可以解锁多种奖励。
- Oh, a Fire Tower! And an unoccupied one, from the looks of it. ｜ 找到圣火台了。暂时好像没人靠近这里。
- Speaking of which, have you found a partner yet? Would you like to pair up with me? ｜ 你们找好搭档了吗？要不要和我组队试试？
- Sorry, I'm a bit busy. ｜ 不好意思，现在很忙。
- That's right. A vote is necessary when opinions differ. Making arbitrary demands won't cut it. This is also how the world works, Blanche. ｜ 嗯，意见不一时要投票才能做决定，而不是随便提出要求。小布兰奇，这也是世界运行的秩序。

- Hibiki will be so happy when she returns. ｜ 等阿响回来的时候，她一定会很高兴的。
- Anyway, here's the bait. Take it to Roialte — and remind him to stay safe while you're at it. ｜ 这是鱼饵，你拿去给洛耶茨吧，顺便让他注意点安全。
- Bitter Belligerence - Basic ｜ 烈性战意·低阶
- Like... ｜ 嗯…嗯……
- C'mon, that's why we told you not to move about! ｜ 所以说，都叫你不要动啦！
- Don't worry about me, I can look after myself! ｜ 别担心，我很强的！
- From that day on, I never ventured out again. This life was given to me by that adeptus. I can't just throw it away that easily. ｜ 自那之后我就不再冒险了。这条命可以说是仙人赐给我的，可不能那么轻易就丢了。
- Don't mind him, Cuistot is always this way. Just play nice and say something to massage his ego. ｜ 库斯图就是这样的啦，说句好听的哄哄他就行了。
- R—right. Ab—abo—about the c—caravan. How did y—your investigation... go? ｜ 对、对了，关、关、关、关于商队的事情…你们调查得如何了？
- "Thank you for your invitation, Madam Faruzan. I've given this a lot of thought, and in the end, I think I'm gonna focus on Kshahrewar!" — Earnest Letter-Writer ｜ 言辞诚恳的来信：「珐露珊前辈，首先感谢您的邀请…我考虑了很久，还是想往妙论派的方向努力！」
- There will be special commissions in which you will have to go and perform an on-site investigation personally, owing to a lack of good intel. Once you've completed such missions, I will continue to organize the dispatches. ｜ 其中会有一项比较特殊的委托，由于协会收集的信息不足，需要麻烦你先去现场调查，完成后再由我来安排派遣事宜。
- This sword can pass on my spirit! ｜ 这把剑可以传递我的气势！
- Oh, no, no, have a nice day. ｜ 没有没有，打扰了。
- Whose is this kitty? ｜ 关于这猫…
- What Akademiya? This is all because you don't like Zubayr Theater. You're just using the Akademiya's name to threaten us! ｜ 说什么教令院，只是因为你自己不喜欢这个地方，所以一直借用教令院的权力威胁我们！

- Music Changed ｜ 已更改旋律
- ...! ｜ …！
- That's what outlanders always say. ｜ 哎呀，外国人总是这么说。
- Speaking of which, I'd like to ask... Is the Akademiya really aware that you've traversed through the desert to come here in the middle of the night? ｜ 说起来，我倒是想问问，你们风尘仆仆跑来沙漠，又大半夜地出现在这儿…唔，教令院真的知道吗？
- Golden Troupe's Reward ｜ 黄金剧团的奖赏
- Whew, what a relief... The Doctor sure pulled out some hidden cards, but good thing we had Nahida with us... ｜ 还好还好，「博士」这一招的确很出其不意，还好有纳西妲在…
- With an explosive comeback ten years in the making... Kaiulani of the People of the Springs! ｜ 时隔十年再次胜出，来自「流泉之众」的嘉乌兰妮选手。
- I'm not a fussy eater, but I really don't like banquets... The reason being, as the maid, I'm expected to sample every single dish on the table to ensure its quality. Just one bite of each, of course, but it all adds up... Oh, the guilt... ｜ 我不挑食！但有一种情况会让我比较头疼…宴会上的一大桌菜，作为女仆，每一道菜都必须自己先尝一尝。但这样一口接一口…唉，太罪恶了。
- Every time she comes to play with Qiqi, she complains about the taste of medicine and asks me if I have anything that isn't bitter. If the medicine will save someone's life, who cares how bitter it tastes, hmm? ｜ …这孩子每次来找七七玩耍时都要和我抱怨药苦，问我有没有不苦的药。治病救人的药，哪有不苦的呢？
- After being healed ｜ 受到治疗后
- I do long to know what treasures are buried here... ｜ 真想知道这里都埋了什么宝贝啊…
- Ugh... ugh... ｜ 呜…呜…
- So, it should be plain sailing. Well, just as long as we don't run into any extremely picky customers with unreasonably specific requests. ｜ 除非来位口味又挑剔，要求又严苛的客人，否则还真难不倒你…
- Huh!? Are you crazy!? ｜ 喂？！你疯了吧！
- Coya ｜ 柯娅
- Unfortunately, this place has now become the most dangerous of all. I don't know why this is happening or what to do about it. ｜ 很遗憾，现在这里变成了最危险的地方。我也不知道为什么会这样，应该怎么办了。
- Skill DMG|{param1:P} ｜ 技能伤害|{param1:P}
- You're absolutely right. How would I have faced my family if I had lost the 253rd ring my mother gave me? ｜ 没错没错，要是弄丢了我母亲送我的这第二百五十三个戒指，我都不知道怎么回家交待。
- There are too many who, like her, see adventure as some kind of noble pursuit, only to see their hopes shattered... and find that it is too late to regret their choices. ｜ 有太多不成熟的孩子，把冒险当做了不得的目标去追逐，最终却落得愿望破碎离散的下场…为此追悔莫及。
- ...So, a silver-haired guy in a long robe, cultured type with thoughtful eyes... And he's traveling alone. ｜ 穿着长袍，眼睛有神，气质文雅的白发老人…而且是单独行动。
- You bet we did, big time! You're in luck, Yoimiya — you'll be able to see the meteor shower from Sumeru! ｜ 有哦，很大的收获！我们运气很好，流星雨在须弥就可以看到！
- Domain of Mastery: Witticism IV ｜ 精通秘境：妙语 IV
- Maiden's Passing Youth ｜ 少女苦短的良辰
- I can barely believe that my photo-taking quest, which had eluded me no matter how hard I tried, was completed so quickly with your help... ｜ 我忙了那么久都没有完成的画面，在两位的帮助下居然这么快就能够拍摄完毕…
- That's fine with me, but I still have some work to finish up, and it's pretty urgent. How about I head back first and we can meet up again later once I'm done? ｜ 好是好，但我手头还有些工作没收尾，挺急的，我先去结束那边的事，再来跟你们会合怎么样？
- Why else would he have left without a farewell...? ｜ 才让他这样不告而别…
- Oh, good morning, Leeann. How have you been recently? ｜ 哟，这不是莉安吗。最近家里还好吗？
- Treasure Nicker ｜ 寻宝好手
- Not everything you write has to shock the world, right? ｜ 不必强求惊世骇俗…
- Declension Duration|{param5:F1}s ｜ 变格持续时间|{param5:F1}秒
- To come up with such a set of rules, the first Pyro Archon must have possessed a level of insight I can only imagine. ｜ 不得不感叹，初代火神究竟拥有怎样的洞见，才能创造出这样一套规则。

- Well... Is there any way Lynette could lie low until this blows over? ｜ 那能让琳妮特先避一避风头吗？
- Maximize your resources and try to use all your Elemental Dice each Round ｜ 合理分配资源，尽量每回合用完元素骰
- Certainly not! ｜ 还有别的事。
- Do you need me to lend you my glasses? I have the latest model, as produced by the Akademiya. ｜ 需要我把眼镜借给你吗？我这可是教令院配发的最新款式。
- "On an old classic" ｜ 「老的回忆！」
- ...Ugh! ｜ …呜！
- Congratulations! ｜ 恭喜你，客人。
- This feast is held in honor of each and every one of you gathered here today. I hope all of you get to relax and enjoy our hard-won victory. ｜ 这场庆功会是为在场的每个人准备的，希望大家好好享受这来之不易的胜利。
- Well... Since we are helping the ministry during a holiday, they're providing additional compensation for our efforts. ｜ 咳，这个…因为是在节日期间协助总务司勤务，所以总务司也拨给了我们一批特别款项。
- You discover a mysterious space while exploring the now-slightly-different Golden Apple Archipelago. This place seems intimately related to the quaint old bonsai that the Kaedehara Clan kept... ｜ 初探稍有不同的金苹果群岛时，意外发现的神秘空间，似乎与枫原家祖传的古朴盆景有着千丝万缕的联系…
- Muddy Dvalin Tear ｜ 浑浊的风龙泪滴
- #{NICKNAME}, Paimon... Could you both strike a pose? I'm going to start drawing. ｜ #{NICKNAME}，还有派蒙…请你们摆一下姿势吧，我要开始作画了。
- Most think it's just a dream, an illusion. A fantasy that people suffering due to the Abyss find solace in. ｜ 在人们看来，那或许只是个虚妄的梦，是饱受深渊之苦的人们所寄托的幻想。
- Cryo Hilichurl Shooter ｜ 冰箭丘丘人
- We'll leave soon. My apologies if we've disturbed your adventure. ｜ 我们很快就会撤离，如果阻碍了你的冒险，那么实属抱歉。
- This is not an order. All I need you to do is give me an explanation and take responsibility for the situation. ｜ 这不是命令，你们只需给我一个说法，然后为了这个说法，担负起所有责任。
- Take Crimson Staff with you and go nuts! ｜ 带上「赤红一杵」，尽管放手去打吧！
- Hope you'll have fun playing Genius Invokation TCG! ｜ #{NICKNAME}，希望你能感受到「七圣召唤」的乐趣！
- Rawr, Rrooh? Hrroo... ｜ 呜，呜？呜呜…
- Let's help her up first... ｜ 先把她扶起来吧…
- Tricolor File ｜ 三色档案
- Would you all be willing to come with me somewhere as we wait? ｜ 在等消息的时间里，你们愿意和我去个地方吗？
- Quest Item ｜ 任务道具
- Stop right there, Kaveh! ｜ 站住！卡维！
- A dated miniature hourglass that serves no practical purpose. It seems as elusive as time itself. ｜ 老旧的微型沙漏，不具有实用性。与岁月一样不可捉摸。
- A rather exquisite wine cup used in pre-combat rituals. ｜ 稍微有些精致的酒杯，是仅在武人上场前使用的仪式器具。
- A heavily armed ship of unknown origins has stopped outside Guyun Stone Forest. You hop right on board to investigate... ｜ 在孤云阁旁，停着一艘不知来历的庞大武装舰船，而你却冒冒失失地闯了进去…
- Xiao ｜ 魈
- So we're here in the end... ｜ 终于还是走到了今天这一步啊…
- Play all the melodies within the Ancient Autoharmonic Music Box ｜ 奏响「古老的自鸣音乐盒」中的所有乐章。
- High-end camping gear and a special record player model that Mualani has bought for this adventure. ｜ 玛拉妮为此次冒险购置的高档野营装备和型号特殊的唱片机。
- Could we have a look around? I think we can come up with some more leads. ｜ 我们四处看看可以吗，我觉得能找到更多的线索。
- 4-Hit DMG|{param4:P} ｜ 四段伤害|{param4:P}
- Why are you telling me this? ｜ 你为什么要告诉我？
- Leave it to us, Navia! Please stay safe, too! ｜ 交给我们吧，娜维娅你们也要小心啊！
- Ever considered upgrading the strength of the prototypes? ｜ 有考虑对试验机的强度进行升级吗？
- No, Paimon's just hungry. ｜ 不对啦，是我饿了。
- He looks very anxious. ｜ 他确实很着急。
- ... ｜ ……
- So this "Ifa" you just mentioned is actually— ｜ 这么说你刚刚提到的「伊法哥哥」，就是——
- Housekeeping? As a class? ｜ 家政…课堂？
- Has it sparked an interest in the business world for you? ｜ 让你燃起了对商业的兴趣吗？

- A type of bait based on flour mixed with the pulp and seeds of Bulle Fruit. When tossed into the water, it quickly spreads a sweet and sour fragrance that is irresistible to fishes such as Heartfeather Bass. A group of anglers once resorted to eating this bait in an emergency after they had run out of supplies, and were poisoned as a result. To prevent such accidents from happening again, this type of bait was made much sourer than it was before — so sour in fact that simply holding it up to their noses makes people feel dizzy and causes their eyes to stream, let alone putting it in their mouths...\n\nSuitable for catching Heartfeather Bass. ｜ 以小麦粉为基底的鱼饵，混入了泡泡桔的果肉和桔籽，投入水中后，酸甜的香味会迅速弥漫开来，有效吸引诸如心羽鲈之类的鱼儿。据说，曾有钓鱼佬在野外长期驻守时，耗尽了口粮，食用这类鱼饵应急，并不幸中毒…为防这类事故再次发生，此后制作的这类鱼饵大幅提升了酸度，以至于普通人将鱼饵凑近鼻子边，都会被刺激得头晕流泪，根本不可能将它放入口中…\n\n适用鱼种：心羽鲈类。

- Your characters gain an <color=#faeb8d>All Elemental DMG Bonus</color> of <color=#faeb8d>{0}%</color> ｜ 角色获得<color=#faeb8d>{0}%</color><color=#faeb8d>所有元素伤害加成</color>
- "Fontainians were originally Oceanids, and their bodies will dissolve in Primordial Seawater."\nThat great flood washed away the sins of all Fontainians and revealed the shocking truth at the same time. Of this matter, Sigewinne had a far greater understanding than most. After settling the inmates injured in the flood, she returned to the Fortress ahead of time and took out that letter, sealed securely in a bottle as it had been for hundreds of years.\n"I assume that if you're opening this letter, you've understood all those things I had doubts about, just as we agreed?"\n"No matter. I know I need not worry. You've always done as I said, trusting me unconditionally. As such, allow me to open with an apology. I lied to you, even at the end."\n"The strange illness I discovered manifests as the dissolution of the human body. All bodily tissues and structures will dissipate, leaving behind a liquid that appears as close to pure water as might seem possible. Even by using myself as an experimental subject and forcing myself into a fatal impasse, I could not find the answer to curing the disease in this liquid. All I gained was one meaningless discovery — that if you mixed this liquid with some specific ingredients, you will obtain a face-changing solution usable by Fontainians alone. With this solution, they can change their appearance into anything they desire."\n"I originally thought it useless... until you found me, and told me of your dilemma, of being unable to save your friend due to being a Melusine. It suddenly occurred to me that it might also have some effect on a Melusine constitution, and that this predicament I found myself at may yet have some purpose."\n"That is why I tricked you. The bottle on the table is not some sort of mysterious potion, but the final gift I can leave you after I have dissolved myself."\n"Just take it as a sort of medicine — after all, didn't I tell you that we had to be willing to resort to trickery to get children to drink theirs?"\nHaving finished reading the letter, Sigewinne returned to the place she had chosen to memorialize her teacher, now armed with the full truth.\nThere was no gravestone here, only an unremarkable water's edge. Sigewinne had never found her teacher's body, and so had set up a simple cenotaph for her. Hundreds of years later, the monument had in turn been swallowed up by the constantly rising waters.\nSigewinne did not begrudge her teacher that lie, for she could feel the "warmth" in it each time she touched her cheeks.\n"Thank you, Teacher."\nAnd she laid that letter upon the waters, and watched it drift far away. ｜ 「枫丹人原本都是纯水精灵，他们的身体会溶于原始胎海之水。」\n那场大洪水洗去了所有枫丹人背负的罪孽，也揭示了这个令人震惊的真相，而希格雯由此所理解的事实远比绝大多数枫丹人更多。安顿好在洪水中受伤的犯人之后，她提前返回了梅洛彼得堡，取出了那份已经在玻璃瓶中密封了数百年之久的信件。\n「所以，你是按照约定，在理解了当初令我疑惑的一切之后才拆开了这封信吧？」\n「也罢，我不用担心，你总是会按照我说的做，总是无条件地信任我。因此，我在这里向你致歉，最后我还是向你说了一个谎。」\n「我发现的那种怪病具体表现为人体的溶解，所有的身体组织都会消失，只能留下一种无限近似于纯水的液体。即便将自己作为实验对象，将自己逼入死局，我也没能从这种液体中找到治愈这种怪病的答案，只是得到了一个毫无意义的发现——将这种液体与一些特定的材料进行混合调制，就能得到一种枫丹人专用的易容药水。枫丹人借助这种药水，几乎可以变成任何他们想要变成的模样。」\n「我原本以为这个发现毫无意义，直到你找到了我，诉说你因为身为美露莘而无法救治朋友的困局。我忽然想到，美露莘的体质在某种程度上也能享受这种药水的效果，而我这段时间的困顿还是能拥有一些意义。」\n「所以我欺骗了你，留在桌子上的那瓶药水不是什么神奇的魔药，而是我在自己溶解后唯一能留给你的礼物。」\n「就把它也当作一种药吧，就像我教你的那样，哪怕耍些手段也要让孩子把药喝下去，不是吗？」\n读完这封信后，希格雯再次来到她祭奠老师的地方，带着已经被补全的真相。\n这里没有老师的墓碑，只是一处普通的水畔。希格雯当年没有找到老师的遗体，在确认她失踪后，只能为她建立一座衣冠冢。而数百年过去，那座衣冠冢也早已被不断上升的海水淹没。\n希格雯并没有抱怨老师的谎言，因为她每次用双手触摸脸颊，都能感受到这份「谎言」的温度。\n「谢谢你，老师。」\n希格雯将那封信放在水面上，看着它漂远。

- The Pure Electro Hypostasis is immune to Frozen, Stun, Petrification, and Electro DMG while persistently applied with Electro.\nThe Pure Electro Hypostasis possesses a Revival Prism: When the Pure Electro Hypostasis's HP would be expended, it will not be defeated but suffer Expose Weakness and undergo Energy Revival.\nWhile Expose Weakness is in effect, the Elemental Reaction DMG inflicted on the Pure Electro Hypostasis will expend the Prismatic Energy of the Revival Prism. After <color=#{0}>4 points of Prismatic Energy is expended</color>, the Pure Electro Hypostasis will be defeated.\nAfter the start of Energy Revival, the Pure Electro Hypostasis will need to complete three Actions before the revival culminates and Expose Weakness ends: At the same time, each point remaining of the Revival Prism's Prismatic Energy will heal the Pure Electro Hypostasis for 2 HP. ｜ 「至纯的无相之雷」免疫冻结、眩晕、石化和雷元素伤害，并且总是具有雷元素附着。\n「至纯的无相之雷」拥有「复苏棱镜」：生命值耗尽时不会被击倒，而是遭受「弱点暴露」并开始「蓄能复苏」。\n「弱点暴露」期间，对「至纯的无相之雷」造成元素反应伤害，即可消耗「复苏棱镜」的「棱镜能量」。耗尽<color=#{0}>4点「棱镜能量」</color>后，即可击倒「至纯的无相之雷」。\n「蓄能复苏」开始后，「至纯的无相之雷」行动3次后就会完成「蓄能复苏」并结束「弱点暴露」：此时，「复苏棱镜」每有1点「棱镜能量」剩余，就治疗「至纯的无相之雷」2点。

- Not necessarily. Though working in the production zone is the most reliable way to earn Credit Coupons, if you have other skills, you can skip your shifts to earn them in other ways. ｜ 不全是吧。去生产区工作是获得特许券最为稳定的途径，如果你有别的本事，也可以翘班。

- Goodbye. ｜ 再见。
- Tower of Abject Pride ｜ 有顶塔
- Could it be...? ｜ 难道…！
- It has been weakened. Let's go! ｜ 它很虚弱，我们上！
- A card for the tabletop game, Genius Invokation TCG. It is built tough, and some special printing method has been used for the illustration on the card's face, resulting in a truly exquisite appearance. ｜ 「七圣召唤」桌面游戏的卡牌，质地坚韧，其上作为牌面的插画不知道是用什么特殊的方式印刷，看上去十分精致。
- Alright, alright... Grandpa can't say no to you, can he... ｜ 哎，好…真是拿你这孩子没办法…
- Bringing everyone home was supposed to be a happy occasion. ｜ 回家明明是一件好事。
- Well, someone's being unnecessarily competitive... ｜ 这无缘无故的攀比之心…
- Wait, a kid? You're joking, right? ｜ 小朋友？居然真的是个孩子吗！
- Though the taste is acceptable, but a mistake in the making cost it its texture. ｜ 在错误的调制手法下，虽然味道尚能接受，但这杯啤酒的口感被大大折损了。
- A simple, humble fisherman's side dish. The overabundance of salt and rank smell of fish roll like a storm through your olfactory senses. Please keep your hands steady — please. ｜ 朴实无华的渔家小菜。过量的盐与鱼肉的腥气交杂着，仿佛风暴一般席卷了味蕾，下次可千万小心不要手抖呀…
- They were overly clever and overly proud... Just like us humans. I suppose that's why they came into conflict with us and became savage beasts. ｜ 它们过于聪明，又过于骄傲…就像我们一样，所以才会与人相争，沦为凶兽吧。
- Carrying out investigations isn't actually supposed to be our responsibility. Our job is to apprehend the perpetrators... finding them is really up to the Marechaussee Phantom. You could say I'm taking part in the investigation out of personal interest. ｜ 这不是特巡队的职责。我们的工作是捉拿凶手，找他们是逐影庭的工作。调查…算是我的一个私心。
- ...Just watching her stand there singing, or sing while walking around, or sing while sitting, and then sing while she lifts her hand, and slowly lets it fall, all the while ceaselessly singing... ｜ …就看她在台上站着唱，踱来踱去唱，坐下唱，然后把手一抬——又慢悠悠放下，絮絮叨叨地接着唱…

- Look, I'm a professional, and so are most of the people I serve. I can accommodate anything they ask for. Seems you two are amateurs, so I'm sorry, but you'll have to go someplace else. ｜ 我说的要啥有啥，那是指内行人要啥有啥。您二位这是外行啊，还是劳驾移步别家看看吧。
- What!? Paimon thought she was on to something there... ｜ 亏我还有理有据？！
- Yeah... Paimon doesn't think Jeht would do this either... But, what should we do now? ｜ 唔…我也相信婕德是不会做这种事的…不过，现在我们怎么办呀？
- Change our approach? ｜ 换一个思路？
- As for what you want to know... ｜ 至于你们想知道的答案么…
- #*sob*... Nara {NICKNAME} is making this too complicated. Arashakun just know that there is "courage" only when I have the "Talisman of Courage." ｜ #呜呜…那菈{NICKNAME}的话好复杂，兰沙恭只知道，「勇气护身符」在，兰沙恭就有「勇气」…
- A dish with strong and distinctive flavors. Chop up the sheep offal, mix it with oatmeal, and stuff the mixture into a sheep stomach along with various seasonings and spices to form a bag. When the dish is served, this stomach-bag is usually removed while the fillings are served with radish paste and mashed potatoes. This is a local specialty that Fontainians often cook as a treat for important guests. ｜ 风味浓郁的料理。将羊的内脏剁碎与燕麦一同塞入羊胃中，再加上各种调味香料，制成袋状，装盘时往往会去掉胃袋，仅取内容物和萝卜泥、土豆泥一并食用。是一道极具地方特色的佳肴，枫丹人常将其作为招待贵客的菜品。
- Ningguang... Ganyu... ｜ 凝光…甘雨…
- Once is an oversight, twice would be a grave error. I won't allow such things to happen again. ｜ 一次是意外，两次是失误。我不会允许这种事再次发生。
- I know, B. You've told me already. That sad story with the disappointing ending... It's what happened in the real world, isn't it? ｜ 我知道，B。你和我说过了，是个遗憾的故事。但那是在现实中发生的事，不是吗？
- "Heh, tell you what," they said. "We'll give you ten times your Mora back if the Iktomisaurus emerges the champ. If not, you can just stay in this cage, alright?" ｜ 「嘿，暝视龙要是能得冠军，我们把钱十倍还给你，不然你就在这个笼子里待着吧！」
- It's also true that her way of dealing with things can be a little... extreme sometimes. It's easy to use that to mislead people who don't know anything else about her. ｜ 而且她处理事情的方法…有时的确比较激进。不知道的人，很容易就会被误导。
- You shouldn't go near those meteorites. ｜ 绝不能接近陨石。
- Uncle Gao said that Zhiyi has low self-esteem... Seems he was right. ｜ 老高说知易骨子里很自卑，看来是真的。
- ...Oh. Hmm, you do have a point. ｜ …你，说得很有道理。
- Where should I even begin... The "Symphony" is human memory and persona woven into a melody through musical notation, creating a song in which human souls can dwell and have their wishes fulfilled. ｜ 该从哪里说起呢…将人的记忆、人格，以音符的形式编织为旋律，使人的灵魂能够安住其中，并为他们实现愿望，这便是「乐章」。
- "A Kamera is but a cold, unfeeling machine! The pictures it takes cannot be called art! True art requires thinking and soul!" ｜ 「留影机不过是个冷冰冰的机器，那个东西拍出来的画片才不能被说成是艺术！真正的艺术是要有思考与灵魂的！」
- About Linorea's fish fry... ｜ 关于莉诺蕾娅的鱼苗…

- So, have you had any ideas? ｜ 嗯？想到什么点子了吗？
- Wilting Feast ｜ 谢落的筵席
- Talk to Legba ｜ 与雷格巴对话
- This little book is truly exceptional. The gripping plot is one thing, but the characters, wow... they're so well rounded. They really break the mold. ｜ 这本小书着实有趣。且不说它的情节如何生动，就连人物也丝毫不落俗套。
- Amazing! It's just as good as Mister Wagner's smithy! You could fix anything here! ｜ 太棒了，完全不比瓦格纳先生的铁匠铺差嘛！无论什么装备都能修好！
- Well, what's next? ｜ 接下来呢？
- Alright, that's enough reflection for one day! No need to get all sentimental on us. ｜ 好啦，不要再感慨了！气氛都变得伤感起来啦。
- With the help of the guard, you successfully escape the dungeons. Your sense of despair and anxiety both seem to fade as you continue your quest. ｜ 在看守的协助下，你们成功逃离了地牢，将无助感与剧烈的心跳声远远甩在身后。
- So she won't forget to eat her lunch while she's on important missions. ｜ 防止她因为重要任务忘了吃中饭。
- You've shown such courage and kindness that I, Urubamba, would be honored to help you train for the Warrior's Challenge, completely free of charge! ｜ 像你这种又善良又有勇气的人，我乌鲁班巴愿意无偿帮助你进行「勇士挑战」训练！
- Energy Cost|{param3:I} ｜ 元素能量|{param3:I}
- I will pay special attention to your homework and guarantee that you will see improvement in your studies! But as for your tuition fee... some Windblume Festival-exclusive Applebloom Cider should do the trick. ｜ 你的作业我会重点批改，保证你学有所成！至于你的学费…我要风花节限定的苹果鲜花酒。
- Blood Blossom Duration|{param4:F1}s ｜ 血梅香持续时间|{param4:F1}秒
- In a nutshell, we test the load capacity of the ship using heavy objects. ｜ 简单来说，就是用重物来测试船的负载能力。
- I've known Gaming since we were kids! He was quite the neighborhood terror back then, haha. Hm? That doesn't sound like him? Well, he's matured a lot since then, just like I have. One thing hasn't changed, though — he still carries snacks with him wherever he goes. He always comes back from his travels with a ton of goodies to share with his friends. And, of course, he never leaves without stocking up on his hometown favorites... ｜ 我跟嘉明从小就认识，还记得他小时候是家喻户晓的淘气大魔王，现在完全看不出来？哈哈，也许这就是成长吧，我也跟小时候不太一样呢。但有一点他始终没变——就是走到哪总会带点好吃的在身上，每次回来都不会忘记给家乡朋友带些外地的点心。当然，更不会忘记打包一堆家乡小吃带走…
- A spirit that should have long ceased to exist is lurking in the shadows of the House of the Hearth. ｜ 一个早已不该存在的亡魂，游荡在壁炉之家的阴影中。
- Yes, my friend, precisely. ｜ 对，朋友，你说的没错。
- Offer the Delicious Mora Meat ｜ 供奉「美味的摩拉肉」
- #Just call me {NICKNAME}. ｜ #您好，叫我{NICKNAME}就好。
- Master Lu, we've just come to see you and ask you some questions. ｜ 路爷，我们此行是来找您问些事，顺带来探望您。
- Huh. Well, then, out of those with access to the Institute's technical assets and the capacity to commit such a crime, who do you believe it was exactly? Could it be possible that it was... ｜ 呃，您觉得有渠道接触院内技术资材、有能力犯下这种罪行的人，具体会是什么身份？有没有可能就是…
- Eh? Why are those Fungi all gathered over there? ... Wait, there's someone trapped over there! Come on, we've gotta save him! ｜ 欸？蕈兽为什么都聚在一起…哇！有人被困在那里了，快去救救他吧！
- Relax, I'm just joking. Baishi probably made arrangements yesterday to add a few extra dishes to the breakfast menu. ｜ 没关系，我开玩笑的。这些额外的菜式，应该是百识昨天提前安排的。
- I've read that the heroes of legend would also put their feet up around bonfires! ｜ 我在传说故事里看到过，大英雄也会在篝火旁歇歇脚。
- Tell me about wine making. ｜ 关于酿酒…
- When she thinks back on all her birthdays, will this be the most unforgettable? ｜ 当回想起一个又一个生日的时候，这会是她最难忘的那个吗？
- Dropped by Lv. 30+ Golden Wolflords ｜ 30级以上黄金王兽掉落

- "Like dew fallen, like fog swept away, are the joys and sorrows of life, come and gone like a dream." ｜ 「如露降临，如雾散灭，喜乐苦楚，皆梦中之梦。」
- Eek... Sorry about that, it just feels a little spooky around here. Am I thinking on it too much? ｜ 呜…抱歉，这附近总感觉有些恐怖，难道是我多心了吗…
- Huh? Well, I'll be! Paimon, Traveler, what are you two doing here!? ｜ 哎？旅行者和派蒙？你们居然也在稻妻？！
- After Sigewinne became Head Nurse, the fact that she looked like a human yet was actually a Melusine became an open secret, and the news spread even beyond the Fortress's walls.\nSome guessed that she might be a descendant of mixed human and Melusine blood, but any who discussed this possibility would receive a stern warning from the Marechaussee Phantom. Even Iudex Neuvillette would personally come out against such rumors, "with the intent to quash such inappropriate, discourteous canards."\nSome guessed that she might be wearing a special mask and gloves, postulating that this made it easier for her to blend in with humanity. But most quickly refuted this belief, for the time when humans had ostracized Melusines was now far behind them, and there was no need for Sigewinne to live in this way.\nNewspapers quickly seized upon the selling power of this public curiosity, and many reporters were dispatched to the Fortress to interview her.\n"Forgive me for asking, but might we know how you came to look the way you do?"\nThe reporters tactful approaches belied their urgency. Sigewinne, after giving the question some serious thought, began to tell a story woven from distant memories—\nIn the times when humans and Melusines did not yet trust one another, only one little girl was willing to make friends with a Melusine. Later, when she fell seriously ill, Sigewinne was the only doctor who was able to make it on time. But because she was a Melusine — and only because of that — the girl's parents did not allow Sigewinne to enter.\nTo save her friend, Sigewinne looked for a frightening witch and begged her to help. Having ascertained Sigewinne's resolve, the witch gave her a bottled potion of brewed sin. After using it, Sigewinne gained a human countenance, hands, and feet, and by so doing managed to save her friend.\nHaving listened to this story, the reporters glanced at each other.\n"Head Nurse, this is a fairy tale, isn't it?"\n"It's true, you know."\nThey looked into the Melusine's eyes, then back at each other. Each of them was among the elite of their profession, and they all believed that they could see through an interviewee's lie with ease, yet there was no trace of falsehood in Sigewinne's expression.\nAnd so it was that they returned in vain, and perhaps there was consensus that the public would not be convinced by the story, for Sigewinne's answer was never published.\nAfterward, those around her came to believe that this was a matter she had no wish to discuss, and thus they privately agreed that no one was to ask her again. Perhaps only Sigewinne herself knows that she had hidden nothing, though she might not have understood the full truth at the time. ｜ 希格雯成为护士长之后，她身为美露莘却拥有人类的外貌这件事就变成了公开的秘密，甚至梅洛彼得堡之外的很多人也对此有所耳闻。\n有的人猜测希格雯是人类与美露莘的混血后代，但谈论这种可能的人无一例外地收到了逐影庭的严厉警告，甚至最高审判官那维莱特也亲自出面否认过这种传言，「旨在杜绝某些无礼之徒的非分之想」。\n也有人猜测希格雯穿戴着特制的面具和手套，并解释这是为了更好地融入人类。但这一说法也很快遭到了大多数人的驳斥，毕竟人类排斥美露莘的时代早已过去很久，希格雯完全不需要这样生活。\n大众的好奇心让报社看到了商机，数名记者被派往梅洛彼得堡对希格雯展开一次专访。\n「恕我冒昧，请问您的容貌为什么是现在这样的？」\n记者们用词委婉，态度却都十分急切。希格雯认真思考了记者们的提问后，讲起了一个用遥远的回忆编织而成的故事——\n在人类和美露莘还无法互相信任的年代，只有一个小女孩儿愿意做希格雯的朋友。后来小女孩儿染上急病，希格雯是唯一一位能及时赶到的医生。然而仅仅因为希格雯是美露莘，小女孩儿的父母就将希格雯拒之门外。\n为了拯救自己的朋友，希格雯找到了一位吓人的巫婆，向她祈求。在确认了希格雯的决心后，巫婆将一瓶由罪孽调制成的药水交给了她。使用了这瓶药水之后，希格雯获得了人类的面庞，长出了人类的手脚，并最终拯救了自己的朋友。\n听完希格雯的讲述，记者们面面相觑。\n「护士长，这是个童话故事吧？」\n「是真的哦。」\n看着希格雯的眼神，记者们再次面面相觑。他们都是行业精英，自认能够辨别出受访者的任何谎言，但却无法从希格雯的眼神中读出半点虚假的意味。\n于是记者们铩羽而归，或许是觉得大众的好奇心根本无法被这个故事说服，希格雯的回答并没有见诸报端。\n此后，希格雯身边的人都以为这是她不愿谈起的秘辛，便私下约定任何人都不能再向她询问此事。但或许只有希格雯才知道，她并非有意隐瞒什么，而是彼时的她也尚未了解全部的真相。
- When the <color=#FFD780FF>Shrine of Maya</color> is unleashed and the Elemental Types of the party members are being tabulated, the count will add 1 to the number of Pyro, Electro, and Hydro characters respectively. ｜ 展开<color=#FFD780FF>摩耶之殿</color>计算队伍中特定元素类型的角色数量时，额外计入火元素、雷元素、水元素的角色各1名。

- Use the Fayz Potion to enter Time Dilation mode. In this mode, you can <color=#FFE14BFF>zoom and adjust your camera angle</color> to adjust your field of vision.\nIn Time Dilation mode, you can <color=#FFE14BFF>save the onscreen image</color> into your screenshots.\nUse your Viewfinder to <color=#FFE14BFF>capture your opponents' Weaknesses</color> and use the Supersense Skill. When you have captured over 8 such Weaknesses, you can unleash a buffed Supersense Skill. ｜ 使用溢神剂可进入「时停超感」状态，在该状态下，可以<color=#FFE14BFF>缩放或者旋转镜头</color>以调整画面。\n在「时停超感」状态下，可以<color=#FFE14BFF>保存看到的画面</color>进行留念。\n通过画面中的取景框，<color=#FFE14BFF>捕获敌方的破绽</color>，即可释放「超感技能」，当捕捉的破绽数量在8个及以上时，可释放增幅后的「超感技能」。
- I follow her to Yashiori Island to gather reference material. I smuggle snacks from Liyue. I listen to her read books. I think this is a good deal. ｜ 陪她到八酝岛取材。到璃月偷运当地的点心回来。听她念书给我听。我觉得这样就挺好。
- If it's mixed by Diona... surely it can't be that bad? ｜ 如果是迪奥娜亲手调制，那么味道也许…不会太糟？
- Dynamic Skin ｜ 影幻牌面
- So, you've fixed up this turret... because you're planning to do what, exactly!? ｜ 这是…这大弩枪，被你们给收拾好了？你们乱动这东西干什么？！
- When <color=#FFD780FF>Enigmatic Feint</color>'s Enigma Thrust hits an opponent with Shadowsign, a vortex will be created at that opponent's position that will pull nearby opponents in. ｜ <color=#FFD780FF>谜影障身法</color>的谜影突刺命中带有刺影征标的敌人时，将在敌人的位置生成风涡，牵引附近的敌人。
- Do you all see? I can't go, I can't follow... So if I can't go where she is, what choice do I have but to try to bring her back? ｜ 看见了吗？我去不了啊，我去不了…我不就只能想办法把她带回来吗？
- Countless flowers lie within the garden, each more lovely than the most beautiful crystalfly. This is the paradise of people of goodwill. ｜ 花园中播种着无数的花卉，每一朵都要比晶蝶更加绚丽。这是善思之人所蒙许的乐园。
- Uh... You're saying... Everything that happened back there wasn't actually part of the script? ｜ 欸？你们的意思难道是…刚才发生的那些，不是剧本里安排好的桥段？
- But as she says, my "sinful" form is unacceptable in the eyes of other Pari. I cannot return to the Vourukasha Oasis in this state... ｜ 但是正像斯露莎所说的，「有罪之身」是不为其他花灵所容的，因此也无法回归甘露花海…

- Anyway, I'm gonna be sure to show everyone my abilities in the second round. ｜ 总之先不想了。第二轮试胆大会，我可是打算大展身手了。

- After the Sacred Sakura Cleansing Ritual is completed, you're supposed to tell us your story. ｜ 「神樱大祓」完成之后，面具巫女小姐你会将自己的事情告诉我们。
- It went pretty well. ｜ 挺顺利的。
- While a Wind-Blessed Harpastum is in use, your Elemental Skill will be replaced with the ability to throw it.\nHold the aim button to adjust the direction of the throw. ｜ 此时，玩家的元素战技会被替换为抛投「风佑之羽球」。\n长按瞄准，可以调整羽球投射的方向。
- I'll consider it. ｜ 我会考虑考虑。
- Skyward Patrol ｜ 高天巡行

- Do you know anything about what I've been through over all these years? My life as the last Lefevere!? ｜ 你们知道这些年我都是怎么过的吗——身为最后的「勒菲弗尔」！
- See you tonight, everyone. ｜ 那就今晚见了，各位。
- ...Why? ｜ …为什么？

- The crown of an ancient hero who dreamt of conquering the cold. It is proof of its former master's bravery in facing the bone-chilling cold of winter. ｜ 梦想征服冰雪的古代英雄冠冕，是驱使它的故主直面刻骨寒冬的勇气之证。
- But... it doesn't feel like there's anything around here. No monsters, no people, nothing. ｜ 但这周围…无论是人还是魔物，什么都没有啊。

- And stirrr... C'mon, be dreadful, be awful, be absolutely disgusting! Ugh, it can't be that hard! ｜ 搅拌搅拌搅拌，变得难喝吧，变得难喝吧，变得难喝吧…变得难喝应该没这么难吧！

- "I've never seen a case like yours before. How about this: You go find Master Matla, who is a well-trained witch doctor. Tell him your symptoms, and he should be able to treat you." ｜ 「你这个情况我还真没见过。这样吧，你去找马塔拉大师，他是训练有素的巫医，你把这个情况跟他说说，应该就能治好了。」
- S—So this is how it is, huh... Well, having a job is better than nothing. I mean, I've never worked for a cat before, so... I guess we'll just discuss my salary later? ｜ 这、这样啊…无论如何，有份工作都是件好事。虽然我也从来没为一只猫工作过…报酬的事…之后再聊吧…
- Defeat Sappho Amidst the Waves without being hit by her Shattering Ice attacks. ｜ 在不触发「海浪中的莎孚」的碎冰打击的情况下，将其击败。

- It's just like he said. An outside wolf pack coming in and breaking the rules. They will reap what they have sown. ｜ 就像之前，这小子说的。外来的狼群破坏了这里的规矩。它们必然会被制裁。

- You may have helped in an investigation on a similar machine, but this is different. That guy's beam cannons are no joke. ｜ 就算你们说之前也协助调查过类似的机械，但是和这个不同，这家伙的激光炮可不是闹着玩的。
- An exquisite component obtained from defeating a Primal Construct.\nThe lord of the barren desert once had a dream, and once made a great many promises.\nThe legends of the desert say that these machines were originally vehicles for these unknown promises, which now live on only within their mechanical memory banks. ｜ 打倒元能构装体后获得的精巧零件。\n荒漠的王曾经做过一个梦，也做出过许多许诺。\n在荒漠的传说中，这些机械的造物原本是践行诺言的道具，如今也只有它们的机械记忆体中刻写着无人记得的梦与承诺吧。

- All sorts of events can happen during an Imaginarium Theater challenge. Of these, Companion Events allow Alternate Cast members to join your Principal Cast, while Wondrous Boons and Brilliant Blessings can grant your party combat buffs. Mystery Caches can grant certain benefits, but also carry a certain amount of risk. ｜ 「幻想真境剧诗」的挑战过程中，将出现多种事件，其中，伙伴事件可使待命角色转变为可出战角色；奇妙助益与辉彩祝福可以为队伍提供战斗的增益；神秘收获可以提供一定的辅助效果，但有时也包含一定的风险。
- Yes, that's right! Once those annoying gulls flew away, I hurried over to my office. ｜ 对，对！在那群讨厌的紫金渔鸥飞走之后，我就赶紧跑进办公室了。

- Grundeland ｜ 戈伦德兰
- A crab dish cooked in the ancient ways. The aroma of the crab meat inundates the room the instant it leaves the frying pan, and a single bite fills one's palate with the countless rustic flavors of a fishing village hometown. It seems that such simple yet timeless village customs held the secret to this lavish, golden sumptuousness all along. ｜ 古法烹制的蟹肉料理。蟹肉出锅即飘香千里，浅尝一口，唇齿间便满是水乡渔村的万种风情，原来黄金的极度奢华，就藏于古朴隽永的文化之中。
- It appears that victory is mine. ｜ 这场胜利，我拿下了。
- In the end, a young human appeared instead of that sneaky kitsune. If mine mind serves me well, he was one of the three who learned their arts from the Yougou Tengu. ｜ 结果，臭狐狸没有出现，却来了个人类小辈，我记得以前是和影向天狗学法术的三人组之一。
- Tiny Miracle's Flower ｜ 奇迹之花
- So the Fatui started the Vision Hunt Decree? You've been behind it all along? ｜ 眼狩令是你们促成的？难道说，你们从一开始就…
- We're ready. ｜ 准备好了。
- I'm afraid that I don't have much else to tell you. He tends to spend his time with people a little more lively than myself. ｜ 抱歉了，其他的情况我也不清楚，他更喜欢和精神好一点的人待在一起。
- Should we chase after him? ｜ 要追上去吗？
- Huh, this doesn't seem right, either... These gift envelopes are really hard to make. ｜ …唔，感觉也不太对，这种「祝柬」，真难做啊。
- Maybe your past business deals didn't go so smoothly because of bad luck. But this time in Mondstadt, maybe you just got lucky? ｜ 说不定你以前做生意没那么顺利，只是有点倒霉，这次到蒙德来的时候，刚好走了大运。
- Ah yeah, Delavar the "Scar-Riddled Bandit," Engur the "Wide-Eyed Butcher," and Jabari the "Ducktail-Bearded Crook." The whole lot of 'em are known around these parts. ｜ 不就是「圆眼屠夫」恩古尔、「麻脸大盗」德利瓦和「胡子弯刀」杰巴里嘛。这几个人都是出了名的。

- Yeah! We can get a fire going and eat some Grilled Fish while you're away! Mmmm... ｜ 对对，你不在的时候，我们还在附近生火烤鱼吃呢，可舒服了！
- Ugh, are you both done yet? Help me get that key already! ｜ 够啦，你们玩够了没有！快去给我找钥匙！
- And as expected, the second musketeer followed us without hesitation once she saw Morris get separated from the rest of the cast. ｜ 事实证明，第二位铳枪手一看到莫里斯落单，就毫不犹豫地跟了过来。
- You must have traveled via aquabus when you visited the Court, correct? Tell me you've seen the intricate Steambird as well. In Fontaine, even blacksmithing is done by Meka! ｜ 二位到达枫丹廷，想必搭乘过巡轨船吧？在城市中，也曾经见过精密的蒸汽鸟吧。在我们枫丹，连打铁熔炼都由机器代劳！
- #{NICKNAME}, you're finally back. This poor gentleman's been waiting for you. ｜ #{NICKNAME}，你们可算回来了，这位先生正等着你们呢。

- Whose voice was that just now...? ｜ 刚才那是谁在说话…

- Well, it wasn't, which was why I holed up in this little town, where most people wouldn't find me. ｜ 本来确实是不太顺利啦，所以我才会躲到这个小镇上来，一般人可追不到这里。

- Besides, our favorite here has fought many battles on their journey from Mondstadt. Such impressive feats require more than just bravery alone. ｜ #{PLAYERAVATAR#SEXPRO[INFO_MALE_PRONOUN_HE|INFO_FEMALE_PRONOUN_SHE]}们从蒙德一路走来经历了诸多恶战，能够连战连捷，靠的也并不只是勇武。
- Azariq, you knew all these things... But you never once told me about them. ｜ 阿萨里格，你知道这些东西…但你从来没告诉过我。
- How was she doing when she left? ｜ 她离开时情况如何？
- You're not wrong, but that's secondary. The important thing to me is the opportunity for like-minded people to come together and enjoy their favorite hobby. It creates a nice atmosphere... Anyway, now you have your Caskets of Tomes, it's time to find some opponents. ｜ 那只是顺便的啦，重要的是拥有相同爱好的人聚在一起的氛围…嗯，「秘典之盒」已经给你们了，去找那些牌手吧。
- C'mon, we gotta go — those "Wishes" are gonna disappear! ｜ 抓紧时间！不然那个…「愿望」什么的，就要失效啦！
- A traditional snack from Liyue. A large bundle of fried-up Jueyun Chili has been piled up in the middle, and their heat is all but unbearable. Just one small bite feels like someone's trying to burn your throat. A few more bites, and who knows, you might actually end up breathing fire like Guoba! ｜ 璃月民间流传的小菜。大把炒熟的绝云椒椒堆在正中，辣度令人难以承受。仅仅试了一小口，喉咙就仿佛被灼烧一般。多吃几口的话…说不定能和锅巴一样喷火？
- Of course! That's the cruel reality facing every competitor in a place like the Pankration Ring. ｜ 那是当然，拳力斗技场就是这么残酷的地方啊。
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- Please, if only to put a smile on the children's faces... And of course, you'll be well compensated for doing us the favor! ｜ 拜托了，就当是为了小朋友们的笑容。当然，我们也会准备好报酬的！
- Uh... ｜ 唔…
- I can't be sure, but I think that these things are all related: the mud, the flowing light, and this floating crystal fragment. ｜ 我不敢确定，但或许都和这些流动的光…和这块漂浮的晶石碎片有关。
- Fresh Valberry ｜ 新鲜的落落莓

- Then you will be able to travel above the Dainichi Mikoshi, into the closed spaces hidden in the veil of ever-night. ｜ 通往大日御舆之上，被隐藏于常夜帷幕的幽闭之间…
- Farewell. ｜ 保重。
- Er'ye, when I was downstairs, I heard that you are going to rebuild the stage. So, this day has finally come? ｜ 二爷，我刚在楼下听到茶馆的戏台要修了，您终于肯动这个老物件了啊。
- Such timepieces are used by those who dedicate themselves to the way of the wise. These timepieces do not contain lifeless sand, but instead play host to tiny mustard seeds. ｜ 投身贤睿之道者所用的时计，其中盛装的并非无生命的砂砾，而是细小的芥子。
- You sure know how to talk big, eh? ｜ 口气也太大了吧。

- Talk to the residual Pari in the Fravashi Tree ｜ 与谷木中的残灵对话
- What kind of book did you say you read this in!? ｜ 你看的真的是武侠小说吗？
- "The apple doesn't fall far from the tree..."\nJean sighs to herself as she sits down at her desk, head in hands, faced once again with a stack of damage reports.\nCarts blasted beyond repair, storage shacks burnt down, forest fires that the knights barely managed to contain...\nNot to mention the suspiciously high number of deaths from unnatural causes among the fish of Starfell Lake.\nThere's only one potential culprit behind all of this, and she just so happens to be one of their own...\n"Klee!"\nFaced with Jean's stern glare, the harmless-looking Klee surrenders all her concealed explosives.\nShe is then escorted to solitary confinement, despite her protests amidst floods of tears.\nThis occurs about once or twice a week at the Knights of Favonius. ｜ 「那样的父母会培养出这样的孩子，也是理所当然吧…」\n被成堆公物破坏报告搞得焦头烂额的代理团长琴，偶尔会扶额感叹。\n炸得七零八落的车辆、莫名起火的货棚、骑士们好不容易才扑灭的森林火灾…\n还有惨不忍睹的「星落湖鱼类大量非正常伤亡案件」…\n造成这些的凶手只有一人，此人正出现在骑士团总部——\n「可莉！」\n面对代理团长严厉的目光，看似人畜无害的小小少女只好把身上藏得满满当当的爆炸物逐件上缴。\n随后在幸灾乐祸的骑兵队长护送下，哭唧唧地前往禁闭室。\n这样的故事，大概每周都会重演那么一两次。

- The Knave will apply Bonds of Life to characters.\nAfter <color=#F39000FF>clearing a Bond of Life</color>, characters in your party will unleash a Scarlet Nighttide the next time one of their <color=#F39000FF>Charged Attacks</color> hit The Knave. This attack can <color=#F39000FF>interrupt</color> some of The Knave's attacks, including Bloodtide Banquet.\nSome of The Knave's attacks will consume her own HP, and when these attacks hit a character, they will restore her own HP and apply a Bond of Life to the character; if the character hit already has a Bond of Life, the <color=#F39000FF>DMG dealt by the attack will be increased yet more</color>. ｜ 「仆人」会向角色施加生命之契。\n<color=#F39000FF>清除生命之契</color>后，队伍中的角色下一次<color=#F39000FF>重击</color>命中「仆人」时，将释放强大的血汐冲击。这种攻击能够<color=#F39000FF>中断</color>「仆人」包括血潮赤宴在内的部分攻击。\n「仆人」进行部分攻击时会消耗自己的生命值，这些攻击命中角色后会为她恢复生命值并向角色施加生命之契；如果命中的角色已经具有生命之契，攻击造成的<color=#F39000FF>伤害将进一步提高</color>。

- A bonfire made of common "Otogi Wood." The square frame utilizes the abandoned barracks fence, and is extremely fireproof. The firewood is originally intended to be used to make weapons, but it is not suitable for conversion into agricultural tools. With the end of the war, both Watatsumi Island and Narukami Island have canceled their plans to increase the production of armaments, and the corresponding wood was naturally put to good use. The bonfires made from them symbolize the hard-won peace, and according to some soldiers, they can feel a kind of serenity when looking at the bonfire. ｜ 以寻常可见的「御伽木」制作的篝火，方形框架利用了废弃的军营栅栏，防火效果极好，木柴则是原定用于制作兵器，但不适合转产为农耕用具的材料。随着战争终止，海祇岛和鸣神岛双方都撤销了增加武备产量的计划，相应的木材自然会被物尽其用。由它们燃烧而成的篝火象征着来之不易的和平，据一些士兵所说，注视这篝火时，能感受到别样的宁静。
- Nothing I've noticed. Not in the last couple of days, anyway... ｜ 这两天好像没看到什么值得留意的…

- Ah. Well in that case, I don't think you're going to have any luck. You can never know when she'll be back when she goes out to tinker with her fireworks. ｜ 唔，这次你们估计是找不着她啦，那丫头每次出去鼓捣烟花，都不知道什么时候才回来。
- No, of course not. We're not taking anything nearly that heavy back with us. ｜ 当然不是，我们拿走的并非如此沉重的事物。
- Uh, I could tell you're new to this, but I didn't think you were completely clueless... ｜ 我虽然看出来你们是新手，但没想到能新到这种程度…
- I feel disgusted just thinking about it... ｜ 一想到这个我就觉得恶心…
- Years ago, when Mr. Quijano was adventuring with his buddies... Oh, that would be Rouge and the blind man Freeman. ｜ 好几年前，西哈诺先生和他的伙伴们冒险的时候，啊，也就是我的鲁热哥哥、盲人弗里曼他们。

- It's all Paimon's fault. ｜ 都怪派蒙。
- I've given that a lot of thought. For now, I don't think you'll need to worry. ｜ 关于这一点，我仔细想过了，你暂时不用担心。
- Yes, the pitch-black tide. Its vast shadow is almost upon us. We must... Must ensure that everyone gets to safety. That everyone... is safely evacuated. ｜ 对，漆黑的潮水，那巨大的影子就要来了，得…得让大家安全离开，要让大家…安全离开。
- You lit that fire under the old coot's rear, didn't you? ｜ 老头子这把火，还是你们煽起来的吧？

- Before Lyney and I came to our new home, we were constantly adrift on the streets. We experienced many hardships and dangerous situations... It was then that I developed the habit of paying attention to any sign of danger, and also gradually learned to understand what others were thinking. Fortunately, we now have a safe place to live. ｜ 在来到新家之前，我和林尼一直到处流浪，经历了许多艰难和危险的状况。从那时起，我便习惯时刻注意一切危险的迹象，也逐渐学会解读他人的所思所想。好在，如今我们拥有了一个安身之所。
- Phew... ｜ …呼。
- Ah, that one... Yes, I did go to the House of Daena to borrow it. Kaveh said it wasn't worth reading, but I was curious, so I went and read it anyway. ｜ 原来是这本。嗯，我确实去智慧宫借阅了它。卡维说不好看，我出于好奇，就找来看了。
- So that's called a Fravashi Tree, huh? But where are the residual Pari... Paimon can't see them at all! ｜ 哦哦，原来是叫「灵谷木」吗？不过你说残灵…明明什么都看不到嘛！

- Razor is a boy who lives with a wolf pack in Wolvendom.\nBeing raised by wolves has given him both sharp senses and an innocent simplicity. When he's thirsty, he drinks water; when he's hungry, he hunts; when someone tries to harm the pack, his "lupical," he uses his sharp claws to ward off the threat.\nBy contrast, the human world seems all too complicated to Razor. He feels more at home amongst the animals and wilderness of Wolvendom. ｜ 雷泽是与狼群一同生活在蒙德「奔狼领」的少年。\n被狼群抚养长大的他，敏锐而又单纯。渴了喝水，饿了打猎吃肉，如果有坏人要伤害狼群，伤害他的「卢皮卡」，那就用锋利的爪子把他们赶走。\n对这样简单纯粹的雷泽来说，人的世界过于复杂，他还是更习惯和「奔狼领」的鸟兽草木相处。

- For some reason, when people meet me for the first time, they always call me tanuki, or teddy-bear, or kitty-cat... But Sayu is just Sayu — and definitely not a tanuki. ｜ 很多人第一次见到我的时候，都会大呼小叫，还把我当成狸猫。可早柚就是早柚，才不是狸猫。

- Thank you. ｜ 那就拜托您了。
- Sounds to me like you encountered a ghastly little ghostie in the wild? ｜ 听这说法，我猜是野外的小鬼小魂？
- Heh, I'm just pulling your leg. She let me try some of her tea already, and we had a lovely chat. ｜ 呵呵，开个玩笑。她已经请我喝过了，我们还聊得挺投机的。
- Also, I've seen you instructing Ayaka. That cold and dignified personality is exactly what we need for the older musketeer. ｜ 而且我看到你指导绫华小姐的样子了，那冷酷威严的气质正是扮演铳枪手的不二人选。
- No, our best option is to find a way to lure them out. ｜ 不，最好还是想办法把它们引出来。
- Eh? But it smelled terrible... ｜ 欸？！可是…明明闻起来那么刺鼻…
- "Adopt varied techniques when facing targets of different characteristics, so as to control the rhythm of the battle." If one manages to take control of a battle in such manners while taking care of all miscellaneous details almost flawlessly, they might not be too far from possessing the might of a Champion Duelist... ｜ 「针对特质迥异的目标，选用不同的技巧，把控交战的节奏」，若是能这样主导战斗，将诸多细节处理得趋近无瑕，距离决斗代理人们的境界，或许不算太远了吧…
- Let's leave the path ahead to fate... ｜ 把前路交给命运…
- I accept your commission. ｜ 你的委托，我接受了。
- Maybe you're destined to live a lie when you choose to be an actress. Because those parting words spoken by my lover when he left have turned out to be the biggest lie of my whole life. ｜ 或许戏子注定要与谎言为伴吧，至少目前看起来——爱人离别时说的话，已经成了我一生中最大的谎言。
- I've completed some escort missions, more escort missions... Have I mentioned the other escort missions? ｜ 已经完成了「护送委托」，「护送委托」和「护送委托」。
- Oh, and I almost forgot — let me tell you how a hunter drinks. ｜ 哦…差点忘了，我先给你说说猎人喝酒的方式。

- I haven't had much luck lately. Yesterday, {0}, I ran into a Ruin Drake: Earthguard, and it scared me enough to run back and report it... Wait, what?... Is it so weird that I know the complete, scientific name of this monster? I might be an ordinary peddler, but I can still read and study, can I not? ｜ 最近我还真是倒霉啊，昨天居然{0}撞见了一只「遗迹龙兽·地巡」，吓得我赶紧逃回来报案了…等等？知道这个魔物的学名很奇怪吗…我是个普通的小贩没错，可我就不能读书不能学习了吗？
- H-Hello! I'm counting on you to bring my muse back! ｜ 你、你好！取材的事情就拜托你了！

- The character gains assistance from "Resonant Glow": When active characters perform <color=#FFCC33FF>Normal Attacks</color>, 1 stack of "Resonant Glow" is accumulated. When you have at least 2 stacks and there are enemies nearby, "Resonant Glow" executes a coordinated attack after the active character uses a Normal Attack, dealing True DMG to enemies, and the count is reset. ｜ 角色将获得「共鸣萤光」的协助：当前场上角色进行<color=#FFCC33FF>普通攻击</color>时，将为「共鸣萤光」累计1层计数。计数大于等于2层且附近存在敌人时，「共鸣萤光」将在当前场上角色进行普通攻击后进行协同攻击，对敌人造成真实伤害，并移除所有计数。

- Then you are most tolerant. But that is its own virtue. ｜ 你倒是宽厚。也好，不失为一种美德。

- A member of a loosely-organized mercenary corps from the golden desert sands. Will work for anyone as long as the pay is good.\nA true scion of a warrior tribe, such warriors see battle as their ordained purpose, and unlike some barbarian who wields a large ax with ease, these tribespeople are also quite well-versed in the lore and songs of the desert ruins.\nAn ominous, fragmented spirit is sealed within the weapon they use, awakening in moments of peril. Once it does, it can only be silenced by the cries of the vanquished — whether that be its wielder, or its wielder's foe. ｜ 来自黄金一般的沙漠，是松散佣兵团体中的一员。为了报酬，愿意为任何人效力。\n以战斗为天职，真正的武士部族的后裔。与轻松挥舞巨斧的蛮人形象不同，这一族的战士实际上对沙中废都的古文与诗歌颇有研究。\n使用的武器中封印着残破的厄灵，会在危急时苏醒。只有战败者的哀嚎才能平息其忿怒——不论败者是武器的主人，抑或是敌人。
- He is a junior of mine, but he was the first among us to grasp the concept of the Martial Principle. ｜ 他是我的小师弟，却也是我派第一位领悟了「武理」概念的人。
- Blood Blossom Duration|{param4:F1}s ｜ 血梅香持续时间|{param4:F1}秒

- Participate in the racing competition ｜ 参与赛跑

- Sorush, hurry up! ｜ 斯露莎…别耽搁了。

In this state, the device will give off a light that everyone can see, which will be marked on the minimap.\nA Signaling Device can be repaired by more than one Rebel. ｜ 在游侠修理「发信机」的过程中，被维修的「发信机」会在固定时刻进入<color=#FFCC33>「高速发信」</color>状态。此时「发信机」会向上释放所有人都可见的光源，在小地图上亦有对应标识。\n多名游侠可以维修同一台「发信机」。

- Oh? So you don't exactly know what I do? ｜ 哦？原来你不知道我的身份啊。

- If you keep this up for five more seconds, I'm gonna punch you five times. ｜ 您要是再保持这种不正常的状态五秒，我就要给您五拳了。
- Ah, now that you mention it... There's definitely some people who look cute enough, but are real difficult to get along with... ｜ 啊，你这么一说…的确有些长得很可爱的人，相处起来却不太容易呢…
- Continue upwards to investigate ｜ 继续向上调查
- In which case, Heizou isn't just some ordinary housefly, he's like the ace of flies! ｜ 这样说的话，我想平藏先生可能还不仅是普通苍蝇，他应该是只高级苍蝇呢！

- Huh? Could it be... You know how to make Liyue cuisine? That's great! ｜ 欸？莫非...你会做璃月菜吗？那太好了！
- They were tyrants, and their rule was brutal. Words cannot do justice to the way that people suffered at their hands... ｜ 他们在蒙德城里暴行不断，让不少人都苦不堪言…

- Yanxiao just came up here with some Almond Tofu, but... I haven't finished everything Xiangling gave me yet... ｜ 方才言笑又送了杏仁豆腐来，可是…香菱送的还没吃完…

- Hmm? Are you trying to make me feel better? ｜ 你是在安慰我吗，绿宝？
- Most restaurants here offer delicious cuisine at reasonable prices, so they rarely have any competitors in the same price range. Residents only need to spend a small amount of Mora to enjoy a sumptuous feast. ｜ 璃月的餐馆大多非常实惠，物美价廉，同价位中鲜有敌手。市民们只需少量摩拉就能享受丰盛的大餐。
- When it comes to pushing a deadline, there is no one more brutal than Mr. Hirayama. ｜ 编辑长不愧是我们之中催稿最可怕的人。
- One would have you report your readiness once you are sufficiently prepared. ｜ 你准备好之后，速来知会本仙。

- About that, Arakavi should be at the center of Vanarana. I think he's also in need of help for Festival Utsava. ｜ 说到这个，兰加惟应该在桓那兰那的中心。既然要办无忧节，他应该也有需要帮忙的事情。

- Oh, come on. We can work on the name later. What I'm telling you is that "sending your elderly family out on tours" is a thing youngsters do to show their filial piety nowadays, so they say. It's a business opportunity not to be missed! ｜ 名字可以再议嘛。不过「送长辈出门旅游」，据说也是当代年轻人表达孝心的一种方式，我觉得是个商机。

- Strange... ｜ 奇怪…

- A portrait Mamere painted for Paimon and you. At first glance, it doesn't look much like you and Paimon, or anything with a tangible form for that matter. Instead, it looks like waves of beautiful overlapping colors. But when calmly appreciating the portrait, you find that Mamere is conveying everything she wishes to express to you, layer by layer.\nAccording to Seymour's evaluation, Mamere can create unique paintings that differ from the "103,900 different styles of art." This makes her paintings priceless treasures, and those who gaze upon her paintings are always able to feel something different from Mamere's art each time they look at it. ｜ 玛梅赫为你和派蒙所作的肖像画。初看之下，画面上似乎并非你与派蒙的形象，或是某种特定的有形之物，而是诸多瑰丽色彩交叠而成的浪潮，静下心来仔细鉴赏就能发现，玛梅赫正将她想要表达的东西层层传递给你们。\n依照西摩尔的评价，玛梅赫能创作出「十万三千九百种不同的艺术风格」之外，独一无二的画作，她的画作有着无价之宝级别的价值。欣赏者们每次都能从玛梅赫的画中找到不同的感受。

- A strange life form that shares nothing in common with any other land-dwelling creature. In battle, it will enter a stressed state and unleash a fierce Lushmissile while under the protection of a <color=#FFE14BFF>Dendro</color> Ward. If the Ward is broken during this period, it will cause the life form to fall into a paralyzed state. Aside from the usual methods of using <color=#FFE14BFF>Elemental Reactions</color>, attacks imbued with <color=#FFE14BFF>ousia or pneuma</color> can also efficiently pierce the defenses of the Breacher Primus. ｜ 与地上一切生物都没有共性的异形生命体。在战斗中会进入应激状态，在<color=#FFE14BFF>草元素</color>护罩的保护下连续进行猛烈的狂蔓飞弹攻击。若在此期间将其护罩破除，能使其暂时陷入瘫痪状态。除了通常的<color=#FFE14BFF>元素反应</color>手段外，具有<color=#FFE14BFF>荒性或芒性</color>的攻击也能高效击溃隙境原体的防御。

I mean, if I ever stopped taking pride in my own work, then I would also forfeit the right to have any expectations of myself or anyone else. ｜ 谈到专业领域，我算是个骄傲的人。学者面对自己的专长大多如此，不如说，这是我们的根基。假如连这份骄傲都失去了，我就不可能再对自己和别人提出什么要求。

- The Raiden Shogun's Elemental Skill, Transcendence: Baleful Omen, will grant each nearby party member an Eye of Stormy Judgment that will perform coordinated attacks alongside them, dealing AoE Electro DMG.\nWhen party members affected by Eye of Stormy Judgment use their Elemental Bursts, they will accrue Resolve for the Raiden Shogun's Chakra Desiderata.\nWhen the Raiden Shogun uses her Elemental Burst, she will use up all the Resolve accrued by Chakra Desiderata and deal AoE Electro DMG using her Musou no Hitotachi. After this, she will use her sword in battle, with her attacks restoring Energy for her party members.\nThe greater the amount of Resolve consumed, the more powerful her Musou no Hitotachi and the sword attacks after it will be.\nAdditional Elemental Orbs will drop during the trial event challenge to facilitate the testing of the trial character's Elemental Burst. ｜ 雷电将军的元素战技「神变·恶曜开眼」，会为队伍中附近的所有角色授以「雷罚恶曜之眼」，协同队友发动攻击，造成雷元素范围伤害。\n被雷罚恶曜之眼作用的队友施放元素爆发时，还会为雷电将军的「诸愿百眼之轮」积累愿力。\n雷电将军施放元素爆发时，会耗尽诸愿百眼之轮的愿力，发动梦想一刀造成雷元素范围伤害。此后，雷电将军会使用刀进行攻击，并且在攻击时为队友恢复元素能量。\n施放技能时消耗的愿力层数越高，梦想一刀和使用刀攻击的伤害越高。\n为方便体验角色的元素爆发，试用的关卡中会有额外的元素晶球掉落。

- Conscription Slate ｜ 征发令石板
- We all have our areas of expertise! I already tried very hard to explain! ｜ 术、术业有专攻不是很正常的事吗！我已经很努力地讲解了！
- Furnishing Blueprint ｜ 摆设图纸
- Administrative Announcement ｜ 行政命令告示
- Who are you? What's going on? ｜ 你，你…你是谁？怎么…
- There is a camp here... But Arapha... Ara... Ugh! Aranara names are so difficult! ｜ 这里倒是有个营地…可是没有那个兰飞…兰…可恶！兰那罗的名字好难记喔！
- The adeptus once revered as the "Herblord" has long since departed, and only empty medicinal containers remain. Even at war's very end, that desire to help those in need never once wavered. ｜ 昔日被奉为「药君」的仙人已经离去，如今留在此地的唯有无数空置的药笼。直到战争的最后，那扶危济困的悲愿都未曾动摇。
- We help Diluc out. ｜ 我们也一起。
- The impact of this case has been huge. The Marechaussee Phantom, the Gardes, and the Special Patrol have all launched investigations. If there was even the slightest chance that he would show himself, I had to follow up on the lead. ｜ 这起案子的影响很大，不只是逐影庭，连警备队和特巡队也开始下场调查了，所以再小的机会也不能放过。
- Wonder what the Sanctuary looks like the night before the Festival... Let's go check it out! ｜ 花神诞祭前夜的净善宫是什么样的呢？好好奇呀！
- In said dream, we had turned into stone statues, yet we weren't fully so. We could still think, see, and hear. ｜ 在梦境里，我们变成了石头雕像，也不全是石头雕像，我们依然能思考，能看，能听。
- Freminet? ｜ 菲米尼？
- Y—Yes... Let's, but could we keep closer to the mountain? I'd prefer not to look over the cliff... ｜ 好，好…快些走吧，但要靠里面点！我可不敢看悬崖旁边…
- A magic assistant of few words, her emotions are as inscrutable as any cat's. ｜ 寡言少语，罕有表情的魔术助手，性情像猫一样难以猜测。
- Wait, Charlotte! Paimon's still got a question for you! ｜ 喂夏洛蒂，等一下，我也有个问题想问你！
- Player {0} invites you to join them. You will automatically refuse the invite in {1} second(s). ｜ 玩家{0}发起邀请，{1}秒内不确认将视为自动拒绝
- Champion Duelist Evaluation Column ｜ 决斗代理人评价栏目
- Madam Sara just barged in there moments ago... Are you planning to do the same? ... You know what, forget it. I'm not a match for even a single one of you. Just... just do as you please. ｜ 刚才裟罗大人闯了进去，难道你也准备硬闯？唉…算了，我知道你们我一个都拦不住，请便吧。
- Shh! Keep your voice down! We don't want to scare them off! We need to wait until we've got something concrete, then we can use my Kamera to catch them in the act... ｜ 嘘！小声点儿！我们可不能打草惊蛇！等到有决定性证据的时候，再用我的留影机…
- The Waverider is a mysterious waterborne vehicle that can continuously travel across the ocean's surface. It is armed with two weapons, the Swiftstrike Cannon and the Heavy Cannon.\nUse Waverider Waypoints to summon the Waverider to its owner's side. ｜ 「浪船」是神奇的水上载具，能在海面上持续航行，并搭载了两种魔法武装「迅击炮」与「重炮」。\n通过「浪船锚点」即可将「浪船」召唤到船主的身边。
- Domain of Blessing: Spring VI ｜ 祝圣秘境：惊蛰 VI

- The iron mask the knight used to conceal their identity. Many have speculated about the face behind the mask. ｜ 骑士用来遮掩自己面目的铁面具，关于面具下的容貌几何曾有无数猜想。
- First, you should always look at any indicated shorelines, islands or reefs, water depths, hydrological conditions, and other hazards. ｜ 要看上面标注的岸形、岛礁点、水深、水文要素和危险物这几类。

- Sure! Where are we going? ｜ 好啊，那我们要去哪里呢？
- Could you give me a few sticks? ｜ 能给我几支香吗？
- The way I see it, the Qixing aren't all that. Who knows, I might do a better job than them. ｜ 要我看，那些「七星」的大人们也不过如此，说不定还不如我呢。
- Let's head back to Noelle. ｜ 先回诺艾尔那边看看吧。
- Talk to Lisa and Jean ｜ 与丽莎和琴对话
- He never cared to close a sale, he just saw me as a "challenge" and refused to be "defeated"! ｜ 原来他压根不想做成买卖，只是把购物当成「挑战」不肯轻易「言败」！
- ...Yep, you're right! ｜ …嗯，你说得对！

- Maximize your resources and try to use all your Elemental Dice each Round ｜ 合理分配资源，尽量每回合用完元素骰
- His sense of savage cruelty has completely faded away, but that same sense of determination remains strong. ｜ 凶煞之感荡然无存，但那份执着丝毫未改。
- You idiot! That's a misdemeanor, she downgraded the offense. Usually, you just get a warning for that... ｜ 哎呀，你傻啦！这是变成了轻罪，一般在所里教育教育就好…
- The great tengu are naught but brutal braggarts, and especially when drunk! — Tanuki Historical Commentary ｜ 大天狗者，乃凶残暴戾的自大狂也。酒后尤如是。——狸史氏评
- Why would someone wish to see something so terrifying in their last moments? ｜ 怎么会有人在生命的最后想看到那样可怕的场景呢…
- If both sides agree to this, I assure you that we will not allow any acts of retaliation from the Locusts. ｜ 如果公开身份这件事你们双方都认可，我可以保证，不会容许蚱蜢派做出任何报复行为。
- I have a question for you, actually. ｜ 其实我有个问题。
- Ancient Natural History Excerpts ｜ 古老的博物志节选
- Relevant data does not exist. I do not believe we have had the honor of meeting, Oceanid Ann. ｜ 并不存在相关的资料。我不认为我曾有幸与您会面，纯水精灵·安。
- "Guard" ｜ 「看守」
- Going for the big reveal right at the beginning would have been an anti-climax of the most literal kind. I wanted to see how you'd react in a situation like this, and you did not disappoint... ｜ 一开始就点破真相，岂不是太无聊了？我很想见识一下，你们会如何应对这种局面呢。结果你们给了我一个莫大的惊喜…
- Well now, guess that alchemy you learned has finally been put to some use, huh? Well, we do need a demolitions team at the moment. ｜ 嗯。之前学的炼金术派上用场了，是吧？不错，我们正好还缺一个爆破组。

- Stomach... rumbling... ｜ 肚子…有点饿…
- You might have heard of it before. Haravatat is an academic faction that researches languages and runes. One hundred years ago, Madam Faruzan was a researcher from that Darshan. ｜ 或许你也听说过，「知论派」是研究语言和符文的学派…珐露珊前辈在一百年前，就是知论派的学者。
- It must be hard to find. ｜ 应该很不好找。
- Damaged Stone Slate ｜ 破损的石板
- Look at it whenever you're feeling down. Who knows, maybe it'll raise your spirits. If nothing else, you'll know that I'm supporting you all the way. ｜ 不开心的时候就看看这个，说不定就能让你打起精神，觉得至少还有我在支持你。
- What are you doing here this time? ｜ 你怎么又在这里。
- Hahaha, yup, they're all forms of calligraphy, each with its own unique features. Some are neat and orderly, and others are more free-form and expressive... ｜ 哈哈哈，这都是些书法风格的名字，每种风格都各有特色，有的端正规整，有的则肆意挥洒…
- Were you about to start working your magic here? ｜ 你要在这里工作吗？

- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- I've seen Kaeya play Genius Invokation TCG, making up a bunch of baloney to distract his opponents... Hmph! He's a trickster, plain and simple. So, now I gotta check with you guys to see if what he's saying is true. ｜ 凯亚这家伙，玩七圣召唤的时候经常说胡话逗对手分心，坏点子多得很，哼。所以，我得找你们确认一下。
- May patterns on the sand dunes guide your way, esteemed Master of the Jinni. ｜ 愿沙丘的波纹为您指引方向，尊贵的「镇灵主人」。
- What are you doing here? ｜ 你怎么在这儿？
- ... ｜ ……
- Next up, I've got to head to Sumeru, where I'll likely hire some Eremites. That said, I should remember to send the illustrated handbook I've made back to Nasha Town. ｜ 之后该去须弥了，到时委托镀金旅团好了。不过在那之前还得把已经做好的图鉴寄回那夏镇…
- Wait until 20:00 the next day ｜ 等待至次日晚上8点
- Please, come with me. ｜ 两位请随我来吧。
- I just haven't been able to figure out what in Teyvat must have happened after I returned it. ｜ 我就是想不明白，从我还书到现在，究竟发生什么事了？
- Hm, it looks delightful, and the texture is fairly pleasing as well. ｜ 嗯，色泽不错，口感也很好。
- Now that you mention it, it is giving off a strange light... ｜ 那把刀确实有诡异的光芒…
- The only thing I know how to do is go on hunts with my Yumkasaurus partner. As long as you give me a target, I'll be able to bring it back for you. ｜ 我只精通怎么和匿叶龙一起出门狩猎。你告诉我目标，我就能给你把猎物带回来，就是这样。
- Do you still remember who you are, General Mahamatra? ｜ 还记得自己是谁吗？赛诺，「大风纪官」。

- A torrent formed from the convergence of innumerable living wills. During the challenge, small Half-Tulpas will constantly appear and fight against their opponents. Hydro Tulpa: Flashflood will absorb all of the Half-Tulpas on the field into itself to grow stronger. <color=#FFCC33>Defeat the Half-Tulpas or render them immobile</color> to disrupt the absorption process. ｜ 由无数意志与生命聚合而成的洪流。在挑战中，会不断出现小型的「半幻人」攻击敌人。「水形幻人·洪流」在战斗中会将场上的所有「半幻人」吸收以获得力量，变得更加强大。在吸收的过程中<color=#FFCC33>消灭「半幻人」或使其无法行动</color>，可以中断吸收的进程。
- Rebel ｜ 游侠
- Wh—Why were you willing to make the trip? I still can't believe it... ｜ 为什么你会愿意过来呢？太不可思议了…
- Joining Party: III ｜ 加入队伍·其三
- Hah. I'll also need you to explain my abrupt departure to Teucer. ｜ 还有，我这样不告而别，对托克那边的说辞也交给你了。
- How did the culprit trigger the onstage accident? ｜ 凶手引发舞台意外的手法是？
- But if I just marched straight in there by myself, I'd probably get Miss Kamisato in a whole heap of trouble, hehe... ｜ 但又觉得自己突然这样莽莽撞撞去了的话，会不会给神里小姐她们添麻烦，哈哈…
- The <color=#00E1FFFF>loyal servant</color> approached quietly to observe the dragon. For the princess, <color=#00E1FFFF>he</color> will do any and everything. ｜ 此时<color=#00E1FFFF>他</color>悄声靠近把恶龙观察，为了<color=#00E1FFFF>他</color>所敬爱的那一位，他没有一丝惧怕。
- Ah, I see. Taking what you've learned from your travels and applying them to your principles of design... Excellent! ｜ 原来是这样。把旅行中的见闻体会化用到设计里，非常好的思路。
- Would you like to have a chat with me? ｜ 想一起聊聊天吗？
